name: George Whitesides
subject: It’s official. I was just sworn into Congress!
body:
https://secure.actblue.com/donate/gw-q1-2025?refcode=em-header [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/gw-q1-2025?refcode=em-header]
Peter,

It’s official! Earlier today, with my family by my side, I took the oath of office and was sworn in as the new representative for California’s 27th District.

It’s the honor of a lifetime to have this opportunity to serve our community in Congress. I look forward to going to bat every single day for my constituents in Santa Clarita, the Antelope Valley, and the San Fernando Valley.

Your support – whether through volunteering, contributing, or spreading the word – helped flip one of the nation’s few toss‐up districts. I truly can't thank you enough.

Now, the real work begins. There’s no doubt we have some challenges ahead, but I’m committed to fighting for good jobs, lower costs, safe communities, protecting Social Security and Medicare, and safeguarding reproductive freedom.

I’m ready to deliver, and I’m grateful to have your trust as your Congressman.

Onward together,

George

Donate >> https://secure.actblue.com/donate/gw-q1-2025?refcode=em-1.3.25-all-b
https://www.facebook.com/whitesidesforcongress/? [https://www.facebook.com/whitesidesforcongress/?] https://www.instagram.com/whitesidesforcongress/? [https://www.instagram.com/whitesidesforcongress/?] https://twitter.com/gtwhitesides? [https://twitter.com/gtwhitesides?]George has spent his career solving problems. Now, he’s ready to deliver for the people of California's 27th Congressional District. Chip in to George's campaign today. [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/gw-q1-2025?refcode=em-footer]
To learn more about George and his commitment to working families, please visit: GeorgeWhitesides.com [https://www.georgewhitesides.com/?]

name: Mike Thompson
subject: I need to hear from you, Peter
disclaimer_text: Paid For By Mike Thompson For Congress [unsubscribe](https://support
body:
|
---
| | Peter,

Today I will be sworn in for another term in Congress and I am so grateful to continue to have the opportunity to serve as your representative.

While there will be challenges ahead, this new Congress does present an opportunity to work for the changes and issues important to our communities. I want to hear directly from you and what your top priorities are for 2025.

**_[It will only take a few minutes to make sure your voice is being heard in Washington D.C. Take the survey and let me know today what you would like Congress to focus on this year.](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/99807781/520939619/647104671?source=EM_NBI_MT_202412_SV_Priorities_0_ID_MikeThompson_NA_NA_Priorities&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDYvMS84NDQ0OSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI1ZjgzNGRkNC0zMGNhLWVmMTEtODhkMC0wMDIyNDgyYTliNDUiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=yj-0bP8QMg-5hlunWqV-OyGHgjvnnlxlW1wR4kOblYE=&emci=3eea4b44-fdbe-ef11-88ce-0022482a93af&emdi=5f834dd4-30ca-ef11-88d0-0022482a9b45&ceid=2678920)_** **[Take the Survey>>](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/99807783/520939621/647104671?source=EM_NBI_MT_202412_SV_Priorities_0_ID_MikeThompson_NA_NA_Priorities&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDYvMS84NDQ0OSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI1ZjgzNGRkNC0zMGNhLWVmMTEtODhkMC0wMDIyNDgyYTliNDUiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=yj-0bP8QMg-5hlunWqV-OyGHgjvnnlxlW1wR4kOblYE=&emci=3eea4b44-fdbe-ef11-88ce-0022482a93af&emdi=5f834dd4-30ca-ef11-88d0-0022482a9b45&ceid=2678920)**
I can’t wait to hit the ground running. I’ve always made it a point to fight for important issues like lowering costs for working families, affordable housing, investments in infrastructure, and more.

It’s more important than ever that I know what issues matter the most to you, so I can amplify your voice.

**_[I want to know what you would like me to focus on for our community this year. Can you click here and take the Priorities Survey?](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/99807785/520939623/647104671?source=EM_NBI_MT_202412_SV_Priorities_0_ID_MikeThompson_NA_NA_Priorities&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDYvMS84NDQ0OSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI1ZjgzNGRkNC0zMGNhLWVmMTEtODhkMC0wMDIyNDgyYTliNDUiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=yj-0bP8QMg-5hlunWqV-OyGHgjvnnlxlW1wR4kOblYE=&emci=3eea4b44-fdbe-ef11-88ce-0022482a93af&emdi=5f834dd4-30ca-ef11-88d0-0022482a9b45&ceid=2678920)_**

Thank you for your support,
Mike

With a new year comes new challenges and opportunities. After an election full of twists and turns, the DLCC is preparing for one of the biggest fights of our lifetime under a second Trump presidency. | | |
---
| |
---|---
Happy 2025! With a new year comes new challenges and opportunities. After an election full of twists and turns, the DLCC is preparing for one of the biggest fights of our lifetime under a second Trump presidency and GOP majorities in the House and Senate. **Defeating the MAGA movement will require everyone who cares about protecting our democracy to stay informed, involved, and inspired. That’s why we’re asking supporters like you to share your thoughts on the path ahead.** [Please take a few moments to complete our 2025 priorities survey. We review every response and use it to guide our strategy for the year ahead.](https://an.dlcc.org/ss/c/u001.yjJN_MEbNx94PLaWzZ6hWzRBi1I12trvGpCMAmsq3z65uzXZ3Lx0M-VZsM52_Nar52IziYBn59SyqnwjmHCp8H6ut03kM2hnVERA0HvFIMsvQ50OAFY2HTOGFHNZAI_6gwByjaVt0arpQhX-H1CHUQ1U1rsnMJE-AeyfQv-4OAtLSd9_WFXDn8vdjamECvnJ6Bizw5jVIU-CWBpAd1TtRfi29kte3WcajXezXBZOX4xhbGYuU6q-6goTti9LsiipwgS-xVBwqXnFslCX55-QRPTVc5YcFVEWtbovr4z_GbJbxBzgnjxFlxLWfo6F7feWm5p0-HI2cTDqns7oZshDXBIOMSYljw4K_jQgrH3JE2ETezsP1we3yhtRxTn_4Eqy/4cv/1H6w26jRR8uHmoOLfEsLeA/h0/h001.XEYCd7XBlkixFYb1YYjzqQYmOILfnNN2N2l57Rk6-5g) **[Share your thoughts →](https://an.dlcc.org/ss/c/u001.yjJN_MEbNx94PLaWzZ6hWzRBi1I12trvGpCMAmsq3z65uzXZ3Lx0M-VZsM52_Nar52IziYBn59SyqnwjmHCp8H6ut03kM2hnVERA0HvFIMsvQ50OAFY2HTOGFHNZAI_6gwByjaVt0arpQhX-H1CHUQ1U1rsnMJE-AeyfQv-4OAtLSd9_WFXDn8vdjamECvnJ6Bizw5jVIU-CWBpAd1TtRRLQNgz1wNX8eO84qHNwXpusTMB5H1LCCXQSLuWrF2KuVCTxgOFbgjGjUuLdFFMucuCo2dtq14ePaXMf6_MSY9i9fVNVpCgO1utw7eUgs860oJsP44eIirapXEM7fuiZfCI3zxFxr_UFOdPO6L92HDPRbOYgEAwW-cmVVNpjSP_T4teDX8GBadQ-PgeYVF55fQ/4cv/1H6w26jRR8uHmoOLfEsLeA/h1/h001.f_aXGSvir4AhXDIkyurs7nT4U7P07V0kmC8LMRb5jxI)** In the aftermath of Election Day, the DLCC emerged with hard-won victories in battleground states across the map, protecting our majority in the Pennsylvania House, flipping seats in Wisconsin, and defending incumbents in a tough electoral environment nationwide. We’re leading the way, and that’s thanks to our efforts to build a movement of tens of thousands of folks like you who care about the work happening in state governments. **Your continued participation on this team is crucial to the success of the DLCC’s mission to build a better America for families like yours.** [If you have two minutes to spare, will you share your thoughts? Together, we can rebuild Democrats’ prospects up and down the ballot. ](https://an.dlcc.org/ss/c/u001.yjJN_MEbNx94PLaWzZ6hWzRBi1I12trvGpCMAmsq3z65uzXZ3Lx0M-VZsM52_Nar52IziYBn59SyqnwjmHCp8H6ut03kM2hnVERA0HvFIMsvQ50OAFY2HTOGFHNZAI_6gwByjaVt0arpQhX-H1CHUQ1U1rsnMJE-AeyfQv-4OAtLSd9_WFXDn8vdjamECvnJ6Bizw5jVIU-CWBpAd1TtRbbkgVhSihEz2VN_4jfUqXzAunOsv-4gLkbCz7LUWLzUh33j8AwXck0lpw5q9oTTWQ6tjPOaoeTScCrtspZq9e6jFhPq7F5B3aWaQWpSDe75k5PlabEgeNGWi23XDhhP0ahTaMc6nmGsnSl788mdyEAwAjEBrfNs3OFXUTm8C1hZ/4cv/1H6w26jRR8uHmoOLfEsLeA/h2/h001.aaWWsus1M5kMRb0L5H8Fgp9Y5deecL38ySfXSqj4vP8) **[Share your thoughts →](https://an.dlcc.org/ss/c/u001.yjJN_MEbNx94PLaWzZ6hWzRBi1I12trvGpCMAmsq3z65uzXZ3Lx0M-VZsM52_Nar52IziYBn59SyqnwjmHCp8H6ut03kM2hnVERA0HvFIMsvQ50OAFY2HTOGFHNZAI_6gwByjaVt0arpQhX-H1CHUQ1U1rsnMJE-AeyfQv-4OAtLSd9_WFXDn8vdjamECvnJ6Bizw5jVIU-CWBpAd1TtRRLQNgz1wNX8eO84qHNwXpt8FZ8ulq7kc2ekIlrbq42cO5Ikumg06rwdP6BkglavfU0Huw2DWCwKcQYQ67RT8salp9UwfAn5GSrGomzYwvgHsSGgRS5CHCvqznYhcFxfSNPqf81L6C7Anyr931b3du4qxfLsPw99RlW_RxQa5WPX6zSqoNCqSXHG6aQVilddrg/4cv/1H6w26jRR8uHmoOLfEsLeA/h3/h001.M4ELHxwTHPs9wqxRNvwoMXLzGJBWonVrvlFCUyyTByg)** We hope you have a happy and healthy New Year. clean_body: With a new year comes new challenges and opportunities. After an election full of twists and turns, the DLCC is preparing for one of the biggest fights of our lifetime under a second Trump presidency. | | | | | ---|--- Happy 2025! With a new year comes new challenges and opportunities. After an election full of twists and turns, the DLCC is preparing for one of the biggest fights of our lifetime under a second Trump presidency and GOP majorities in the House and Senate. Defeating the MAGA movement will require everyone who cares about protecting our democracy to stay informed, involved, and inspired. That’s why we’re asking supporters like you to share your thoughts on the path ahead. In the aftermath of Election Day, the DLCC emerged with hard-won victories in battleground states across the map, protecting our majority in the Pennsylvania House, flipping seats in Wisconsin, and defending incumbents in a tough electoral environment nationwide. We’re leading the way, and that’s thanks to our efforts to build a movement of tens of thousands of folks like you who care about the work happening in state governments. Your continued participation on this team is crucial to the success of the DLCC’s mission to build a better America for families like yours. We hope you have a happy and healthy New Year. urgent deadline approaching >>
| **We’re devastated that it’s come to this:** [](https://act.protectvoting.org/signup/release-smith-report?source=VPP_20250103_EMPET_E4_T0_AC&t=6&akid=18355%2E878179%2E6WwEc_) | [1,000 SIGNATURES NEEDED: SIGN OUR PETITION TO RELEASE JACK SMITH’S REPORT TO THE PUBLIC! »](https://act.protectvoting.org/signup/release-smith-report?source=VPP_20250103_EMPET_E4_T0_AC&t=7&akid=18355%2E878179%2E6WwEc_)
---
**** EMERGENCY PETITION CLOSING @ 12 AM ****
**FIRST:** Donald Trump led a vicious attack on our democracy to overthrow the 2020 election!

**THEN:** Trump attacked Special Counsel Jack Smith’s character after he indicted him. _Even threatening to throw him in PRISON!_

**_NOW:_** we need 1,000 Democrats to sign our emergency petition to make sure Jack Smith’s damning report is made public before it’s too late!
**As Donald Trump plots to sweep ALL of his crimes under the rug, we’re counting on Democrats _like you_ to take a stand!**

[**We’re running out of time: Add your name to release Jack Smith’s report and EXPOSE Trump before he takes office in less than 3 WEEKS »**](https://act.protectvoting.org/signup/release-smith-report?source=VPP_20250103_EMPET_E4_T0_AC&t=8&akid=18355%2E878179%2E6WwEc_)

Thank you for having the courage to take a stand,

The Voter Protection Project
| | Paid for by VPP
(www.protectvoting.org)
Not authorized by any candidate or candidate's committee. 401 2nd Ave. S, Ste. 303, Seattle, WA 98104

The Voter Protection Project is on an important mission: To end partisan gerrymandering and voter suppression by electing candidates at the state and federal levels that are forceful advocates for voting rights. Our enfranchisement agenda includes working to ensure that every state has automatic voter registration and online voter registration, convenient early voting, and independent redistricting commissions to ensure politicians are not able to draw their own maps.

name: David Horowitz Freedom Center
subject: Who is the enemy within?
body:
The devastation and destruction we see today has been over a decade in the making – but most of the American people have no clue what we’re up against.| |
---
| | Fellow Patriot, America is on the brink of destruction. I don’t say this to shock or scare you – I say it because it’s true. _What we see today didn’t happen overnight. It’s the result of a movement that began with the Communist revolution in Russia and has been 100 years in the making..._ **...and Barack Obama hit the accelerator button, fast tracking their agenda.** I’d know better than most. When I was a young man, I was one of the leaders of the movement destroying America today. 50 years ago, I was a Marxist revolutionary bent on bringing America as we know it to an end. I stood side by side with Huey Newton and the leaders of the Black Panthers. I edited _Ramparts_ – radical Left's largest magazine. I marched, wrote manifestos, and attacked America whenever and however I could. Then the Panthers murdered my friend, and the Left helped the Communists win the war in Vietnam. My eyes opened to the incredible destruction and evil my “comrades” made possible. So I left and never looked back. I cast my 1984 ballot for Ronald Reagan – then I started the David Horowitz Freedom Center to fight the Left and I’ve dedicated the last 40 years to exposing them. Why? Because I knew first-hand the threat our country was facing. I knew what was at stake and I knew if I didn’t tell the American people what I knew, we would lose our country forever. That’s why I spent 6 months writing** _The Enemy Within: How a Totalitarian Movement Is Destroying America_** – and I want you to have your very own copy of it. **[So I’m asking you to stand with me and make a generous, tax-deductible donation of $35 or more to my Freedom Center. As a thank you, I’ll send you a complimentary copy of The Enemy Within.](http://links.freedomtrainalert.com/u/click?_t=2d4f229f156142619b4e4f956d2d65c9&_m=0445b460d8004e5dbc34c78e7340cdcd&_e=atPz99quEhJ8icYLKCl5Vfyi7FjsynHyiCHjNwFnpGpSTyaLgWq507nhnywbS5ylFEe3zRfg0j2XNf03AjzQoTmVA_E7aNXv53FUQPUqG6DPrlbwsLLiT6pAtK-wfRqH6_jI784O0U6rPBjud6hG30NDLE6ynhDwxi6oAVNAwnvn6GyEOakMDPxVoiobpa-6h_1_94muA1EXZdvwzJUfJeqZslKSZEIbyqN7hLS85dtCkQxiuJZ-UqrFHNUJnMbkCp6BHqM1gXn7-Jc2XlCjIPi9fd-As8prd8bJ7Y9JRWtrzN2yw3P_UxZTtpTdNmaxMVpaBDqelH6Fo23GgOa-67dWw7to264i2ISB2Qcito-VF1GDONsT2EQzS4Y6aiSjE0hJgJW9ZYgLe9ib7G9Z4kbDV2blOqfzmFb-MeQ62yE%3D)** When you think of “the enemy within” you may think of Joe Biden, Nancy Pelosi or even Alexandria Ocasio-Cortez...and you wouldn’t be wrong. But make no mistake: **The real mastermind is Barack Obama.** Barack Obama laid the groundwork for everything we’ve seen since 2020 back in 2008. Barack Obama led the destruction of our cities, cozying up to Black Lives Matter radicals and siding with criminals over police upholding the rule of law. Barack Obama championed the castration of our military, making us a laughingstock on the world stage. And Barack Obama was the true architect behind the bogus Russian collusion witch hunt. The devastation and destruction we see today has been over a decade in the making – but most of the American people have no clue what we’re up against. **That’s why I wrote _The Enemy Within: How a Totalitarian Movement Is Destroying America_ to explain how communist and fascist Leftists infiltrated and overtook the Democrat Party...** ...how it has become a party of racism and hatred attacking the very foundations of our country... ... and how their ultimate goal is to create a one-party state – and cancel, deplatform and silence every last one of their political opponents by slandering them as “white supremacists” and worse. The reviews speak for themselves... “A Great Book” – Dinesh D’Souza “ _The Enemy Within_ is a book for all patriots who understand that our country is in a fight for its life.” – Mark Levin “David Horowitz does it again in a must-read for any American concerned about where we are headed as a nation.” Laura Ingraham I wrote _The Enemy Within_ because... I know if our country stands a chance, Americans must understand exactly how sinister and dangerous the new Democrat Party actually is. I was the enemy within — and I know in my bones what it will take to defeat them. We’ve reached the point in our history that will decide our future – and we either win these political battles or lose everything that makes us prosperous and free. **[That’s why I’ll send you a complimentary copy of The Enemy Within when you donate $35 or more to the Freedom Center today and give us the ammunition we need to expose the Left’s evil agenda to every American patriot.](http://links.freedomtrainalert.com/u/click?_t=2d4f229f156142619b4e4f956d2d65c9&_m=0445b460d8004e5dbc34c78e7340cdcd&_e=atPz99quEhJ8icYLKCl5Vfyi7FjsynHyiCHjNwFnpGpSTyaLgWq507nhnywbS5ylFEe3zRfg0j2XNf03AjzQoTmVA_E7aNXv53FUQPUqG6DPrlbwsLLiT6pAtK-wfRqH6_jI784O0U6rPBjud6hG30NDLE6ynhDwxi6oAVNAwnvn6GyEOakMDPxVoiobpa-6h_1_94muA1EXZdvwzJUfJeqZslKSZEIbyqN7hLS85dtCkQxiuJZ-UqrFHNUJnMbk5V0GoVkA9Kjd7Cz-vwWVfoCLRkvtSKlXmgBO-H1rOkHXbAIUkgtOpaTS5X10KmqgoGvHdaxN5k8gzHtuWfFVOqtEirk5AdHs_rypSepYTqv-tO3cgP3KWPXP0xdGxeUJZpynj_pzrLiptEaHPv9z5MDxa1yKA7XjgK2q1H0OFR8%3D)** The Left is at war with America. They don’t simply disagree with us about how to make our country better – they want to destroy it to make way for their Marxist dystopia. Or in Obama’s own words “radically transform” America. **And they don’t care how much they have to lie, cheat or steal to achieve it.** So it’s up to patriots like you and me to expose the truth about the Left to our fellow Americans while we still can.
---
| | Sincerely,
---
---
David Horowitz
---
P.S. I know how we got to this point in our country, and I know how we get out. But the clock is ticking and our country is hanging by a thread. **[Please make a generous donation of $35 or more to the Freedom Center today and as a thank you, I’ll rush a complimentary copy of my book The Enemy Within to you.](http://links.freedomtrainalert.com/u/click?_t=2d4f229f156142619b4e4f956d2d65c9&_m=0445b460d8004e5dbc34c78e7340cdcd&_e=atPz99quEhJ8icYLKCl5Vfyi7FjsynHyiCHjNwFnpGpSTyaLgWq507nhnywbS5ylFEe3zRfg0j2XNf03AjzQoTmVA_E7aNXv53FUQPUqG6DPrlbwsLLiT6pAtK-wfRqH6_jI784O0U6rPBjud6hG30NDLE6ynhDwxi6oAVNAwnvn6GyEOakMDPxVoiobpa-6h_1_94muA1EXZdvwzJUfJeqZslKSZEIbyqN7hLS85dtCkQxiuJZ-UqrFHNUJnMbkAAd-5WncY5p3C5DjrTf9HbqXL-DPQqfmcGY0ZfK1VkMUIFRc68rA-VYzJzS6E5LubLHOn31nX2nXlIf0KZTC3ZzzvWtXknC43O9_Tj0tEbWzykMcc_mp1OZqeJeoBR8pRZONkENPFoSxNA8RJZXsGF8MZ5TQ7BLKL5wGc2xFmB0%3D)**
---
| | [](http://links.freedomtrainalert.com/u/click?_t=2d4f229f156142619b4e4f956d2d65c9&_m=0445b460d8004e5dbc34c78e7340cdcd&_e=atPz99quEhJ8icYLKCl5Vfyi7FjsynHyiCHjNwFnpGpSTyaLgWq507nhnywbS5ylFEe3zRfg0j2XNf03AjzQoTmVA_E7aNXv53FUQPUqG6DPrlbwsLLiT6pAtK-wfRqH6_jI784O0U6rPBjud6hG30NDLE6ynhDwxi6oAVNAwnvn6GyEOakMDPxVoiobpa-6h_1_94muA1EXZdvwzJUfJeqZslKSZEIbyqN7hLS85dtCkQxiuJZ-UqrFHNUJnMbksHelstPKBegzhwaW2LqWfJF-nuxBu7D3joYDe2vhBP7yiPKxj5jm6hj6u-IrMh1D0geWC30OuFkXYpYAhmr8bu3Zz7RoEzJUZptq8ZRI66f0tCLRcRhFRj_1lTq19sP6fq4AfGCQIttQQPQym5DRiN8NdyH_o_yWjIoVVZpLbYU%3D)

name: Jason Miyares
subject: My opponents have ONE big advantage…
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Miyares for Virginia |
body:
On January 8th, the Virginia Legislature goes in session. | | | Peter, On January 8th, the Virginia Legislature goes in session. I'm excited to enter this focused period of work for our Commonwealth. **But it poses a serious challenge to our re-election campaign:**_**[We'll be on a mandated fundraising blackout for the duration of the legislative session.](http://links.newsletter.conservativedirect.com/u/click?_t=5b1853ae48754bee8f471363fe4933a9&_m=ecf7ac9155b8439282d5b640d2d39110&_e=9hkQfxxb87XqcE9TiszVP9enCzlY8U0lvs3WWanOf6iqwDZeAl1W_MSGQU_iAvc1pqceF4mpQrZhr2cjft6WCh1DfnX2S9jsmKwcfOQop1SNwT-PUJ-Ru_7shot6k58X7cr5ZKdnDDtFlN-AA_sDZBXtkuNYSdtmDskQ_7d65eHVDYCc01wpteqxpvrXmqiJFVoCGHF6z4t6nhlhUOJzWHysmMYUJhXvPlMy2fidV8teYatp_crjXIb89bMFngju6dYfTlZyQBb7Z4D_7-EOWYbgsKkTOOQqrl7INGQwNyT23KhPm5lypwqzbbYfZ5VlXyv7JxPQGomd6NZ8rpXXQ6aktb_mVrgWU1S5tyeI396PoVjg6H4isv7CbtH77Yn0LuPgI0VGBc10OjfoU3rZ0R7cCZm-psfFM6rrkzjY1QPciEthWihrB6g7y-Z-fGp3)**_ _That doesn 't just mean that I can't send fundraising solicitations -- I couldn't even __accept_ _donations if I wanted to!_ **But do you know who is**** _NOT_****required to engage in a fundraising blackout?** _**My opponents****.**_ That's right -- while I'm working with everything I've got for the people of Virginia, they can fundraise to defeat me day in, day out. _And you better believe that they will press this advantage for all they can._ **Peter, both of my opponents are far-left, anti-police, criminal-rights progressives. I refuse to allow them to overtake us in this race for Attorney General.** **That 's why I'm writing to ask for one more contribution before the blackout period. **_**[**Help me hit our Blackout Goal of $10,000 to get us through these next few months.**](http://links.newsletter.conservativedirect.com/u/click?_t=5b1853ae48754bee8f471363fe4933a9&_m=ecf7ac9155b8439282d5b640d2d39110&_e=9hkQfxxb87XqcE9TiszVP9enCzlY8U0lvs3WWanOf6iqwDZeAl1W_MSGQU_iAvc1pqceF4mpQrZhr2cjft6WCh1DfnX2S9jsmKwcfOQop1SNwT-PUJ-Ru_7shot6k58X7cr5ZKdnDDtFlN-AA_sDZBXtkuNYSdtmDskQ_7d65eHVDYCc01wpteqxpvrXmqiJFVoCGHF6z4t6nhlhUOJzWHysmMYUJhXvPlMy2fidV8teYatp_crjXIb89bMFngju6dYfTlZyQBb7Z4D_7-EOWcz8o5X4zELy_UHypJUm_-Ay0uJ_yJfALYVyUMPKO8EwC97ZjVcBCV7F9wLeeMIfv8494t5xNcfymCCcKaT9pqgxcJTYu0JFL8KpdoH4uEG9Yjjqfhv5yQ3ZpPLpmMQ40fliCRjMKfvYJXIcJY2lFxd-6j5OAp6hgWQczoe-2Hqy)**_ Thank you, Jason Miyares Attorney General
---

name: Rudy Giuliani
subject: I’m going to trial
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Rudy Giuliani Freedom Fund Legal Defense Trust
body:
My final chance to save my home...

They want “SEVERE” sanctions against me.
| [](http://e.1600daily.com/rd/9z2z5ehnm1tb54illvtj5i2amhtb8i4kanlp6jct4u8_rp22sh2s8i6epj5cjge8oj4c1h2bs)
---
Dear Friend,
---
I didn’t want to bother you over the Christmas holiday, but I now have something very important to share with you.
---
Reports indicate that my trial is set to begin on January 16 – just days before President Trump’s inauguration.
---
**_This trial will determine whether the Left can seize my home in Florida and truly leave me with NOTHING. This is my _final_ chance to save my home._**
---
Since there’s no way I can pay the outrageous $148 MILLION judgment against me, they want to rob me of everything I own.
---
They want irreplaceable mementos I gave to my only son. They want personal gifts that I was given by allies abroad to show solidarity with America after the tragedy of September 11th.
---
During these difficult times, Christmas reminded me of what’s _truly_ important in life. Earthly possessions come and go – homes, cars, money all come to an end. But the Bible reminds us that _eternal_ “heavenly treasures” await us.
---
The pursuit of truth, freedom, and justice are worth infinitely more than any earthly possession.
---
**I’d rather lose everything than betray what I know to be true. I could never lie and say what I'm going through is a fair and honest process just to hang on to my possessions.**
---
_"_For what shall it profit a man, if he shall gain the whole world, and lose his own soul?_ " (Mark 8:36)_
---
**As I prepare for my January trial, I’m asking patriots like you to make a contribution to my Legal Defense Trust so that I can keep fighting for my freedom and justice against a rigged and weaponized legal system.**
---
[**Please make a contribution to the Rudy Giuliani Freedom Fund as I prepare for the trial that will determine whether I still even have a home to live in.**](http://e.1600daily.com/rd/9z2z2hb9cus1qcf96kkd4guhieujmibcvfj885voclg_rp22sh2s8i6epj5cjge8oj4c1h2bs)

name: Mark Trammell
subject: Every freedom you cherish is on the line
body:
Gavin Newsom and radical leftist governors are not hiding their plans to wage lawfare against conservatives at a level we’ve never before seen before.

| |
---
| | Gavin Newsom and radical leftist governors are not hiding their plans to wage lawfare against conservatives at a level we’ve never before seen before.
---
| |
---
| |
---
[](http://e.1600daily.com/rd/9z2zc4resecua4q7f6jhflbs4f2aieq16mk81697788_rp22sh2s8i6epj5cjge2o76c9h2bs)
---
Dear Friend, Gavin Newsom and radical leftist governors are not hiding their plans to wage lawfare against conservatives at a level we’ve never before seen before.They're proudly announcing their plans to "Trump proof" their states.The time for resting or taking a post-election victory lap is over.Now is the time to fight, fight, fight. **But I need to know in the next 24 hours if you're with us...** ...because we've never had an opportunity like this one to protect the First Amendment, defend parental rights, and put a stop to the gender-industrial complex's mutilation of vulnerable children.I pray you're with us -- because the Center for American Liberty can't take on the radical left without you.
---
[ **ROLL CALL - Yes, I'm with you!**](http://e.1600daily.com/rd/9z2ze7po24hs64qeq3scffug8v7esbnjmr4ndb93n7g_rp22sh2s8i6epj5cjge2o76c9h2bs)
---
I'm the Executive Director and General Counsel for the Center for American Liberty -- a conservative non-profit law firm that protects your freedom to say what you want, to live according to your conscience, and to pass on your conservative values to the next generation.We will continue to lead the charge against the left’s "lawfare" -- as it increases its efforts to leverage the legal system to force D.E.I. and "woke" nonsense upon us.But with more than 35 active cases -- including some of the most consequential of our time -- your support is more important than ever before as we close in on the end of 2024.Make no mistake, the left is plotting how to use the courts to ram its radical agenda down our throats. **But the Center for American Liberty can stop them --[which is why I need to know in the next 24 hours if you’re with us.](http://e.1600daily.com/rd/9z2z01q7n1fi2o8n7ngjj1gu9hbimcqbf9i93t5eh88_rp22sh2s8i6epj5cjge2o76c9h2bs)**Friend, every freedom you cherish is on the line...
---
* Your right to free speech
* Your right to gather and peacefully protest
* Your right to post on social media without government censorship
* Your right to raise your children in accordance with your values
* For women, your right to privacy and safety in share spaces like locker rooms and restrooms
* For children, the right to grow up without being drugged and surgically mutilated by gender clinics

---
The left wants to erase these rights. They want to shred the Constitution. And worst of all, they want to remove God from every corner of American society. name: Hillsdale College via American Action News
subject: Your Supreme Court survey
body:
You have been selected by Hillsdale College to represent your state in a National Referendum on Religious Liberty.

This sponsored message from American Action News is on behalf of Hillsdale College [](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2zc703kioehgl48e7dde214tm3qlhocvgr7mfurn0_rp22sh2s8i6epj5cjge2o71c5h2bs) Dear Friend, You have been selected by Hillsdale College to represent your state in a **National Referendum on Religious Liberty.** [](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2zduqm31ihbi7755b296sq0k5dg0jvd8scln2gnl8_rp22sh2s8i6epj5cjge2o71c5h2bs) The referendum will only take a few moments of your time. Before you complete it, I want to remind you of some things we've seen (and lived through) in recent years--which we never thought we'd see in our country...
* Government mandates forcing Christian churches to close while casinos, strip clubs, and drug dispensaries remained open.

* Far-Left activists targeting Christian business owners, Christian teachers, and Christian coaches through litigation.

* The weaponizing of the Department of Justice and the FBI against Christian pro-life advocates who are defined as believing in “extremist ideologies” and having the potential for “domestic terrorism.”

* Christians in the workplace being forced to hide their faith while critical race theory and transgenderism are promoted.

**That 's why I'm asking you to take the Hillsdale College National Referendum on Religious Liberty.** By completing this survey, you will help us more clearly understand the views of the American people on this critical issue. Your responses will help Hillsdale strengthen its nationwide educational outreach efforts on behalf of liberty--including religious liberty. Friend, you can complete the **National Referendum on Religious Liberty** by using the secure link below: [**https://info.hillsdale.edu/religious-liberty-survey**](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2z6isks239ahlrton3f644ajltrukuma59upkaljo_rp22sh2s8i6epj5cjge2o71c5h2bs) Like the founders of our nation, the founders of Hillsdale College understood the essential connection between faith and freedom. **The College was founded in 1844 to offer "sound learning" in order to preserve "the inestimable blessings...of civil and religious liberty."** Yet today's ruling class mocks people of faith as "backward," "bigots," and even "Christo-fascists." Politicians like Barack Obama claim that people like you "get bitter" and "cling to guns or religion." These so-called elites are full of contempt for you and for Christianity and will not protect your civil and religious liberties. You and I know that religious liberty in America is under serious threat. But we can reverse course. **The first step is ...EDUCATION.** Today's government policies that threaten religious liberty were conceived and implemented by people deceived by far-Left propaganda in our K-12 schools, colleges, and universities. That's why a vital part of this fight--in which Hillsdale College is a leader--is **reaching** and **teaching** millions of citizens the TRUTH about America's great heritage of religious liberty. We are heavily invested in our educational outreach efforts through our **Project to Save Religious Liberty in America.** These efforts include:
* **Teaching nearly 1,600 undergraduate and graduate students** --on our campuses in Hillsdale, Michigan, and Washington, D.C.--who bring their traditional faith with them as they join the fight to restore liberty and constitutional government in our country.

* **Distributing _Imprimis_** , America's leading digest of liberty, which is mailed to more than 6.6 million homes and businesses ten times per year. Previous issues include "Inside the Transgender Empire" by Christopher F. Rufo, "The Most Important Decision in Life" by Bishop Robert Barron, and "The Politicization of the Department of Justice" by Harmeet K. Dhillon.

* **Producing and promoting free online courses** for any citizen who wishes to learn on topics such as Christianity, the Constitution, American history, and free market economics. Several courses (including "The Genesis Story: Reading Biblical Narratives," "Ancient Christianity," and "C.S. Lewis on Christianity") consider the important connection between faith and liberty.

* **Providing a classical K-12 curriculum** with a solid grounding in American history, constitutional government, and economics to schools that educate thousands of students nationwide.

After everything we've seen in recent years, the need for Hillsdale's educational outreach efforts is undeniable. So please share your views by completing the **National Referendum on Religious Liberty** and returning it to me as soon as possible. It will only take a few moments of your time. Your completed survey will help us to develop the most effective strategy to **reach** and **teach** millions of Americans on behalf of liberty. As you might know, Hillsdale College refuses to accept ONE PENNY of government funding--not even indirectly in the form of federal or state student grants or loans. **This independence frees the College from burdensome and corrupting government regulations. Thanks to our generous donors, we remain true to our original mission, even as many other colleges and universities reject religious liberty and embrace radical and dangerous ideologies.** I hope you will partner with Hillsdale College by making a generous tax-deductible gift today. You can easily do so after completing the **National Referendum on Religious Liberty** , which you can access at this secure link: [**https://info.hillsdale.edu/religious-liberty-survey**](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2zggog82dtuog0ji4ab0l1mubm4q2426f2bemiuf0_rp22sh2s8i6epj5cjge2o71c5h2bs) Thank you for your support of Hillsdale's educational outreach efforts on behalf of religious liberty. Warm regards, Larry P. Arnn President, Hillsdale College Pursuing Truth and Defending Liberty Since 1844 |

| American Action News
---
_PO Box 1177 Fort Collins, CO 80522_

* Your right to raise your children in accordance with your values

* For children, the right to grow up without being drugged and surgically mutilated by gender clinics

---
The left wants to erase these rights. They want to shred the Constitution. And worst of all, they want to remove God from every corner of American society. And the moment President Trump puts his hand on the Bible on January 20th, the stakes go up.If you think the left is actively working to silence you, brainwash your children, and force men into women’s private spaces right now... just wait.This is why the Center for American Liberty must be prepared not only to fight back as legal battles arise... ...but to go on the offensive to defend freedom, protect families, and challenge government overreach whenever it arises.But to be effective, I'm counting on your support.

body:
Now I’m serving the Establishment their PINK SLIP

[](http://e.americanbriefing.com/rd/9z2zs2acf211ggv653p8u3hck0319r2g2rmhv4du4l0_rp22sh2s8i6epj5cjge1ob1cth2bs)

I went from serving in the United States Marine Corps to serving the Establishment their _**PINK SLIP**_.

This is Bill Spadea.

When I was serving our country as a Marine, _**I never imagined I 'd be running for governor of New Jersey.**_

But I knew I had to step up when I saw how _**DISASTROUS**_ the Democrats and Establishment Republicans were treating our state.

**There were two things I knew for sure:**

_We need to**BOOT OUT** the political elites who only care about themselves..._

_And we need to put**NEW JERSEY FIRST**._

I'm the outsider the Democrats and the Establishment are _**TERRIFIED**_ of, and they're throwing everything they've got at me to stop this movement.

They want to **SILENCE** us and **DESTROY** the fight for freedom in New Jersey.

That's why I need you to join me and send a message **LOUD AND CLEAR** :

**_" WE WILL NEVER BACK DOWN!"_**

Can I count on you to stand with me?
**[YES!](http://e.americanbriefing.com/rd/9z2zpmk64kqoq6552ljo7qlled8ujobe22sjrpq1ks0_rp22sh2s8i6epj5cjge1ob1cth2bs)**** [ No](http://e.americanbriefing.com/rd/9z2z05k49qg5bd0ih4n4n84bdijqqau0ek54ass41qo_rp22sh2s8i6epj5cjge1ob1cth2bs)**
** Add your name now to show the Establishment that real grassroots patriots like YOU won't stop fighting for New Jersey.**

[✍️ SIGN YOUR NAME 👉](http://e.americanbriefing.com/rd/9z2z00anhiklqfp3iksu54l674vqt1hs3ua8a5m5nmg_rp22sh2s8i6epj5cjge1ob1cth2bs)

We _**CANNOT**_ let the elites keep driving our state into the ground.

I'm proud to fight for New Jersey families, and I'll _**NEVER**_ let anyone tell me to stop standing up for you.

**If you 're with me, add your name now to make it official:**
[ADD YOUR NAME, STAND WITH BILL 👉](http://e.americanbriefing.com/rd/9z2z0ol25q677qim2ofju5ik58g02vomqg668253ahg_rp22sh2s8i6epj5cjge1ob1cth2bs)

name: Hillsdale College via 1600 Daily
subject: Your Supreme Court survey
body:
You have been selected by Hillsdale College to represent your state in a National Referendum on Religious Liberty.

This sponsored message from 1600 Daily is on behalf of Hillsdale College [](http://e.1600daily.com/rd/9z2zocmc4hg463vqdclc0l153586uuf09fqr44bd0oo_rp22sh2s8i6epj5cjge1ob3clh2bs) Dear Friend, You have been selected by Hillsdale College to represent your state in a **National Referendum on Religious Liberty.** [](http://e.1600daily.com/rd/9z2z76u3jgvhf2qbjl9fbsmr12b2c0g9i3totaprmto_rp22sh2s8i6epj5cjge1ob3clh2bs) The referendum will only take a few moments of your time. Before you complete it, I want to remind you of some things we've seen (and lived through) in recent years--which we never thought we'd see in our country...
* Government mandates forcing Christian churches to close while casinos, strip clubs, and drug dispensaries remained open.

* Far-Left activists targeting Christian business owners, Christian teachers, and Christian coaches through litigation.

* The weaponizing of the Department of Justice and the FBI against Christian pro-life advocates who are defined as believing in “extremist ideologies” and having the potential for “domestic terrorism.”

* Christians in the workplace being forced to hide their faith while critical race theory and transgenderism are promoted.

**That 's why I'm asking you to take the Hillsdale College National Referendum on Religious Liberty.** By completing this survey, you will help us more clearly understand the views of the American people on this critical issue. Your responses will help Hillsdale strengthen its nationwide educational outreach efforts on behalf of liberty--including religious liberty. Friend, you can complete the **National Referendum on Religious Liberty** by using the secure link below: [**https://info.hillsdale.edu/religious-liberty-survey**](http://e.1600daily.com/rd/9z2zf2nndqjang806g9fpsgm2nt6d2cm4qpj8dr39hg_rp22sh2s8i6epj5cjge1ob3clh2bs) Like the founders of our nation, the founders of Hillsdale College understood the essential connection between faith and freedom. **The College was founded in 1844 to offer "sound learning" in order to preserve "the inestimable blessings...of civil and religious liberty."** Yet today's ruling class mocks people of faith as "backward," "bigots," and even "Christo-fascists." Politicians like Barack Obama claim that people like you "get bitter" and "cling to guns or religion." These so-called elites are full of contempt for you and for Christianity and will not protect your civil and religious liberties. You and I know that religious liberty in America is under serious threat. But we can reverse course. **The first step is ...EDUCATION.** Today's government policies that threaten religious liberty were conceived and implemented by people deceived by far-Left propaganda in our K-12 schools, colleges, and universities. That's why a vital part of this fight--in which Hillsdale College is a leader--is **reaching** and **teaching** millions of citizens the TRUTH about America's great heritage of religious liberty. We are heavily invested in our educational outreach efforts through our **Project to Save Religious Liberty in America.** These efforts include:
* **Teaching nearly 1,600 undergraduate and graduate students** --on our campuses in Hillsdale, Michigan, and Washington, D.C.--who bring their traditional faith with them as they join the fight to restore liberty and constitutional government in our country.

* **Distributing _Imprimis_** , America's leading digest of liberty, which is mailed to more than 6.6 million homes and businesses ten times per year. Previous issues include "Inside the Transgender Empire" by Christopher F. Rufo, "The Most Important Decision in Life" by Bishop Robert Barron, and "The Politicization of the Department of Justice" by Harmeet K. Dhillon.

* **Producing and promoting free online courses** for any citizen who wishes to learn on topics such as Christianity, the Constitution, American history, and free market economics. Several courses (including "The Genesis Story: Reading Biblical Narratives," "Ancient Christianity," and "C.S. Lewis on Christianity") consider the important connection between faith and liberty.

* **Providing a classical K-12 curriculum** with a solid grounding in American history, constitutional government, and economics to schools that educate thousands of students nationwide.

After everything we've seen in recent years, the need for Hillsdale's educational outreach efforts is undeniable. So please share your views by completing the **National Referendum on Religious Liberty** and returning it to me as soon as possible. It will only take a few moments of your time. Your completed survey will help us to develop the most effective strategy to **reach** and **teach** millions of Americans on behalf of liberty. As you might know, Hillsdale College refuses to accept ONE PENNY of government funding--not even indirectly in the form of federal or state student grants or loans. **This independence frees the College from burdensome and corrupting government regulations. Thanks to our generous donors, we remain true to our original mission, even as many other colleges and universities reject religious liberty and embrace radical and dangerous ideologies.** I hope you will partner with Hillsdale College by making a generous tax-deductible gift today. You can easily do so after completing the **National Referendum on Religious Liberty** , which you can access at this secure link: [**https://info.hillsdale.edu/religious-liberty-survey**](http://e.1600daily.com/rd/9z2zinmdtpus9gilclhb99rdn5f20ra63kecf77hdu0_rp22sh2s8i6epj5cjge1ob3clh2bs) Thank you for your support of Hillsdale's educational outreach efforts on behalf of religious liberty. Warm regards, Larry P. Arnn President, Hillsdale College Pursuing Truth and Defending Liberty Since 1844 |

| 1600 Daily
---
_PO Box 461 Fort Collins, CO 80522_

That's why a vital part of this fight--in which Hillsdale College is a leader--is reaching and teaching millions of citizens the TRUTH about America's great heritage of religious liberty. We are heavily invested in our educational outreach efforts through our Project to Save Religious Liberty in America. These efforts include: Teaching nearly 1,600 undergraduate and graduate students --on our campuses in Hillsdale, Michigan, and Washington, D.C.--who bring their traditional faith with them as they join the fight to restore liberty and constitutional government in our country. Distributing Imprimis , America's leading digest of liberty, which is mailed to more than 6.6 million homes and businesses ten times per year. Previous issues include "Inside the Transgender Empire" by Christopher F. Rufo, "The Most Important Decision in Life" by Bishop Robert Barron, and "The Politicization of the Department of Justice" by Harmeet K. Dhillon. Producing and promoting free online courses for any citizen who wishes to learn on topics such as Christianity, the Constitution, American history, and free market economics. Several courses (including "The Genesis Story: Reading Biblical Narratives," "Ancient Christianity," and "C.S. Lewis on Christianity") consider the important connection between faith and liberty. Providing a classical K-12 curriculum with a solid grounding in American history, constitutional government, and economics to schools that educate thousands of students nationwide. After everything we've seen in recent years, the need for Hillsdale's educational outreach efforts is undeniable. So please share your views by completing the National Referendum on Religious Liberty and returning it to me as soon as possible. It will only take a few moments of your time. Your completed survey will help us to develop the most effective strategy to reach and teach millions of Americans on behalf of liberty. As you might know, Hillsdale College refuses to accept ONE PENNY of government funding--not even indirectly in the form of federal or state student grants or loans. This independence frees the College from burdensome and corrupting government regulations. Thanks to our generous donors, we remain true to our original mission, even as many other colleges and universities reject religious liberty and embrace radical and dangerous ideologies. I hope you will partner with Hillsdale College by making a generous tax-deductible gift today. You can easily do so after completing the National Referendum on Religious Liberty , which you can access at this secure link: Thank you for your support of Hillsdale's educational outreach efforts on behalf of religious liberty. Warm regards, Larry P. Arnn President, Hillsdale College Pursuing Truth and Defending Liberty Since 1844 | | American Defense News PO Box 1188 Fort Collins, CO 80522 |

name: Rudy Giuliani
subject: I’m going to trial
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Rudy Giuliani Freedom Fund Legal Defense Trust
body:
My final chance to save my home...

They want “SEVERE” sanctions against me.
| [](https://e.updatesforgreatamericans.com/rd/9z2zu6jtpmhmv1cc04vv2er6gsv8dcerf4febajd1ng_rp22sh2s8i6epj5cjie0oj6chh2bs)
---
Dear Friend,
---
I didn’t want to bother you over the Christmas holiday, but I now have something very important to share with you.
---
Reports indicate that my trial is set to begin on January 16 – just days before President Trump’s inauguration.
---
**_This trial will determine whether the Left can seize my home in Florida and truly leave me with NOTHING. This is my _final_ chance to save my home._**
---
Since there’s no way I can pay the outrageous $148 MILLION judgment against me, they want to rob me of everything I own.
---
They want irreplaceable mementos I gave to my only son. They want personal gifts that I was given by allies abroad to show solidarity with America after the tragedy of September 11th.
---
During these difficult times, Christmas reminded me of what’s _truly_ important in life. Earthly possessions come and go – homes, cars, money all come to an end. But the Bible reminds us that _eternal_ “heavenly treasures” await us.
---
The pursuit of truth, freedom, and justice are worth infinitely more than any earthly possession.
---
**I’d rather lose everything than betray what I know to be true. I could never lie and say what I'm going through is a fair and honest process just to hang on to my possessions.**
---
_"_For what shall it profit a man, if he shall gain the whole world, and lose his own soul?_ " (Mark 8:36)_
---
**As I prepare for my January trial, I’m asking patriots like you to make a contribution to my Legal Defense Trust so that I can keep fighting for my freedom and justice against a rigged and weaponized legal system.**
---
[**Please make a contribution to the Rudy Giuliani Freedom Fund as I prepare for the trial that will determine whether I still even have a home to live in.**](https://e.updatesforgreatamericans.com/rd/9z2z0ttouej5un8qcbosnndbkq2kj4k6mkge40961q0_rp22sh2s8i6epj5cjie0oj6chh2bs)

name: Hillsdale College via ICYMI News
subject: Your Supreme Court survey
body:
You have been selected by Hillsdale College to represent your state in a National Referendum on Religious Liberty.

This sponsored message from ICYMI News is on behalf of Hillsdale College [](http://e.icyminews.com/rd/9z2zj9kv9h1p5js2v2snjscbkcidt25aqeps5gn1ktg_rp22sh2s8i6epj5cjie0oj6chh2bs) Dear Friend, You have been selected by Hillsdale College to represent your state in a **National Referendum on Religious Liberty.** [](http://e.icyminews.com/rd/9z2z7g4qhc2t4251ee5rt5bs70av26tvntm85s217ug_rp22sh2s8i6epj5cjie0oj6chh2bs) The referendum will only take a few moments of your time. Before you complete it, I want to remind you of some things we've seen (and lived through) in recent years--which we never thought we'd see in our country...
* Government mandates forcing Christian churches to close while casinos, strip clubs, and drug dispensaries remained open.

* Far-Left activists targeting Christian business owners, Christian teachers, and Christian coaches through litigation.

* The weaponizing of the Department of Justice and the FBI against Christian pro-life advocates who are defined as believing in “extremist ideologies” and having the potential for “domestic terrorism.”

* Christians in the workplace being forced to hide their faith while critical race theory and transgenderism are promoted.

**That 's why I'm asking you to take the Hillsdale College National Referendum on Religious Liberty.** By completing this survey, you will help us more clearly understand the views of the American people on this critical issue. Your responses will help Hillsdale strengthen its nationwide educational outreach efforts on behalf of liberty--including religious liberty. Friend, you can complete the **National Referendum on Religious Liberty** by using the secure link below: [**https://info.hillsdale.edu/religious-liberty-survey**](http://e.icyminews.com/rd/9z2z8qp72pktto24b7mhi56a3lsrtt5i3mbdj790qo0_rp22sh2s8i6epj5cjie0oj6chh2bs) Like the founders of our nation, the founders of Hillsdale College understood the essential connection between faith and freedom. **The College was founded in 1844 to offer "sound learning" in order to preserve "the inestimable blessings...of civil and religious liberty."** Yet today's ruling class mocks people of faith as "backward," "bigots," and even "Christo-fascists." Politicians like Barack Obama claim that people like you "get bitter" and "cling to guns or religion." These so-called elites are full of contempt for you and for Christianity and will not protect your civil and religious liberties. You and I know that religious liberty in America is under serious threat. But we can reverse course. **The first step is ...EDUCATION.** Today's government policies that threaten religious liberty were conceived and implemented by people deceived by far-Left propaganda in our K-12 schools, colleges, and universities. That's why a vital part of this fight--in which Hillsdale College is a leader--is **reaching** and **teaching** millions of citizens the TRUTH about America's great heritage of religious liberty. We are heavily invested in our educational outreach efforts through our **Project to Save Religious Liberty in America.** These efforts include:
* **Teaching nearly 1,600 undergraduate and graduate students** --on our campuses in Hillsdale, Michigan, and Washington, D.C.--who bring their traditional faith with them as they join the fight to restore liberty and constitutional government in our country.

* **Distributing _Imprimis_** , America's leading digest of liberty, which is mailed to more than 6.6 million homes and businesses ten times per year. Previous issues include "Inside the Transgender Empire" by Christopher F. Rufo, "The Most Important Decision in Life" by Bishop Robert Barron, and "The Politicization of the Department of Justice" by Harmeet K. Dhillon.

* **Producing and promoting free online courses** for any citizen who wishes to learn on topics such as Christianity, the Constitution, American history, and free market economics. Several courses (including "The Genesis Story: Reading Biblical Narratives," "Ancient Christianity," and "C.S. Lewis on Christianity") consider the important connection between faith and liberty.

* **Providing a classical K-12 curriculum** with a solid grounding in American history, constitutional government, and economics to schools that educate thousands of students nationwide.

After everything we've seen in recent years, the need for Hillsdale's educational outreach efforts is undeniable. So please share your views by completing the **National Referendum on Religious Liberty** and returning it to me as soon as possible. It will only take a few moments of your time. Your completed survey will help us to develop the most effective strategy to **reach** and **teach** millions of Americans on behalf of liberty. As you might know, Hillsdale College refuses to accept ONE PENNY of government funding--not even indirectly in the form of federal or state student grants or loans. **This independence frees the College from burdensome and corrupting government regulations. Thanks to our generous donors, we remain true to our original mission, even as many other colleges and universities reject religious liberty and embrace radical and dangerous ideologies.** I hope you will partner with Hillsdale College by making a generous tax-deductible gift today. You can easily do so after completing the **National Referendum on Religious Liberty** , which you can access at this secure link: [**https://info.hillsdale.edu/religious-liberty-survey**](http://e.icyminews.com/rd/9z2z75dbteu7kc3khp1s8sq0as2e9fkpbbn0aps3rto_rp22sh2s8i6epj5cjie0oj6chh2bs) Thank you for your support of Hillsdale's educational outreach efforts on behalf of religious liberty. Warm regards, Larry P. Arnn President, Hillsdale College Pursuing Truth and Defending Liberty Since 1844 |

| ICYMI News

Dear Friend, Gavin Newsom and radical leftist governors are not hiding their plans to wage lawfare against conservatives at a level we’ve never before seen before.They're proudly announcing their plans to "Trump proof" their states.The time for resting or taking a post-election victory lap is over.Now is the time to fight, fight, fight. **But I need to know in the next 24 hours if you're with us...** ...because we've never had an opportunity like this one to protect the First Amendment, defend parental rights, and put a stop to the gender-industrial complex's mutilation of vulnerable children.I pray you're with us -- because the Center for American Liberty can't take on the radical left without you.
---
[ **ROLL CALL - Yes, I'm with you!**](http://e.americanbriefing.com/rd/9z2z6iut8rqso6r991n2sn26l3214chc2h6svt37peo_rp22sh2s8i6epj5cjie4o32cth2bs)
---
I'm the Executive Director and General Counsel for the Center for American Liberty -- a conservative non-profit law firm that protects your freedom to say what you want, to live according to your conscience, and to pass on your conservative values to the next generation.We will continue to lead the charge against the left’s "lawfare" -- as it increases its efforts to leverage the legal system to force D.E.I. and "woke" nonsense upon us.But with more than 35 active cases -- including some of the most consequential of our time -- your support is more important than ever before as we close in on the end of 2024.Make no mistake, the left is plotting how to use the courts to ram its radical agenda down our throats. **But the Center for American Liberty can stop them --[which is why I need to know in the next 24 hours if you’re with us.](http://e.americanbriefing.com/rd/9z2zo3qib59oj6h733ime8qokkgdmvir7ptskjsafl8_rp22sh2s8i6epj5cjie4o32cth2bs)**Friend, every freedom you cherish is on the line...
---
* Your right to free speech
* Your right to gather and peacefully protest
* Your right to post on social media without government censorship
* Your right to raise your children in accordance with your values
* For women, your right to privacy and safety in share spaces like locker rooms and restrooms
* For children, the right to grow up without being drugged and surgically mutilated by gender clinics

---
The left wants to erase these rights. They want to shred the Constitution. And worst of all, they want to remove God from every corner of American society. And the moment President Trump puts his hand on the Bible on January 20th, the stakes go up.If you think the left is actively working to silence you, brainwash your children, and force men into women’s private spaces right now... just wait.This is why the Center for American Liberty must be prepared not only to fight back as legal battles arise... ...but to go on the offensive to defend freedom, protect families, and challenge government overreach whenever it arises.But to be effective, I'm counting on your support.
---
[ **ROLL CALL - Yes, I'm with you!**](http://e.americanbriefing.com/rd/9z2zkvnj1v7vfa48op7mdook3tm21599eqiflubi818_rp22sh2s8i6epj5cjie4o32cth2bs)
---
Friend, this is a pivotal moment for America. I pray you'll to stand with us and fight, fight, fight to expand our vital, freedom-saving work.
---
| | Sincerely,Mark Trammell Executive Director & General Counsel

name: Hillsdale College via Your America News
subject: Your Supreme Court survey
body:
You have been selected by Hillsdale College to represent your state in a National Referendum on Religious Liberty.

This sponsored message from Your America News is on behalf of Hillsdale College [](https://e.youramerica.news/rd/9z2zkrjuq7p4v8q3j2trre8pndre68n53jj1ki78er8_rp22sh2s8i6epj5cjie4o32c9h2bs) Dear Friend, You have been selected by Hillsdale College to represent your state in a **National Referendum on Religious Liberty.** [](https://e.youramerica.news/rd/9z2z9p5afg33jvpt6cstuhv1lrjsu7nuc4prlqn72uo_rp22sh2s8i6epj5cjie4o32c9h2bs) The referendum will only take a few moments of your time. Before you complete it, I want to remind you of some things we've seen (and lived through) in recent years--which we never thought we'd see in our country...
* Government mandates forcing Christian churches to close while casinos, strip clubs, and drug dispensaries remained open.

* Far-Left activists targeting Christian business owners, Christian teachers, and Christian coaches through litigation.

* The weaponizing of the Department of Justice and the FBI against Christian pro-life advocates who are defined as believing in “extremist ideologies” and having the potential for “domestic terrorism.”

* Christians in the workplace being forced to hide their faith while critical race theory and transgenderism are promoted.

**That 's why I'm asking you to take the Hillsdale College National Referendum on Religious Liberty.** By completing this survey, you will help us more clearly understand the views of the American people on this critical issue. Your responses will help Hillsdale strengthen its nationwide educational outreach efforts on behalf of liberty--including religious liberty. Friend, you can complete the **National Referendum on Religious Liberty** by using the secure link below: [**https://info.hillsdale.edu/religious-liberty-survey**](https://e.youramerica.news/rd/9z2zo9374rtcm3mfj7qar5jcqj4au3sbi7143dkiki0_rp22sh2s8i6epj5cjie4o32c9h2bs) Like the founders of our nation, the founders of Hillsdale College understood the essential connection between faith and freedom. **The College was founded in 1844 to offer "sound learning" in order to preserve "the inestimable blessings...of civil and religious liberty."** Yet today's ruling class mocks people of faith as "backward," "bigots," and even "Christo-fascists." Politicians like Barack Obama claim that people like you "get bitter" and "cling to guns or religion." These so-called elites are full of contempt for you and for Christianity and will not protect your civil and religious liberties. You and I know that religious liberty in America is under serious threat. But we can reverse course. **The first step is ...EDUCATION.** Today's government policies that threaten religious liberty were conceived and implemented by people deceived by far-Left propaganda in our K-12 schools, colleges, and universities. That's why a vital part of this fight--in which Hillsdale College is a leader--is **reaching** and **teaching** millions of citizens the TRUTH about America's great heritage of religious liberty. We are heavily invested in our educational outreach efforts through our **Project to Save Religious Liberty in America.** These efforts include:
* **Teaching nearly 1,600 undergraduate and graduate students** --on our campuses in Hillsdale, Michigan, and Washington, D.C.--who bring their traditional faith with them as they join the fight to restore liberty and constitutional government in our country.

* **Distributing _Imprimis_** , America's leading digest of liberty, which is mailed to more than 6.6 million homes and businesses ten times per year. Previous issues include "Inside the Transgender Empire" by Christopher F. Rufo, "The Most Important Decision in Life" by Bishop Robert Barron, and "The Politicization of the Department of Justice" by Harmeet K. Dhillon.

* **Producing and promoting free online courses** for any citizen who wishes to learn on topics such as Christianity, the Constitution, American history, and free market economics. Several courses (including "The Genesis Story: Reading Biblical Narratives," "Ancient Christianity," and "C.S. Lewis on Christianity") consider the important connection between faith and liberty.

* **Providing a classical K-12 curriculum** with a solid grounding in American history, constitutional government, and economics to schools that educate thousands of students nationwide.

After everything we've seen in recent years, the need for Hillsdale's educational outreach efforts is undeniable. So please share your views by completing the **National Referendum on Religious Liberty** and returning it to me as soon as possible. It will only take a few moments of your time. Your completed survey will help us to develop the most effective strategy to **reach** and **teach** millions of Americans on behalf of liberty. As you might know, Hillsdale College refuses to accept ONE PENNY of government funding--not even indirectly in the form of federal or state student grants or loans. **This independence frees the College from burdensome and corrupting government regulations. Thanks to our generous donors, we remain true to our original mission, even as many other colleges and universities reject religious liberty and embrace radical and dangerous ideologies.** I hope you will partner with Hillsdale College by making a generous tax-deductible gift today. You can easily do so after completing the **National Referendum on Religious Liberty** , which you can access at this secure link: [**https://info.hillsdale.edu/religious-liberty-survey**](https://e.youramerica.news/rd/9z2z8uhpnm3s5ro4urdedqbd37heirte7rigtmhrf8o_rp22sh2s8i6epj5cjie4o32c9h2bs) Thank you for your support of Hillsdale's educational outreach efforts on behalf of religious liberty. Warm regards, Larry P. Arnn President, Hillsdale College Pursuing Truth and Defending Liberty Since 1844 |

| Your America
---
_PO Box 461 Fort Collins, CO 80522_
_[**unsubscribe**](http://e.youramerica.news/rd/9z2z15ppq3i90lnupcmlu40qq83uhf7u9c93qirm1og_rp22sh2s8i6epj5cjie4o32c9h238h5e8he485he5o75pt7kuo72ttle5pq9ttle9q3bd9ieir38ct3mkrnctt5eer7ashmeop79chl6ujuadf161rn9cdhmir76pr02sqr8d5hmej3fddj4iqu8pj0s5h6ep724no)_ | _[manage data preferences](https://e.youramerica.news/rd/9z2zdc5mi21b98nrs841u1mrp10hvotionf90i5bph0_rp22sh2s8i6epj5cjie4o32c9h2bs)_

[](http://e.youramerica.news/rd/9z2zuu9thqbjd8i2nt8pvn19q355gorq7hqngejp3ro_rp2ash2s8j2ccdkmorb4dthe8gq48bi4bh28pr6clie9oj0c9h649fg)

name: The Liberty Ledger
subject: SF county supervisor calls for 'mass arrests, detox, and treatment' of homeless drug users
body:
(The Center Square) - San Francisco County Supervisor Matt Dorsey, a Democrat and former addict, is calling for “mass arrests, detox, and treatment” of open-air, often homeless drug users in his district. Dorsey says letting people languish on the streets amounts to “drug enableism and neglectful cruelty,” and that the arrests and involuntary holds should be “approached as life-saving interventions.” | [](http://trk.libertyledger._fBiGb8NEquFREE6RYQ)
---
[](http://trk.libertyledger.)
---

name: Center for American Liberty
subject: Every freedom you cherish is on the line
body:
Gavin Newsom and radical leftist governors are not hiding their plans to wage lawfare against conservatives at a level we’ve never before seen before.

| |
---
| | Gavin Newsom and radical leftist governors are not hiding their plans to wage lawfare against conservatives at a level we’ve never before seen before.
---
| |
---
| |
---
[](https://e.realamericanreporting.com/rd/9z2zp5vo9v9ilic4ed8qk38cfkronbt5laehvfqqoo8_rp22sh2s8i6epj5cjieco72clh2bs)
---
Dear Friend, Gavin Newsom and radical leftist governors are not hiding their plans to wage lawfare against conservatives at a level we’ve never before seen before.They're proudly announcing their plans to "Trump proof" their states.The time for resting or taking a post-election victory lap is over.Now is the time to fight, fight, fight. **But I need to know in the next 24 hours if you're with us...** ...because we've never had an opportunity like this one to protect the First Amendment, defend parental rights, and put a stop to the gender-industrial complex's mutilation of vulnerable children.I pray you're with us -- because the Center for American Liberty can't take on the radical left without you.
---
[ **ROLL CALL - Yes, I'm with you!**](https://e.realamericanreporting.com/rd/9z2z8q683eqavqathffbj9ui1qdna98c28cjmslkg2g_rp22sh2s8i6epj5cjieco72clh2bs)
---
I'm the Executive Director and General Counsel for the Center for American Liberty -- a conservative non-profit law firm that protects your freedom to say what you want, to live according to your conscience, and to pass on your conservative values to the next generation.We will continue to lead the charge against the left’s "lawfare" -- as it increases its efforts to leverage the legal system to force D.E.I. and "woke" nonsense upon us.But with more than 35 active cases -- including some of the most consequential of our time -- your support is more important than ever before as we close in on the end of 2024.Make no mistake, the left is plotting how to use the courts to ram its radical agenda down our throats. **But the Center for American Liberty can stop them --[which is why I need to know in the next 24 hours if you’re with us.](https://e.realamericanreporting.com/rd/9z2z85dbpfe5k9fn473qnma5g03e5tp2kaqgejbvin0_rp22sh2s8i6epj5cjieco72clh2bs)**Friend, every freedom you cherish is on the line...
---
* Your right to free speech
* Your right to gather and peacefully protest
* Your right to post on social media without government censorship
* Your right to raise your children in accordance with your values
* For women, your right to privacy and safety in share spaces like locker rooms and restrooms
* For children, the right to grow up without being drugged and surgically mutilated by gender clinics

---
The left wants to erase these rights. They want to shred the Constitution. And worst of all, they want to remove God from every corner of American society. And the moment President Trump puts his hand on the Bible on January 20th, the stakes go up.If you think the left is actively working to silence you, brainwash your children, and force men into women’s private spaces right now... just wait.This is why the Center for American Liberty must be prepared not only to fight back as legal battles arise... ...but to go on the offensive to defend freedom, protect families, and challenge government overreach whenever it arises.But to be effective, I'm counting on your support.
---
[ **ROLL CALL - Yes, I'm with you!**](https://e.realamericanreporting.com/rd/9z2zpisdl6o7cb9spp8q39kacf1fcr4mu2udmn6ogfg_rp22sh2s8i6epj5cjieco72clh2bs)
---
Friend, this is a pivotal moment for America. I pray you'll to stand with us and fight, fight, fight to expand our vital, freedom-saving work.
---
| | Sincerely,Mark Trammell Executive Director & General Counsel

But I need to know in the next 24 hours if you're with us... ...because we've never had an opportunity like this one to protect the First Amendment, defend parental rights, and put a stop to the gender-industrial complex's mutilation of vulnerable children.I pray you're with us -- because the Center for American Liberty can't take on the radical left without you. I'm the Executive Director and General Counsel for the Center for American Liberty -- a conservative non-profit law firm that protects your freedom to say what you want, to live according to your conscience, and to pass on your conservative values to the next generation.We will continue to lead the charge against the left’s "lawfare" -- as it increases its efforts to leverage the legal system to force D.E.I. and "woke" nonsense upon us.But with more than 35 active cases -- including some of the most consequential of our time -- your support is more important than ever before as we close in on the end of 2024.Make no mistake, the left is plotting how to use the courts to ram its radical agenda down our throats. But the Center for American Liberty can stop them --, every freedom you cherish is on the line... Your right to free speech Your right to gather and peacefully protest Your right to post on social media without government censorship Your right to raise your children in accordance with your values For women, your right to privacy and safety in share spaces like locker rooms and restrooms For children, the right to grow up without being drugged and surgically mutilated by gender clinics The left wants to erase these rights. They want to shred the Constitution. And worst of all, they want to remove God from every corner of American society. And the moment President Trump puts his hand on the Bible on January 20th, the stakes go up.If you think the left is actively working to silence you, brainwash your children, and force men into women’s private spaces right now... just wait.This is why the Center for American Liberty must be prepared not only to fight back as legal battles arise... ...but to go on the offensive to defend freedom, protect families, and challenge government overreach whenever it arises.But to be effective, I'm counting on your support. Friend, this is a pivotal moment for America. name: Elizabeth Nader
subject: Goodbye teacher standards
body:
Peter, It’s 2025 and BOY do we have a heck of a nonsense call-out for you! In case you missed it back when it was originally
|
---
| Peter, It’s 2025 and BOY do we have a heck of a nonsense call-out for you! In case you missed it back when it was originally signed by Governor Murphy (because let’s face it, with so much crap coming out of Trenton, who can remember it all!), [**A1669**](https://xtz223.keap-link006.com/v2/click/0ba9e6eeec2113630edb4397bc3b9309/eJyNkE2LwjAQhv_LnEvTJrVgb1XELVUP0j1LtINGszEkU1lX-t83fuBJwdsw88wzvHMBQiMNVS0U8Et_nAuIwOFGWYWGxkdDcnOb8kGWijQCrcxh6o6dheLycvkJXNtC5HkEdLYYkGZZjutqMV3NqkUdSCtduPGhR2RPz2ReVjPo-7di_FE0OQW3h4Jch9dErQqp6NvpwO-IrC8Ys906NnuN29iTJAx13Hk2Ulp7xhOesZInScLSPB-umjT-auZBLq1F0z4-U-P5fqL_B973aVY=) eliminating the core subject proficiency requirements to be certified as a teacher in New Jersey went into effect on January 1st. We’re not making it up. Here’s what the bill says. _Notwithstanding any law, rule, or regulation to the contrary,**the State Board of Education shall not require a candidate seeking a certificate of eligibility,** a certificate of eligibility with advanced standing, a provisional certificate, or a standard instructional certificate **to complete a Commissioner of Education-approved test of basic reading, writing, and mathematics skills** including, but not limited to, the Praxis Core Academic Skills for Educators test, in order to obtain a certificate of eligibility, a certificate of eligibility with advanced standing, a provisional certificate, or a standard instructional certificate._ Let’s put it in simple terms. Proving proficiency in basic math, reading and writing will no longer be required to earn your teaching certification in New Jersey. GONE. Poof.
---
| | [JOIN Common Sense Club](https://xtz223.keap-link006.com/v2/click/0932560ae27fc85c0536fc71bdf8b91b/eJyNkE0LgkAQhv_LnCXRrQ57E5EQy0PUOTYdasn9YB0jE_97a0WngmBOM888wzsDEGqhKa-Bw43uccwgAIeVtBI1pUaTqJ7TeDGPWBRAI_Vl5UxngQ9flz_A1GZsGQdAvUWP7LZJWuTl6rDOy8KTVjh_408Pm3882SbJ1zCOP8WoJGVX726Bk-twSlRLn4r2rvH8mci2PAwro5TRLfqqmu44M-4UKlRHdO1Z2tCbhLWo6_cbCuxfvvEBrSRmYQ==)
---
| | [I’m already a member, but I’ll chip in for 2025!](https://xtz223.keap-link006.com/v2/click/c26581cce7ea2f3ffab03100488b9601/eJyNkMsKwjAQRf9l1qWtTX3QnYhIaevCB6gbCemowTYN6Sg-6L8bH3Sl4Hbm3DPcuQOh4oriHCK40C0IGDhgUEgtUdGoUsTFaxt0ww7rOFBIdZyY6qQhun8Nt8BzzFjPd4CuGi2ymA1HSTydbNN4mlhSc2Nv_OlhYesZZ8M4hab5KcZS0vhs3TVEZE74bJRL24qWprD8gUjXkeflleKEbk1GanRFVXq7DeJqIOZrEfbDfeb7R6vjWqPKP79I8PqWNg9zC2aY)
---
| The justification? Removing barriers, equality... all the Leftist mumbo-jumbo that is used to justify bad ideas and ultimately insults and harms the people they purport to help. Who will suffer from this patently BAD idea? The students of New Jersey. And I can only imagine that high-quality teachers who have proved their proficiency will resent this removal of standards for their profession. We’re expected to pay some of the highest taxes in the country for an education system that is producing sub-par results and now removing standards for its teachers. That’s lunacy. Ultimately, these are the kinds of bad ideas that become law when common sense leaves the building and Leftist Lunatics run the place. Unfortunately for them and fortunately for us, we put them on notice in 2024 and they are on borrowed time in 2025. I expect to see less crap coming out of Trenton this year when they realize they’ll have to justify it to their common sense voting base in November. [JOIN](https://xtz223.keap-link006.com/v2/click/26c20fa5c406fbaa6abfa5d6fc8e38d6/eJyNkE0LwjAMhv9LzsOyVUV2kyEyph5Ez1K74IrrB10mTtl_t36wk4KQU_LkCW_uQGiEobyEFK50SxIOEXiUyik0lFlDQr6myWQc8ziCWpnz0tvWQXr_ujwAzzbn01kE1DkMyG47z4p8szys8k0RSCd8uPGnh48Hz2I9z1fQ9z_FqBUtLsHdQEq-xWeiUoVUtPd14Csi16SMSau1NQ2GknV7HFl_Yhr1EX1TKceCSTiHpvy8ocDu7esfshxmZw==) Common Sense Club (or [chip in](https://xtz223.keap-link006.com/v2/click/2629bc827c3e1fccc1992994f57a7d87/eJyNkMsKwjAQRf9l1sU-UlG6EymltHXhA9SNhHTUUE1DOopa-u_GB64U3M6ce4Y7LRAqrigtIYIL3YKAgQMGhdQSFY1rRVw8t0E_9JnvwEGqKjH1SUPUfg1_gMeYsYHnAF01WmQ-HY2zdJJs8nSSWVJzY2_86WHhxxMXozSHrvspxqOk-GzdDURkTvhoVErbihbmYPk9kW4i1y1rxQl7DRmpsSfqo7tdIy6HYrYS4SDcFZ5XWR3XGlX5_kWG15e0uwNz5WaZ) financially) to help us hold them accountable. For New Jersey, Elizabeth Nader

name: Firecracker Mini OTF
subject: Switchblade that attaches to your car keys (opening mail/packages easier too)
body:
Due to the growing response for this line of switchblades, they restocked and making them available.
| | | [](https://links.gunowner-news.com/a/1537/click/19601/6374453/32359c2180f32a5bdb4f0172a4c626785c3e4046/f90e58044683d182a2dc4f654f0b0c99201e73df)
---
| | |
---
_January 4th, 2025_
---
| | |
---
This is one of my favorite knives to date.

I own a ton of expensive hunting knives and OTF blades, but truly nothing has been more convenient that this [car keys switchblade.](https://links.gunowner-news.com/a/1537/click/19601/6374453/32359c2180f32a5bdb4f0172a4c626785c3e4046/f90e58044683d182a2dc4f654f0b0c99201e73df)

It's always with me on the go, where my car keys are is where my concealed switch is too, this compact American designed knife, is called _**"The Firecracker" - and was initially launched for a 4th of July promotion.**_

Due to the growing response for this line of switchblades, they restocked and making them available again year-round.

These are going viral because there's nothing that [fits so flush on a keychain while having the OTF ejectable switch feature in a knife](https://links.gunowner-news.com/a/1537/click/19601/6374453/32359c2180f32a5bdb4f0172a4c626785c3e4046/f90e58044683d182a2dc4f654f0b0c99201e73df) on the go.

This is mobile convenience of switchblade knife perfect for easy daily tasks like opening mail/packages.

I find my car keys are always on me more often than an edc knife, so combining all in one place just makes my life easier being able to carry this tool so easily.

Doesn't get in your way only brings value and handiness to your life.

Get the Compact switchblade safely sits your pocket along with your car or truck keys.

**[Claim Your Car Keys Firecracker Switchblades Here>>>](https://links.gunowner-news.com/a/1537/click/19601/6374453/32359c2180f32a5bdb4f0172a4c626785c3e4046/f90e58044683d182a2dc4f654f0b0c99201e73df)**
