name: Hillsdale College via Freedom Nation Today
subject: How do you see the Supreme Court?
body:
You have been selected by Hillsdale College to represent your state in a National Referendum on Religious Liberty.

This sponsored message from Freedom Nation Today is on behalf of Hillsdale College [](https://links.freedomnationtoday.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=661be3b9a5044905a561d763beede75a&_e=9BlyO6ozhSA-0VlcO3nYNhxFgxVq1uZmeQR2044cAMN7UCaCj7vKY0b-HzMHmRjPGNtoPqo3CGmsFc0UDrD8Kgp15ZsmpzADTgo6mha4pC1mtxPRy-rJDXJI5lJVrTA2jBZfFu7ZPKSvdGdqfasYGUc_-2PzTmGDFzhjQXDla0H-foo_EQPowmm5Z0pS47qpUze-nnNnCYyQaDFvNwf_EqPcNiKLDGEOtaYfrHJBmcUCqiSU7cjUpNUTmId9mySQpdSE2rexKHOpJlwOJtXbYK8f846bgHUEwfGbzWVVKzG5Pql6vr3s3YjaDKzzubp9TcMR4zC0ZXH_MKocoW56PgV3qNZBtw-UF948sdw-9bfQ1tolZc_9BEbtgqF7cR1xO3OWpoHl-u-2kBOynaEJQ1x5_oMtSzkuaYAxGkBtui0%3D) Dear Friend, You have been selected by Hillsdale College to represent your state in a **National Referendum on Religious Liberty.** [](https://links.freedomnationtoday.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=661be3b9a5044905a561d763beede75a&_e=9BlyO6ozhSA-0VlcO3nYNhxFgxVq1uZmeQR2044cAMN7UCaCj7vKY0b-HzMHmRjPGNtoPqo3CGmsFc0UDrD8Kgp15ZsmpzADTgo6mha4pC1mtxPRy-rJDXJI5lJVrTA2jBZfFu7ZPKSvdGdqfasYGUc_-2PzTmGDFzhjQXDla0H-foo_EQPowmm5Z0pS47qpUze-nnNnCYyQaDFvNwf_EqPcNiKLDGEOtaYfrHJBmcUCqiSU7cjUpNUTmId9mySQLCS985GP9f5Qrn-39b3i-BI_TRheIDyw8hD9Kz84rb51lgb75V_XBKLtCmGxpK8lygeAL1TIXoNK_7xrk2etHmd8yBJpNYmv_1j3hE9XCg4ZDB8Q_XL9ZjYvi5zFgAAQ5-V8wfCVbA-dglZ8WeOq4XW0nAscA7cxfAcBC7TpEeI%3D) The referendum will only take a few moments of your time. Before you complete it, I want to remind you of some things we've seen (and lived through) in recent years--which we never thought we'd see in our country...
* Government mandates forcing Christian churches to close while casinos, strip clubs, and drug dispensaries remained open.

* Far-Left activists targeting Christian business owners, Christian teachers, and Christian coaches through litigation.

* The weaponizing of the Department of Justice and the FBI against Christian pro-life advocates who are defined as believing in “extremist ideologies” and having the potential for “domestic terrorism.”

* Christians in the workplace being forced to hide their faith while critical race theory and transgenderism are promoted.

**That 's why I'm asking you to take the Hillsdale College National Referendum on Religious Liberty.** By completing this survey, you will help us more clearly understand the views of the American people on this critical issue. Your responses will help Hillsdale strengthen its nationwide educational outreach efforts on behalf of liberty--including religious liberty. Friend, you can complete the **National Referendum on Religious Liberty** by using the secure link below: [**https://info.hillsdale.edu/religious-liberty-survey**](https://links.freedomnationtoday.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=661be3b9a5044905a561d763beede75a&_e=9BlyO6ozhSA-0VlcO3nYNhxFgxVq1uZmeQR2044cAMN7UCaCj7vKY0b-HzMHmRjPGNtoPqo3CGmsFc0UDrD8Kgp15ZsmpzADTgo6mha4pC1mtxPRy-rJDXJI5lJVrTA2jBZfFu7ZPKSvdGdqfasYGUc_-2PzTmGDFzhjQXDla0H-foo_EQPowmm5Z0pS47qpUze-nnNnCYyQaDFvNwf_EqPcNiKLDGEOtaYfrHJBmcUCqiSU7cjUpNUTmId9mySQjDL_fhTdqApU5K2nvD_PueEIRxH___iMfYARzd0SQWcc7UzK4zYQAqvthmXWi50tSSAwDV3oz4ClvEEobCiIJnDvvyhvbmib7YP-JNFk0tMx5J9RiU2_lCTTJyRjPEQ19C94ySilwRzRC5aNLhinqAuFCIRBZmu5DZIkwrfA5DA%3D) Like the founders of our nation, the founders of Hillsdale College understood the essential connection between faith and freedom. **The College was founded in 1844 to offer "sound learning" in order to preserve "the inestimable blessings...of civil and religious liberty."** Yet today's ruling class mocks people of faith as "backward," "bigots," and even "Christo-fascists." Politicians like Barack Obama claim that people like you "get bitter" and "cling to guns or religion." These so-called elites are full of contempt for you and for Christianity and will not protect your civil and religious liberties. You and I know that religious liberty in America is under serious threat. But we can reverse course. **The first step is ...EDUCATION.** Today's government policies that threaten religious liberty were conceived and implemented by people deceived by far-Left propaganda in our K-12 schools, colleges, and universities. That's why a vital part of this fight--in which Hillsdale College is a leader--is **reaching** and **teaching** millions of citizens the TRUTH about America's great heritage of religious liberty. We are heavily invested in our educational outreach efforts through our **Project to Save Religious Liberty in America.** These efforts include:
* **Teaching nearly 1,600 undergraduate and graduate students** --on our campuses in Hillsdale, Michigan, and Washington, D.C.--who bring their traditional faith with them as they join the fight to restore liberty and constitutional government in our country.

* **Distributing _Imprimis_** , America's leading digest of liberty, which is mailed to more than 6.6 million homes and businesses ten times per year. Previous issues include "Inside the Transgender Empire" by Christopher F. Rufo, "The Most Important Decision in Life" by Bishop Robert Barron, and "The Politicization of the Department of Justice" by Harmeet K. Dhillon.

* **Producing and promoting free online courses** for any citizen who wishes to learn on topics such as Christianity, the Constitution, American history, and free market economics. Several courses (including "The Genesis Story: Reading Biblical Narratives," "Ancient Christianity," and "C.S. Lewis on Christianity") consider the important connection between faith and liberty.

* **Providing a classical K-12 curriculum** with a solid grounding in American history, constitutional government, and economics to schools that educate thousands of students nationwide.

After everything we've seen in recent years, the need for Hillsdale's educational outreach efforts is undeniable. So please share your views by completing the **National Referendum on Religious Liberty** and returning it to me as soon as possible. It will only take a few moments of your time. Your completed survey will help us to develop the most effective strategy to **reach** and **teach** millions of Americans on behalf of liberty. As you might know, Hillsdale College refuses to accept ONE PENNY of government funding--not even indirectly in the form of federal or state student grants or loans. **This independence frees the College from burdensome and corrupting government regulations. Thanks to our generous donors, we remain true to our original mission, even as many other colleges and universities reject religious liberty and embrace radical and dangerous ideologies.** I hope you will partner with Hillsdale College by making a generous tax-deductible gift today. You can easily do so after completing the **National Referendum on Religious Liberty** , which you can access at this secure link: [**https://info.hillsdale.edu/religious-liberty-survey**](https://links.freedomnationtoday.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=661be3b9a5044905a561d763beede75a&_e=9BlyO6ozhSA-0VlcO3nYNhxFgxVq1uZmeQR2044cAMN7UCaCj7vKY0b-HzMHmRjPGNtoPqo3CGmsFc0UDrD8Kgp15ZsmpzADTgo6mha4pC1mtxPRy-rJDXJI5lJVrTA2jBZfFu7ZPKSvdGdqfasYGUc_-2PzTmGDFzhjQXDla0H-foo_EQPowmm5Z0pS47qpUze-nnNnCYyQaDFvNwf_EqPcNiKLDGEOtaYfrHJBmcUCqiSU7cjUpNUTmId9mySQWzTTUQTdYiTFYdDGS7ORm2w6NRNSATCd-9jpN4pEviOKuWKR5ICIs7Cx5Np4S_M7o0uxLVWVES1anrdXzmqDpqwNoMn2NieXAt2Q0iAiu_oEZItfbru0vSioWB1K1LtufwbIB9PsxTjuEb9-6B3UpGG9tHEjtX8HACkt8IO-FlE%3D) Thank you for your support of Hillsdale's educational outreach efforts on behalf of religious liberty. Warm regards, Larry P. Arnn President, Hillsdale College Pursuing Truth and Defending Liberty Since 1844 |

| Freedom Nation Today

clean_body: You have been selected by Hillsdale College to represent your state in a National Referendum on Religious Liberty. This sponsored message from Freedom Nation Today is on behalf of Hillsdale College Dear Friend, You have been selected by Hillsdale College to represent your state in a National Referendum on Religious Liberty. The referendum will only take a few moments of your time. Before you complete it, I want to remind you of some things we've seen (and lived through) in recent years--which we never thought we'd see in our country... Government mandates forcing Christian churches to close while casinos, strip clubs, and drug dispensaries remained open. Far-Left activists targeting Christian business owners, Christian teachers, and Christian coaches through litigation. The weaponizing of the Department of Justice and the FBI against Christian pro-life advocates who are defined as believing in “extremist ideologies” and having the potential for “domestic terrorism.” Christians in the workplace being forced to hide their faith while critical race theory and transgenderism are promoted. That 's why I'm asking you to take the Hillsdale College National Referendum on Religious Liberty. By completing this survey, you will help us more clearly understand the views of the American people on this critical issue. Your responses will help Hillsdale strengthen its nationwide educational outreach efforts on behalf of liberty--including religious liberty. Friend, you can complete the National Referendum on Religious Liberty by using the secure link below: Like the founders of our nation, the founders of Hillsdale College understood the essential connection between faith and freedom. The College was founded in 1844 to offer "sound learning" in order to preserve "the inestimable blessings...of civil and religious liberty." Yet today's ruling class mocks people of faith as "backward," "bigots," and even "Christo-fascists." Politicians like Barack Obama claim that people like you "get bitter" and "cling to guns or religion." These so-called elites are full of contempt for you and for Christianity and will not protect your civil and religious liberties. You and I know that religious liberty in America is under serious threat. But we can reverse course. The first step is ...EDUCATION. Today's government policies that threaten religious liberty were conceived and implemented by people deceived by far-Left propaganda in our K-12 schools, colleges, and universities. That's why a vital part of this fight--in which Hillsdale College is a leader--is reaching and teaching millions of citizens the TRUTH about America's great heritage of religious liberty. We are heavily invested in our educational outreach efforts through our Project to Save Religious Liberty in America. These efforts include: Teaching nearly 1,600 undergraduate and graduate students --on our campuses in Hillsdale, Michigan, and Washington, D.C.--who bring their traditional faith with them as they join the fight to restore liberty and constitutional government in our country. Distributing Imprimis , America's leading digest of liberty, which is mailed to more than 6.6 million homes and businesses ten times per year. Previous issues include "Inside the Transgender Empire" by Christopher F. Rufo, "The Most Important Decision in Life" by Bishop Robert Barron, and "The Politicization of the Department of Justice" by Harmeet K. Dhillon. Producing and promoting free online courses for any citizen who wishes to learn on topics such as Christianity, the Constitution, American history, and free market economics. Several courses (including "The Genesis Story: Reading Biblical Narratives," "Ancient Christianity," and "C.S. Lewis on Christianity") consider the important connection between faith and liberty. Providing a classical K-12 curriculum with a solid grounding in American history, constitutional government, and economics to schools that educate thousands of students nationwide. After everything we've seen in recent years, the need for Hillsdale's educational outreach efforts is undeniable. So please share your views by completing the National Referendum on Religious Liberty and returning it to me as soon as possible. It will only take a few moments of your time. Your completed survey will help us to develop the most effective strategy to reach and teach millions of Americans on behalf of liberty. As you might know, Hillsdale College refuses to accept ONE PENNY of government funding--not even indirectly in the form of federal or state student grants or loans. This independence frees the College from burdensome and corrupting government regulations. Thanks to our generous donors, we remain true to our original mission, even as many other colleges and universities reject religious liberty and embrace radical and dangerous ideologies. I hope you will partner with Hillsdale College by making a generous tax-deductible gift today. You can easily do so after completing the National Referendum on Religious Liberty , which you can access at this secure link: Thank you for your support of Hillsdale's educational outreach efforts on behalf of religious liberty. Warm regards, Larry P. Arnn President, Hillsdale College Pursuing Truth and Defending Liberty Since 1844 | | Freedom Nation Today PO Box 2221 Fort Collins, CO 80522 | _

They want “SEVERE” sanctions against me.

Dear Friend,
---
I didn’t want to bother you over the Christmas holiday, but I now have something very important to share with you.
---
Reports indicate that my trial is set to begin on January 16 – just days before President Trump’s inauguration.
---
**_This trial will determine whether the Left can seize my home in Florida and truly leave me with NOTHING. This is my _final_ chance to save my home._**
---
Since there’s no way I can pay the outrageous $148 MILLION judgment against me, they want to rob me of everything I own.
---
They want irreplaceable mementos I gave to my only son. They want personal gifts that I was given by allies abroad to show solidarity with America after the tragedy of September 11th.
---
During these difficult times, Christmas reminded me of what’s _truly_ important in life. Earthly possessions come and go – homes, cars, money all come to an end. But the Bible reminds us that _eternal_ “heavenly treasures” await us.
---
The pursuit of truth, freedom, and justice are worth infinitely more than any earthly possession.
---
**I’d rather lose everything than betray what I know to be true. I could never lie and say what I'm going through is a fair and honest process just to hang on to my possessions.**
---
_"_For what shall it profit a man, if he shall gain the whole world, and lose his own soul?_ " (Mark 8:36)_
---
**As I prepare for my January trial, I’m asking patriots like you to make a contribution to my Legal Defense Trust so that I can keep fighting for my freedom and justice against a rigged and weaponized legal system.**

body:
You have been selected by Hillsdale College to represent your state in a National Referendum on Religious Liberty.

This sponsored message from Conservatives Give is on behalf of Hillsdale College [](https://links.conservativesgive.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=91065ded9fe54037a1b325642009a8e2&_e=WQGCqQjjh9_SrcubowyXM5zpMmHAYt8pXhQz3rR1NIgt5AwmWpuaCIdfsuuadcP11iYcxbdeTR_NieUjzAybq3KLBZZelBplDZThb384VF08cEdqvbsW_y3ie1gre6RNF-n0pRSnhyLwLVitvNi8FZf-8x4qXmT5kVYJmFlbSVezRskoUo6t5p6qZ1Yq8SEH6uocNS24bjBBSneKWaSroCdL58YpF8oO0Cm_aP_uxbQh11RME2t-7sJCWowy0LCxpM0meAdfZWARE6zRg3Mh5MmTInvJeMv7ZejVRl_he83YO9AkZ0yQXh3f1uzoDkOY5WyOfAOsDd9SBw2dEcIAk337dSIHZ3MmQ5i7jloY6O_6TVd4zBWloM8XPbchv2eROhJw8hEE5f8fO7cGy0AezaEo5V0vWQa2wVG3g_0C--s%3D) Dear Friend, You have been selected by Hillsdale College to represent your state in a **National Referendum on Religious Liberty.** [](https://links.conservativesgive.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=91065ded9fe54037a1b325642009a8e2&_e=WQGCqQjjh9_SrcubowyXM5zpMmHAYt8pXhQz3rR1NIgt5AwmWpuaCIdfsuuadcP11iYcxbdeTR_NieUjzAybq3KLBZZelBplDZThb384VF08cEdqvbsW_y3ie1gre6RNF-n0pRSnhyLwLVitvNi8FZf-8x4qXmT5kVYJmFlbSVezRskoUo6t5p6qZ1Yq8SEH6uocNS24bjBBSneKWaSroCdL58YpF8oO0Cm_aP_uxbQh11RME2t-7sJCWowy0LCxv0_lXov56sX4MTEfWp8Y3L5zZThTXvACtAWF041a0L4Xcxuge_xDRO5OHRksVH5dPCVQ9XMJP_8FyDDEvvgYGHvpa5XorQKW65xLYPUj9vsX6q5jJI75p_lxbdRrTD1RP8MHfLLF33gSP8jbRiQv4SbxeulaasS_HqXVVxq20cE%3D) The referendum will only take a few moments of your time. Before you complete it, I want to remind you of some things we've seen (and lived through) in recent years--which we never thought we'd see in our country...
* Government mandates forcing Christian churches to close while casinos, strip clubs, and drug dispensaries remained open.

* Far-Left activists targeting Christian business owners, Christian teachers, and Christian coaches through litigation.

* The weaponizing of the Department of Justice and the FBI against Christian pro-life advocates who are defined as believing in “extremist ideologies” and having the potential for “domestic terrorism.”

* Christians in the workplace being forced to hide their faith while critical race theory and transgenderism are promoted.

**That 's why I'm asking you to take the Hillsdale College National Referendum on Religious Liberty.** By completing this survey, you will help us more clearly understand the views of the American people on this critical issue. Your responses will help Hillsdale strengthen its nationwide educational outreach efforts on behalf of liberty--including religious liberty. Friend, you can complete the **National Referendum on Religious Liberty** by using the secure link below: [**https://info.hillsdale.edu/religious-liberty-survey**](https://links.conservativesgive.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=91065ded9fe54037a1b325642009a8e2&_e=WQGCqQjjh9_SrcubowyXM5zpMmHAYt8pXhQz3rR1NIgt5AwmWpuaCIdfsuuadcP11iYcxbdeTR_NieUjzAybq3KLBZZelBplDZThb384VF08cEdqvbsW_y3ie1gre6RNF-n0pRSnhyLwLVitvNi8FZf-8x4qXmT5kVYJmFlbSVezRskoUo6t5p6qZ1Yq8SEH6uocNS24bjBBSneKWaSroCdL58YpF8oO0Cm_aP_uxbQh11RME2t-7sJCWowy0LCxdcZs_5HEv_F3QRdUojwH5ZYaecQM8fTndG6KY-jcfn8iiKJN6ApjyK-5dcd9gIeVYZB_oc4KVzcnTQP0KhUbVpfr-nP-sDMp2xQaF9FUHwjC82_0gFGe4X6m9LprZ1Sh3bCTZ7QtF67J6fVKTlGTE6w3wn443znK2M5FhKtl3hQ%3D) Like the founders of our nation, the founders of Hillsdale College understood the essential connection between faith and freedom. **The College was founded in 1844 to offer "sound learning" in order to preserve "the inestimable blessings...of civil and religious liberty."** Yet today's ruling class mocks people of faith as "backward," "bigots," and even "Christo-fascists." Politicians like Barack Obama claim that people like you "get bitter" and "cling to guns or religion." These so-called elites are full of contempt for you and for Christianity and will not protect your civil and religious liberties. You and I know that religious liberty in America is under serious threat. But we can reverse course. **The first step is ...EDUCATION.** Today's government policies that threaten religious liberty were conceived and implemented by people deceived by far-Left propaganda in our K-12 schools, colleges, and universities. That's why a vital part of this fight--in which Hillsdale College is a leader--is **reaching** and **teaching** millions of citizens the TRUTH about America's great heritage of religious liberty. We are heavily invested in our educational outreach efforts through our **Project to Save Religious Liberty in America.** These efforts include:
* **Teaching nearly 1,600 undergraduate and graduate students** --on our campuses in Hillsdale, Michigan, and Washington, D.C.--who bring their traditional faith with them as they join the fight to restore liberty and constitutional government in our country.

* **Distributing _Imprimis_** , America's leading digest of liberty, which is mailed to more than 6.6 million homes and businesses ten times per year. Previous issues include "Inside the Transgender Empire" by Christopher F. Rufo, "The Most Important Decision in Life" by Bishop Robert Barron, and "The Politicization of the Department of Justice" by Harmeet K. Dhillon.

* **Producing and promoting free online courses** for any citizen who wishes to learn on topics such as Christianity, the Constitution, American history, and free market economics. Several courses (including "The Genesis Story: Reading Biblical Narratives," "Ancient Christianity," and "C.S. Lewis on Christianity") consider the important connection between faith and liberty.

* **Providing a classical K-12 curriculum** with a solid grounding in American history, constitutional government, and economics to schools that educate thousands of students nationwide.

After everything we've seen in recent years, the need for Hillsdale's educational outreach efforts is undeniable. So please share your views by completing the **National Referendum on Religious Liberty** and returning it to me as soon as possible. It will only take a few moments of your time. Your completed survey will help us to develop the most effective strategy to **reach** and **teach** millions of Americans on behalf of liberty. As you might know, Hillsdale College refuses to accept ONE PENNY of government funding--not even indirectly in the form of federal or state student grants or loans. **This independence frees the College from burdensome and corrupting government regulations. Thanks to our generous donors, we remain true to our original mission, even as many other colleges and universities reject religious liberty and embrace radical and dangerous ideologies.** I hope you will partner with Hillsdale College by making a generous tax-deductible gift today. You can easily do so after completing the **National Referendum on Religious Liberty** , which you can access at this secure link: [**https://info.hillsdale.edu/religious-liberty-survey**](https://links.conservativesgive.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=91065ded9fe54037a1b325642009a8e2&_e=WQGCqQjjh9_SrcubowyXM5zpMmHAYt8pXhQz3rR1NIgt5AwmWpuaCIdfsuuadcP11iYcxbdeTR_NieUjzAybq3KLBZZelBplDZThb384VF08cEdqvbsW_y3ie1gre6RNF-n0pRSnhyLwLVitvNi8FZf-8x4qXmT5kVYJmFlbSVezRskoUo6t5p6qZ1Yq8SEH6uocNS24bjBBSneKWaSroCdL58YpF8oO0Cm_aP_uxbQh11RME2t-7sJCWowy0LCxxEGaDtuYU8a7-mnznPnPemgS0jx8FbQIJ53kpFXvrecFeUybP7PDYVm5zstk4VVzZs4sRtU1M4bFxQLYHdvAl49rnSXb0r5vmgJFUvYNkM3BtuYo-G_96HcnMHbH6iMzh4IPxiiSqwlNc5U0e_QtEzucwVRtb6pSrjhWjjarC88%3D) Thank you for your support of Hillsdale's educational outreach efforts on behalf of religious liberty. Warm regards, Larry P. Arnn President, Hillsdale College Pursuing Truth and Defending Liberty Since 1844 |

| Conservatives Give
---
_PO Box 461 Fort Collins, CO 80522_

name: Michael Henry
subject: $112,000 daily fine against President Trump
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR AND AUTHORIZED BY FRIENDS OF MICHAEL HENRY
body:

name: No Dem Left Behind PAC
subject: MAGA: Selling Out the Middle Class.
body:
Trump and other MAGA zealots have used their platform to lie to the American people about fighting for the middle class.
| | | | | | [](https://click.nodemleftbehind.com/click/gpnv-2vyvhh-rgjg0y-kyd76rh5/)
---
# **MAGA: For billionaires, not the working class**
---
| | | | | [ ](https://click.nodemleftbehind.com/click/gpnv-2vyvhh-rgjg0z-kyd76rh6/)
---
| | | | folks, Donald Trump and Elon Musk love to tell you they’re champions of “freedom” and the “American Dream.” But who really benefits from their policies and rhetoric? Spoiler alert: it’s not you or your family—it’s billionaires like them and their corporate cronies. The truth is stark: under leaders like Trump, the middle class has been hollowed out, while the wealthiest Americans hoard more of the pie than ever before. The top tax brackets that once helped build the strongest middle class in history have been gutted. We’ve gone from Eisenhower’s 91% tax on the ultra-rich to Trump’s 37%—and guess who’s footing the bill for their greed? It’s time to call this what it is: class warfare. Trump, Musk, and their ilk are not fighting for freedom—they’re fighting to protect their bank accounts. And every time they rail against “socialism” or government intervention, they’re just trying to distract you from the truth: their unchecked greed is killing the American Dream. [**_We need leaders who fight for working families, not billionaires. That means embracing bold economic policies like a wealth tax, closing tax loopholes, and holding the ultra-rich accountable. Let’s fight back against the billionaire agenda and demand a government that works for us, not just for Trump and Musk’s elite circle._**](https://click.nodemleftbehind.com/click/gpnv-2vyvhh-rgjg10-kyd76rh3/)

name: Troy Downing
subject: I didn't run for office to be a rubber stamp for the status quo.
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Troy Downing for Congress
body:
I need your help to hit the ground running.

| | | [](https://trk.emails.troydowning.)
---
Peter, it's Congressman Troy Downing.

As a freshman Congressman, I'm facing a lot of pressure from The Establishment to conform to their way of doing things. _**But I didn't run for office to be a rubber stamp for the status quo**_.I ran to shake things up and fight for the conservative values and principles we hold dear, like bolstering national security, shutting down the border invasion, supporting our veterans, and ending government waste.

I'm eager to get to work for you and the rest of the America First Patriots around the country to execute this mandate, but I need your help to hit the ground running.

I've set an ambitious goal for my first month in office and need your support to reach it. **To be blunt, I need to raise $10,000 in the next 48 hours to tell The Establishment that we won't back down from this fight for America.**

[**Will you help me reach this critical goal by chipping in $25, $50, or more today? Every dollar counts, and with your support, we can show Washington that we are ready to take on the challenges ahead and defend the values that make this country great.**](https://trk.emails.troydowning._gJTwiHq3Cxwg)
---
**HELP TROY CRUSH HIS FIRST GOAL**
---
[ DONATE NOW](https://trk.emails.troydowning.-FQ1gBJ1Y8ErAA)
---
Together, we’ll take America back.Thank you for your unwavering support,Troy Downing
---
---

name: Hillsdale College via Full Mag News
subject: Your SCOTUS opinion needed
body:
You have been selected by Hillsdale College to represent your state in a National Referendum on Religious Liberty.

This sponsored message from Full Mag News is on behalf of Hillsdale College [](https://links.fullmagnews.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=7512953ba1314872b299de4919be2c5d&_e=EoNcStIVGME2TsPNWwY0kF0gRmTmDjggMxBCn2fZ6IRODthpd_g5_3knUKQobS2Y2E2u_qKZpC26vOI9DRYtje1KCH-3_fuugqfovZATNHJB-us8Wep6RoLFgirT9lBz9KsoturYG4DdPtSdNEiK-lYAiATU1GOkOaL6t0fJvdltoCjc2R6MwIVxIoqkieEGecbgIlAAigzw5Xkd41IcNMwGCxx69-7-vnq8b-D9y5uurME1ZpW9K4yzWHbNxYaGAYr8kJ0v9G3nN_jD4Ns528OzU88wU6UVIE99-j4ugYP-_81tK5cQekMN5cyHu-WtxXRx88kQXIuUvQH41vQpN45ls9RcU0XEeeqZn6ZBlikLFMZF7UnocgcQOd7YMc0eqZbrcuSzQhd2cX0tmEOrUou8JvPQXcfjNsljB5usoa4%3D) Dear Friend, You have been selected by Hillsdale College to represent your state in a **National Referendum on Religious Liberty.** [](https://links.fullmagnews.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=7512953ba1314872b299de4919be2c5d&_e=EoNcStIVGME2TsPNWwY0kF0gRmTmDjggMxBCn2fZ6IRODthpd_g5_3knUKQobS2Y2E2u_qKZpC26vOI9DRYtje1KCH-3_fuugqfovZATNHJB-us8Wep6RoLFgirT9lBz9KsoturYG4DdPtSdNEiK-lYAiATU1GOkOaL6t0fJvdltoCjc2R6MwIVxIoqkieEGecbgIlAAigzw5Xkd41IcNMwGCxx69-7-vnq8b-D9y5uurME1ZpW9K4yzWHbNxYaGooakjgxVZokT3J6xF0-oA4PyJfNeOa5sd0sjljgL16brjOi49WEZwgWA0UOR7ehweMv8gyKid2sBR6-y8BRQoErybwmV568KAQ3ToPnSohrOfNJKLcDbbcFfCaAF3_xffM69mNBbEd-fewQgjoDgkqytlHIowLk7j9fSY8JhFDs%3D) The referendum will only take a few moments of your time. Before you complete it, I want to remind you of some things we've seen (and lived through) in recent years--which we never thought we'd see in our country...
* Government mandates forcing Christian churches to close while casinos, strip clubs, and drug dispensaries remained open.

* Far-Left activists targeting Christian business owners, Christian teachers, and Christian coaches through litigation.

* The weaponizing of the Department of Justice and the FBI against Christian pro-life advocates who are defined as believing in “extremist ideologies” and having the potential for “domestic terrorism.”

* Christians in the workplace being forced to hide their faith while critical race theory and transgenderism are promoted.

**That 's why I'm asking you to take the Hillsdale College National Referendum on Religious Liberty.** By completing this survey, you will help us more clearly understand the views of the American people on this critical issue. Your responses will help Hillsdale strengthen its nationwide educational outreach efforts on behalf of liberty--including religious liberty. Friend, you can complete the **National Referendum on Religious Liberty** by using the secure link below: [**https://info.hillsdale.edu/religious-liberty-survey**](https://links.fullmagnews.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=7512953ba1314872b299de4919be2c5d&_e=EoNcStIVGME2TsPNWwY0kF0gRmTmDjggMxBCn2fZ6IRODthpd_g5_3knUKQobS2Y2E2u_qKZpC26vOI9DRYtje1KCH-3_fuugqfovZATNHJB-us8Wep6RoLFgirT9lBz9KsoturYG4DdPtSdNEiK-lYAiATU1GOkOaL6t0fJvdltoCjc2R6MwIVxIoqkieEGecbgIlAAigzw5Xkd41IcNMwGCxx69-7-vnq8b-D9y5uurME1ZpW9K4yzWHbNxYaGbCC2Nc0EFzGxnPY6_HK0MZFIzp8JEq6nfbicIafioO-hUIAD23AZHfxVZ0e6LcdmuA0MqToQ66M-vCoq1KDVyvk8JWnsU1ZIj5fAOnoojahbzzuKDiv8rGV0RSR06KFu1Oy3qQmnSgxBDJgSqvVHVrI61NgD1UVkFeFMSo1Gmnw%3D) Like the founders of our nation, the founders of Hillsdale College understood the essential connection between faith and freedom. **The College was founded in 1844 to offer "sound learning" in order to preserve "the inestimable blessings...of civil and religious liberty."** Yet today's ruling class mocks people of faith as "backward," "bigots," and even "Christo-fascists." Politicians like Barack Obama claim that people like you "get bitter" and "cling to guns or religion." These so-called elites are full of contempt for you and for Christianity and will not protect your civil and religious liberties. You and I know that religious liberty in America is under serious threat. But we can reverse course. **The first step is ...EDUCATION.** Today's government policies that threaten religious liberty were conceived and implemented by people deceived by far-Left propaganda in our K-12 schools, colleges, and universities. That's why a vital part of this fight--in which Hillsdale College is a leader--is **reaching** and **teaching** millions of citizens the TRUTH about America's great heritage of religious liberty. We are heavily invested in our educational outreach efforts through our **Project to Save Religious Liberty in America.** These efforts include:
* **Teaching nearly 1,600 undergraduate and graduate students** --on our campuses in Hillsdale, Michigan, and Washington, D.C.--who bring their traditional faith with them as they join the fight to restore liberty and constitutional government in our country.

* **Distributing _Imprimis_** , America's leading digest of liberty, which is mailed to more than 6.6 million homes and businesses ten times per year. Previous issues include "Inside the Transgender Empire" by Christopher F. Rufo, "The Most Important Decision in Life" by Bishop Robert Barron, and "The Politicization of the Department of Justice" by Harmeet K. Dhillon.

* **Producing and promoting free online courses** for any citizen who wishes to learn on topics such as Christianity, the Constitution, American history, and free market economics. Several courses (including "The Genesis Story: Reading Biblical Narratives," "Ancient Christianity," and "C.S. Lewis on Christianity") consider the important connection between faith and liberty.

* **Providing a classical K-12 curriculum** with a solid grounding in American history, constitutional government, and economics to schools that educate thousands of students nationwide.

After everything we've seen in recent years, the need for Hillsdale's educational outreach efforts is undeniable. So please share your views by completing the **National Referendum on Religious Liberty** and returning it to me as soon as possible. It will only take a few moments of your time. Your completed survey will help us to develop the most effective strategy to **reach** and **teach** millions of Americans on behalf of liberty. As you might know, Hillsdale College refuses to accept ONE PENNY of government funding--not even indirectly in the form of federal or state student grants or loans. **This independence frees the College from burdensome and corrupting government regulations. Thanks to our generous donors, we remain true to our original mission, even as many other colleges and universities reject religious liberty and embrace radical and dangerous ideologies.** I hope you will partner with Hillsdale College by making a generous tax-deductible gift today. You can easily do so after completing the **National Referendum on Religious Liberty** , which you can access at this secure link: [**https://info.hillsdale.edu/religious-liberty-survey**](https://links.fullmagnews.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=7512953ba1314872b299de4919be2c5d&_e=EoNcStIVGME2TsPNWwY0kF0gRmTmDjggMxBCn2fZ6IRODthpd_g5_3knUKQobS2Y2E2u_qKZpC26vOI9DRYtje1KCH-3_fuugqfovZATNHJB-us8Wep6RoLFgirT9lBz9KsoturYG4DdPtSdNEiK-lYAiATU1GOkOaL6t0fJvdltoCjc2R6MwIVxIoqkieEGecbgIlAAigzw5Xkd41IcNMwGCxx69-7-vnq8b-D9y5uurME1ZpW9K4yzWHbNxYaG-kD84E-_sGfW3b9mytoIWCwopqPNYafj6EAbjr7RfkteY0DJzmj-fSRbUKnE1LWmXdYZibV8Hae2yiTrWB7L1oICXKn5O_8x67gt90624Pl7KrFLdV9I18uPC7vV5qxhWHBlmn6Q_eFa038E9fFnCskM-pjFDJP4UrF_CjvbgoU%3D) Thank you for your support of Hillsdale's educational outreach efforts on behalf of religious liberty. Warm regards, Larry P. Arnn President, Hillsdale College Pursuing Truth and Defending Liberty Since 1844 |

| Full Mag News
---
_PO Box 1177 Fort Collins, CO 80522_
[](https://links.fullmagnews.com/e/encryptedUnsubscribe?_r=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_s=7512953ba1314872b299de4919be2c5d&_t=0S0G6m1dMOWQCgavSko1RhePWLyXZHAI3iunV5EONyzKJIRicWSXUFKoB3vzsoPQbzqx1zUl-4USNygN3aRkmXD86TUR5IG-Y5kagjJy_mz3CKwrqisJfhwugpT2ku4_V341CQBIFJnjtyJP3750pBqKftAvsQaG_yDyIFsW31Y%3D)

As you might know, Hillsdale College refuses to accept ONE PENNY of government funding--not even indirectly in the form of federal or state student grants or loans. This independence frees the College from burdensome and corrupting government regulations. Thanks to our generous donors, we remain true to our original mission, even as many other colleges and universities reject religious liberty and embrace radical and dangerous ideologies. I hope you will partner with Hillsdale College by making a generous tax-deductible gift today. You can easily do so after completing the National Referendum on Religious Liberty , which you can access at this secure link: Thank you for your support of Hillsdale's educational outreach efforts on behalf of religious liberty. Warm regards, Larry P. Arnn President, Hillsdale College Pursuing Truth and Defending Liberty Since 1844 | | Full Mag News PO Box 1177 Fort Collins, CO 80522 |

I'm the Executive Director and General Counsel for the Center for American Liberty -- a conservative non-profit law firm that protects your freedom to say what you want, to live according to your conscience, and to pass on your conservative values to the next generation.We will continue to lead the charge against the left’s "lawfare" -- as it increases its efforts to leverage the legal system to force D.E.I. and "woke" nonsense upon us.But with more than 35 active cases -- including some of the most consequential of our time -- your support is more important than ever before as we close in on the end of 2024.Make no mistake, the left is plotting how to use the courts to ram its radical agenda down our throats. **But the Center for American Liberty can stop them --[which is why I need to know in the next 24 hours if you’re with us.](https://links.freedomnationtoday.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=c13bb848c0054b7da9ed45d7e07c3746&_e=r8MZ4bkefwQkr90C36_EvoSY7_HAHL7xKTg59b6GMp_R5-L6nE1dANQAfmpNJMES9BbaS9DGHbWyhlMazUT0hG-20wa4KNNeEYsaPOewhn8hFtYxTgI_X04scMxgMy85Z8CHm8mdu29z3kunxOQ8GdwdxZdOzTLZasUeWk-l3zTZP2wQGj-xHUaqe9_FVhoApozckHpkeDzvAdKJXA3TfweRnlqcP1GS0ge_z6diMzGFkKnq3ZMDNOZVc0DBlsX1CVBUaPlJFa8CTWYXbBobYizUyezi8PwlXMJvSiYVst4g77i0AKTJ5dGivHeYUosleMaRGhsNStnaw-0LILa-K9LK8f9OfdOwQHhk1UcFBmkJEkjEONNxBrjoVbzRzNI6PQ8_zKV8rLif1Wp0r9ElDw%3D%3D)**Friend, every freedom you cherish is on the line...
---
* Your right to free speech
* Your right to gather and peacefully protest
* Your right to post on social media without government censorship
* Your right to raise your children in accordance with your values
* For women, your right to privacy and safety in share spaces like locker rooms and restrooms
* For children, the right to grow up without being drugged and surgically mutilated by gender clinics

---
The left wants to erase these rights. They want to shred the Constitution. And worst of all, they want to remove God from every corner of American society. And the moment President Trump puts his hand on the Bible on January 20th, the stakes go up.If you think the left is actively working to silence you, brainwash your children, and force men into women’s private spaces right now... just wait.This is why the Center for American Liberty must be prepared not only to fight back as legal battles arise... ...but to go on the offensive to defend freedom, protect families, and challenge government overreach whenever it arises.But to be effective, I'm counting on your support.
---

name: The Flyover
subject: Mike Johnson Re-elected, Alcohol Labels, and Surfing a Massive Wave
body:
Rep. Mike Johnson was [re-elected as Speaker](http://email.editor.jointheflyover.com/c/eJx0kL_unDAQhJ_GdHuyF_OvcJGG7tKmRASvz74zrIUNJ94-Iv2vmWZGnz7Nn-f0nEMM2-v3vJIpjieU2IBUIPVk5xCvSVfWOCKkuiKjuroZBol9W3kzWEfYda3udU99o6iztl4W6az9u2jVVcHcNKmkVqqWTf0YdI9N25Nsu4WGphNakg2F98ebw1Y8uXjxSftj4bWKxpeSsqh_CRwFjtuVOJe7EjjeYIGjVHfUAscjw0bfLHBcw4fgzX7LvEFONH9oB3ZQPIHnIxOcXAhiOAmOZOdCGb4hRnhxAs_R8lEyWHIXlP1Yk8Cx2o1N9ybk9pZ-rXOI_yXLT6edBv8FAAD__zbDbtg) of the House on Friday, securing the gavel on the first ballot after two GOP holdouts switched their votes before the second round of voting could begin.

## Rep. Mike Johnson Re-elected House Speaker
Rep. Mike Johnson was [re-elected as Speaker](http://email.editor.jointheflyover.com/c/eJx0kL_unDAQhJ_GdHuyF_OvcJGG7tKmRASvz74zrIUNJ94-Iv2vmWZGnz7Nn-f0nEMM2-v3vJIpjieU2IBUIPVk5xCvSVfWOCKkuiKjuroZBol9W3kzWEfYda3udU99o6iztl4W6az9u2jVVcHcNKmkVqqWTf0YdI9N25Nsu4WGphNakg2F98ebw1Y8uXjxSftj4bWKxpeSsqh_CRwFjtuVOJe7EjjeYIGjVHfUAscjw0bfLHBcw4fgzX7LvEFONH9oB3ZQPIHnIxOcXAhiOAmOZOdCGb4hRnhxAs_R8lEyWHIXlP1Yk8Cx2o1N9ybk9pZ-rXOI_yXLT6edBv8FAAD__zbDbtg) of the House on Friday, securing the gavel on the first ballot after two GOP holdouts switched their votes before the second round of voting could begin. Reps. Keith Self, Thomas Massie, and Ralph Norman initially voted against Johnson, with Self and Norman ultimately [switching their votes](http://email.editor.jointheflyover.com/c/eJx00DFvwyAUBOBfA5sjeAZsDwxdvKVrRwub5_ASDJahifLvK2fvdtJJn073c52ujiKl27fb0NY1TyBAN0I2Qk3eUXxPinu7IgK2HK3sWj0MAnrDg_VqNsIhzLCuEnQLDrTy89B3UrlFzZzsqQkplJSt0O1lUD1o06Mw3YKD7pgS6Knm43LPlGrANb7zE4_Lkjcebah1L6z9YjAyGGvAQDGeHYMx5A0Tvson_hZkMGphtNFDs9EDm3sOqeTULJHSErA0ZUf3wKME2hmM_LB-f1GMVMw547Y5-tC8_nfD08JfAAAA__-iCl6d). Massie, the lone holdout, voted for GOP Whip Rep. Tom Emmer. President-elect Trump called all three lawmakers in an attempt to convince them to change their votes, arguing that _“Mike’s the only one who can be elected.”_ Self and Norman also had [a private conversation](http://email.editor.jointheflyover.com/c/eJx0z7uO6yAUheGngY4INheHguI07nLaKS1iNjEJBsswjvL2I08_9ZLWp__rNt18yqk8_vsVXY91Ag6accG4moJP-TMpGlxEBJQUnRiktpbD1dDFhSGGu8eAeBegwIc4SIMGLEQ1Ww00ufONC66EkFzLi1VX0OaK3AwzWj0QxTGkXvfLs6bSF4z5Uw_cL3NdaXZL71sj8h-BkcDot4Lvdk4ExpwOJDCu6YXsWZfSamFtQ__Cnc21PHZsjX1vwXdsdHdhe6ecUzMn-Vh9yr9E_yv5cPATAAD__2B2Wb4) with Johnson prior to switching their votes. Due to the slim Republican majority in the House, Johnson [could only afford](http://email.editor.jointheflyover.com/c/eJx0kLuOwyAURL8Gd1hweQQXFNu4y7ZbWgRfxyQ8LExi5e9X3n6baUY6Mzo_1-nqQgz5_u0S2raUCRgoyjhlcppdiJ9JdrNdEAFFh5ZfhBoGBkZ3qzUMNHdGg0KvjIJFejnjTQ6z10Ib3wV70hhnknPBlOgHaUBpg0xfPA7qQiTDObRS-0cJua24xE95Y-19SV20a2vbTsQXgZHAeBxH7_PNnyWB8UQTGBk_QxAYW32lja7ltSPdN3RPrDSFJ9JHWfNeMq24vW4xeJf7taXYVTtvR4gx7Pp8ck8uxL_l9p-Jt4XfAAAA__8BVF6-) to lose one of the 219 GOP votes to remain as speaker. All 215 Democrats voted for House Minority Leader Hakeem Jeffries.
## Surgeon General Calls for Alcohol Labels
U.S. Surgeon General Vivek Murthy has [called for warning labels](http://email.editor.jointheflyover.com/c/eJx0z71uhDAQBOCnsbtDi_-wCxdp6C5tSmTs5diTwQisI5enj0ifbqSRvtF83Yd7oEzr4zMs6OtUBgFC36C9gRpSoPweFE9-QhQoOfq2k9o5ENbw2SepbRwxaAdJG2sVSDeNIZgRwU5gOPlLgxZU20rQsnHKCm0sgukiOt0xBZiolr15FlrrjFN-lxfuTSwLz36udTuY_GCiZ6I_z7MZx3h1TPQrngcTfdgrxYxXjE8H33Ld4GcrfPdpOylnOsy18lgC5T-1_vfy5cVvAAAA___9WlMG) on alcoholic beverages, similar to cigarette labels, citing new research linking alcohol to seven types of cancer. According to researchers, [alcohol consumption increases](http://email.editor.jointheflyover.com/c/eJx0kL1u7CAUhJ8GOqzD4cd2QXEbd3vblBYLxzYRa1aYrLNvHzl9mmlG-mb0fdzmm0857et__yDXljIjoBEgBeg5-pTfs-bRLURIipOTvTLjCDhYvjllg9F3iVH7frB3ADV4GO8QI0JAWHhyFw0kaCkVGNWNekBjBwLbBxpNzzRQTK3U7rOkvW205Hd5Ue1CefDsttaeB1P_GE4Mp_M8O_-dynG1DKeLzXACeYViOB1fdaWyi5V2qj4LH1_pKPUtfA5lK1kEvweqvLr4PFPO6bDXg_XhU_5dbH8ZeDn8CQAA___ya1uk) the risks for breast, colorectum, esophagus, liver, mouth, throat, and voice box cancers, and it contributes to an estimated 20,000 cancer deaths a year. Murthy has recommended [new labels be more visible](http://email.editor.jointheflyover.com/c/eJx0kLFuwyAURb8Gb1j4YUg8MHTxlq4dLQIP-7UYIiCx8veVu3e5y5WOjs7XbblZipTWT7ujaSEvIEBxMXAxLt5SfC9j501ABJQdmuEi1TQJuOpuM36UAS1of1c6SCElAKjJWu9lEIihI3PSxCDGYZBCyX4ar6D0FYW-OJzUhY0CPbVc-u9MqW0Y4ju_sPQu7100W2uPyuQHg5nBfBxH79LdnSeD-UQzmMVwjmQw2-jyliN3NjksvFD94fVZVsyJr5iw2Mip1idWnvDg1r-o5vLut7bHrhj_OChGqvq0WndL8c-i_VflZeA3AAD__0-DY-8), including a warning about the increased risk of cancer, suggested limits for alcohol consumption, and an expansion of alcohol education efforts. Current alcohol labels, [warning against drinking](http://email.editor.jointheflyover.com/c/eJx0kDGP4yAQRn8NdER4MBgXFNe4y7VXWhM8NpwmEGE2Uf79Kttv_Unfe3r_rusVM-dy_MU7hb7XFTRYpQelx3XDzO91lFvYiYCMpDBMxs6zBu9kCuRo35yLPlr0E-jZgfGePI5z3FwkmcPnTQ96HAajrbnMowfrPGk3RZrtJEZNW-61Xf7XXHqind_1Se0S611ySL0_TmH-CFgELD1RysyfTcDyqJzjW8CSCLmniI0ELFY7q41XEUukpl7YSi6HYrwRnwo51lRZ3WrvTKc6v9pBtaiDCjVkAYtsYXu8MnM-3cfuuGP-Icr-W51ngO8AAAD__wMWZ2s) while pregnant or before driving, haven't been updated since 1988.
## Update: Major Winter Storm Expected
Updated weather forecasts [now predict a winter storm](http://email.editor.jointheflyover.com/c/eJx0kDur4zAQhX-N3I3Rw_KjUJFlcZfdYhcCtzGKPbYV9DCSEpN_f1H6256Zc-D7btfpqo01fvujHaq8holTLoEyoM20aGPfU1MtakXkKCpUrBNyGCjv22pXTPP7ypjsWtouUspu6HvBkXdDNwjd3yujyhpltGFMUCnqoem5bHukbTfjIDvSUFxMDrF-BOPzjqt9hxfGeg6usmrP-UhEXAgfCR_P86xd8uVG-IgenqmkqPOOkfAxhyPlEA2WWMc5mxnuVqcMOYCe5-AO7d_g9CNEOI3PGKEUHCT0C2R0B0adnxETHPbpN-M3WEMELig4Y60J_rMMlws7_3_9vRExhtksRPz-VRTimf5hPKqoluMs_6kthJvTxn6I8k-GX4p_BwAA__-wmX9l) could bring over a foot of snow to parts of the Plains, Midwest, and Appalachians, while temperatures may plunge to 32°F or below in at least 40 states. This is [the first major storm](http://email.editor.jointheflyover.com/c/eJx0kDGTgyAQhX-NdDiwgEJBcY1drr3SIbJGMiiOknD--xuTuTLlfrPz3jfv59JfXIhhuX27GW0eUw8MFGWcMtl7F-LRS-LtiAgoCFreCmUMA92QyV5haEFow1CjlKi5l_yqxMC1B61aR4I90xhnknPBlKiN1KAajaxpBzSqrSRDH3La6nsKS55wjEd64lYPaSbRTjmveyW-Kugq6Eop9Zh-C7o8vV9O-L7ogmWvoHsp03_4WL3LSO9uebjtoIKeOmSzfi0hxrA3p8BtdiG-CvOnAZ4W_gIAAP__bQtcyQ) of the year, and it's expected to span over 1,500 miles across the central and eastern U.S. this weekend and into early next week. Heavy snowfall, sleet, and freezing rain are anticipated, leading to significant travel disruptions. Meteorologists have already issued winter storm warnings for about [45 million people](http://email.editor.jointheflyover.com/c/eJx0kLFuwyAURb_G3p4F2Bg8MHTxlq4dLQLPgQhDBCQo_frK7dz1XOnq6Hxdtov2wcfbpz5Q1T1tjDAOhAKZNqt9eG9Tb9WOyHDsUVEx8mUhTM69U6OxixBiklQaKXfKF8HNPiOjVzS7ZL1X5xuhZKJ0JHwclkkyPkskszC4cNFNBK2vKQ_35GN1uId3emEeTDr6oFytj9KNHx1bO7a21oZ4NRFbOfeToK4Oc8fWUlM-SsfWQ99ThuZjxQx_FJoOIT2gtgTV-WwLPAtcs483cKhfbygxNXD6W2ebngW8gWyipnKmkvZZ2UfzIfgyn763Q_vw61f_6_VS7CcAAP__OVlvCw) from Kansas to Maryland. Following the storm, Arctic air from Canada will bring significantly below-average temperatures to the northern Plains and Southeast.

name: Hillsdale College via Conservative Liberty Wire
subject: Your SCOTUS opinion needed
body:
You have been selected by Hillsdale College to represent your state in a National Referendum on Religious Liberty.

This sponsored message from Conservative Liberty Wire is on behalf of Hillsdale College [](https://links.conservativelibertywire.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=3062e645d78b4ea1aec5c98b859a7d69&_e=5cT4b7bEBJaTrvXeSrm_r5o6w-HkfDOzP7IAEIyYX0B4iVizhFhc1dw2q0ZrmGVM0T3TrG5T8MGtMzr7D1zmx5_Ch7FXTc84_oRDiUUVrIDTmRt8A0-bMvLpagGxY__EPC0cbrxWq2Y4MoEr4gdSD42OFsyQwz6bJb0sacpTd7lpvwfMc00i8o_Yxf5IBeSs630gzAkZPFmB9OyjsMhoRuHKPa6HCsHb1RBGBDQYxsCJCjfuJbxWer3cF69bCxMvPT6qSwj1nIfeCMu1SOFpNxWp_MFk6qGmY07DM-glQ5hiw1N0LBHJ8yEz6CyVQNsziDscB8t7MuqF_cy0OpENwY6f2GZQ87Fxt80ytSjoRtPEs4P4VEIGFbLTPKx9xKQi7bbr8_MujCSZTdOjvSHAaSfh1_2Ew9d8nbvMS8UuDEk%3D) Dear Friend, You have been selected by Hillsdale College to represent your state in a **National Referendum on Religious Liberty.** [](https://links.conservativelibertywire.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=3062e645d78b4ea1aec5c98b859a7d69&_e=5cT4b7bEBJaTrvXeSrm_r5o6w-HkfDOzP7IAEIyYX0B4iVizhFhc1dw2q0ZrmGVM0T3TrG5T8MGtMzr7D1zmx5_Ch7FXTc84_oRDiUUVrIDTmRt8A0-bMvLpagGxY__EPC0cbrxWq2Y4MoEr4gdSD42OFsyQwz6bJb0sacpTd7lpvwfMc00i8o_Yxf5IBeSs630gzAkZPFmB9OyjsMhoRuHKPa6HCsHb1RBGBDQYxsCJCjfuJbxWer3cF69bCxMvusolhVYpTFTA5uo6oiBjONfp0qlGTKth-Rc5t7Iuemaa56BXngiEYN1VNvK7SkqDRmtpfUEjjTIElJn4khxum8-PmKIZ0ayxglMEgvqbObj0Hh0tO5jal_RtoDqR91IW857JEgDMjnaz7v2viEh4Mxh6PuyV5LtWwbUBGxrwjFg%3D) The referendum will only take a few moments of your time. Before you complete it, I want to remind you of some things we've seen (and lived through) in recent years--which we never thought we'd see in our country...
* Government mandates forcing Christian churches to close while casinos, strip clubs, and drug dispensaries remained open.

* Far-Left activists targeting Christian business owners, Christian teachers, and Christian coaches through litigation.

* The weaponizing of the Department of Justice and the FBI against Christian pro-life advocates who are defined as believing in “extremist ideologies” and having the potential for “domestic terrorism.”

* Christians in the workplace being forced to hide their faith while critical race theory and transgenderism are promoted.

**That 's why I'm asking you to take the Hillsdale College National Referendum on Religious Liberty.** By completing this survey, you will help us more clearly understand the views of the American people on this critical issue. Your responses will help Hillsdale strengthen its nationwide educational outreach efforts on behalf of liberty--including religious liberty. Friend, you can complete the **National Referendum on Religious Liberty** by using the secure link below: [**https://info.hillsdale.edu/religious-liberty-survey**](https://links.conservativelibertywire.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=3062e645d78b4ea1aec5c98b859a7d69&_e=5cT4b7bEBJaTrvXeSrm_r5o6w-HkfDOzP7IAEIyYX0B4iVizhFhc1dw2q0ZrmGVM0T3TrG5T8MGtMzr7D1zmx5_Ch7FXTc84_oRDiUUVrIDTmRt8A0-bMvLpagGxY__EPC0cbrxWq2Y4MoEr4gdSD42OFsyQwz6bJb0sacpTd7lpvwfMc00i8o_Yxf5IBeSs630gzAkZPFmB9OyjsMhoRuHKPa6HCsHb1RBGBDQYxsCJCjfuJbxWer3cF69bCxMvYMX1RryGMgukVpTiNtY40-MfPODq2F4MMoVnBwIQC7V22f-tWlt7HvhwynuVhUhrnlXxe_wzPshzs6FkKO3e_rK_UFdvvnLNpQpKDfe0XE0mLshDCSBAxV_rE1EuEKb_wwH3mQJbrxHwoQbRO8DCM2ohusLxfBt4-g599WmxPZI%3D) Like the founders of our nation, the founders of Hillsdale College understood the essential connection between faith and freedom. **The College was founded in 1844 to offer "sound learning" in order to preserve "the inestimable blessings...of civil and religious liberty."** Yet today's ruling class mocks people of faith as "backward," "bigots," and even "Christo-fascists." Politicians like Barack Obama claim that people like you "get bitter" and "cling to guns or religion." These so-called elites are full of contempt for you and for Christianity and will not protect your civil and religious liberties. You and I know that religious liberty in America is under serious threat. But we can reverse course. **The first step is ...EDUCATION.** Today's government policies that threaten religious liberty were conceived and implemented by people deceived by far-Left propaganda in our K-12 schools, colleges, and universities. That's why a vital part of this fight--in which Hillsdale College is a leader--is **reaching** and **teaching** millions of citizens the TRUTH about America's great heritage of religious liberty. We are heavily invested in our educational outreach efforts through our **Project to Save Religious Liberty in America.** These efforts include:
* **Teaching nearly 1,600 undergraduate and graduate students** --on our campuses in Hillsdale, Michigan, and Washington, D.C.--who bring their traditional faith with them as they join the fight to restore liberty and constitutional government in our country.

* **Distributing _Imprimis_** , America's leading digest of liberty, which is mailed to more than 6.6 million homes and businesses ten times per year. Previous issues include "Inside the Transgender Empire" by Christopher F. Rufo, "The Most Important Decision in Life" by Bishop Robert Barron, and "The Politicization of the Department of Justice" by Harmeet K. Dhillon.

* **Producing and promoting free online courses** for any citizen who wishes to learn on topics such as Christianity, the Constitution, American history, and free market economics. Several courses (including "The Genesis Story: Reading Biblical Narratives," "Ancient Christianity," and "C.S. Lewis on Christianity") consider the important connection between faith and liberty.

* **Providing a classical K-12 curriculum** with a solid grounding in American history, constitutional government, and economics to schools that educate thousands of students nationwide.

After everything we've seen in recent years, the need for Hillsdale's educational outreach efforts is undeniable. So please share your views by completing the **National Referendum on Religious Liberty** and returning it to me as soon as possible. It will only take a few moments of your time. Your completed survey will help us to develop the most effective strategy to **reach** and **teach** millions of Americans on behalf of liberty. As you might know, Hillsdale College refuses to accept ONE PENNY of government funding--not even indirectly in the form of federal or state student grants or loans. **This independence frees the College from burdensome and corrupting government regulations. Thanks to our generous donors, we remain true to our original mission, even as many other colleges and universities reject religious liberty and embrace radical and dangerous ideologies.** I hope you will partner with Hillsdale College by making a generous tax-deductible gift today. You can easily do so after completing the **National Referendum on Religious Liberty** , which you can access at this secure link: [**https://info.hillsdale.edu/religious-liberty-survey**](https://links.conservativelibertywire.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=3062e645d78b4ea1aec5c98b859a7d69&_e=5cT4b7bEBJaTrvXeSrm_r5o6w-HkfDOzP7IAEIyYX0B4iVizhFhc1dw2q0ZrmGVM0T3TrG5T8MGtMzr7D1zmx5_Ch7FXTc84_oRDiUUVrIDTmRt8A0-bMvLpagGxY__EPC0cbrxWq2Y4MoEr4gdSD42OFsyQwz6bJb0sacpTd7lpvwfMc00i8o_Yxf5IBeSs630gzAkZPFmB9OyjsMhoRuHKPa6HCsHb1RBGBDQYxsCJCjfuJbxWer3cF69bCxMvq5gzNKF6mkYbqH-dHO0fXsWM30ti2eSyF4zWII-uYTc3U5WDCEQDKwfcL3p2DrdxD_TY0bB6KLIjLvGDhk-MCASO7o_iRvbDBo5Jlg2XQmqcSkqKlFWniACzIHvr6bRD5pxihC3sGvPdQmTKB8aZG6r8X0HPmd1kTZpMWJMlAEI%3D) Thank you for your support of Hillsdale's educational outreach efforts on behalf of religious liberty. Warm regards, Larry P. Arnn President, Hillsdale College Pursuing Truth and Defending Liberty Since 1844 |

| Conservative Liberty Wire
---
_PO Box 1188 Fort Collins, CO 80522_

Far-Left activists targeting Christian business owners, Christian teachers, and Christian coaches through litigation. The weaponizing of the Department of Justice and the FBI against Christian pro-life advocates who are defined as believing in “extremist ideologies” and having the potential for “domestic terrorism.” Christians in the workplace being forced to hide their faith while critical race theory and transgenderism are promoted. That 's why I'm asking you to take the Hillsdale College National Referendum on Religious Liberty. By completing this survey, you will help us more clearly understand the views of the American people on this critical issue. Your responses will help Hillsdale strengthen its nationwide educational outreach efforts on behalf of liberty--including religious liberty. Friend, you can complete the National Referendum on Religious Liberty by using the secure link below: Like the founders of our nation, the founders of Hillsdale College understood the essential connection between faith and freedom. The College was founded in 1844 to offer "sound learning" in order to preserve "the inestimable blessings...of civil and religious liberty." Yet today's ruling class mocks people of faith as "backward," "bigots," and even "Christo-fascists." Politicians like Barack Obama claim that people like you "get bitter" and "cling to guns or religion." These so-called elites are full of contempt for you and for Christianity and will not protect your civil and religious liberties. You and I know that religious liberty in America is under serious threat. But we can reverse course. The first step is ...EDUCATION. Today's government policies that threaten religious liberty were conceived and implemented by people deceived by far-Left propaganda in our K-12 schools, colleges, and universities. That's why a vital part of this fight--in which Hillsdale College is a leader--is reaching and teaching millions of citizens the TRUTH about America's great heritage of religious liberty. We are heavily invested in our educational outreach efforts through our Project to Save Religious Liberty in America. These efforts include: Teaching nearly 1,600 undergraduate and graduate students --on our campuses in Hillsdale, Michigan, and Washington, D.C.--who bring their traditional faith with them as they join the fight to restore liberty and constitutional government in our country. Distributing Imprimis , America's leading digest of liberty, which is mailed to more than 6.6 million homes and businesses ten times per year. Previous issues include "Inside the Transgender Empire" by Christopher F. Rufo, "The Most Important Decision in Life" by Bishop Robert Barron, and "The Politicization of the Department of Justice" by Harmeet K. Dhillon. Producing and promoting free online courses for any citizen who wishes to learn on topics such as Christianity, the Constitution, American history, and free market economics. Several courses (including "The Genesis Story: Reading Biblical Narratives," "Ancient Christianity," and "C.S. Lewis on Christianity") consider the important connection between faith and liberty. Providing a classical K-12 curriculum with a solid grounding in American history, constitutional government, and economics to schools that educate thousands of students nationwide. After everything we've seen in recent years, the need for Hillsdale's educational outreach efforts is undeniable. So please share your views by completing the National Referendum on Religious Liberty and returning it to me as soon as possible. It will only take a few moments of your time. Your completed survey will help us to develop the most effective strategy to reach and teach millions of Americans on behalf of liberty. As you might know, Hillsdale College refuses to accept ONE PENNY of government funding--not even indirectly in the form of federal or state student grants or loans. This independence frees the College from burdensome and corrupting government regulations. Thanks to our generous donors, we remain true to our original mission, even as many other colleges and universities reject religious liberty and embrace radical and dangerous ideologies. I hope you will partner with Hillsdale College by making a generous tax-deductible gift today. You can easily do so after completing the National Referendum on Religious Liberty , which you can access at this secure link: Thank you for your support of Hillsdale's educational outreach efforts on behalf of religious liberty. Warm regards, Larry P. Arnn President, Hillsdale College Pursuing Truth and Defending Liberty Since 1844 | | Conservative Liberty Wire PO Box 1188 Fort Collins, CO 80522 |

I'm the Executive Director and General Counsel for the Center for American Liberty -- a conservative non-profit law firm that protects your freedom to say what you want, to live according to your conscience, and to pass on your conservative values to the next generation.We will continue to lead the charge against the left’s "lawfare" -- as it increases its efforts to leverage the legal system to force D.E.I. and "woke" nonsense upon us.But with more than 35 active cases -- including some of the most consequential of our time -- your support is more important than ever before as we close in on the end of 2024.Make no mistake, the left is plotting how to use the courts to ram its radical agenda down our throats. **But the Center for American Liberty can stop them --[which is why I need to know in the next 24 hours if you’re with us.](https://links.conservativesgive.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=18479f0cf4a3412a91557918179e5e73&_e=wP3sNdSDwgxEqIrVIZOWGq2MqjcoKE-MUHgm3p55bIKyJJGj-Kp98TxqGkw2_TqNVsL3nl8vyLo7Kq2s4usaVJQn5wEni_ZQzx_ij2O6A7lIFi0z9uaaqbxpWrbjUIeh2BXYXU6CzJSu9OEqk7pAxx5kYh0gFseQyJtZ-xHAlYi_d21ta2-tniysId2_zQxGDOeJ27KNednKYaAZ_-edGb1ygB7U8eLR0x96vfXSEHnI6_jU2wcrCq1xGXTDh4RX51Hj2o9SDOn41ZcM19KlG92rjMg2y9P7B1_AeiPbiI2pJDNhE_lHGKBbqYxL35uAp-Xxk6UziUHa8ar9oD4Mt-6vcnFTflhFT0_j7oe1R-ohgD9-KdVIRKJV1AKZJp_TRcOFrg7zh8Qm7VySoJX7yQ%3D%3D)**Friend, every freedom you cherish is on the line...
---
* Your right to free speech
* Your right to gather and peacefully protest
* Your right to post on social media without government censorship
* Your right to raise your children in accordance with your values
* For women, your right to privacy and safety in share spaces like locker rooms and restrooms
* For children, the right to grow up without being drugged and surgically mutilated by gender clinics

---
The left wants to erase these rights. They want to shred the Constitution. And worst of all, they want to remove God from every corner of American society. And the moment President Trump puts his hand on the Bible on January 20th, the stakes go up.If you think the left is actively working to silence you, brainwash your children, and force men into women’s private spaces right now... just wait.This is why the Center for American Liberty must be prepared not only to fight back as legal battles arise... ...but to go on the offensive to defend freedom, protect families, and challenge government overreach whenever it arises.But to be effective, I'm counting on your support.
---

# Saturday, January 4, 2025
---|---
**Good morning!** On this day in 1854, Samuel Ketchum, of the infamous Ketchum Boys, was born in Caldwell County, Texas. He and his brother Thomas terrorized the American Southwest in the 1890s with their gang of outlaws. ([More](http://email.editor.thetexasflyover.com/c/eJx0zz1uwyAUAODTwBbr8ZNgDwxdvKVrR-sZHgYFm8jQOL591e69wCd9X_fpjimnbfnElWx7hzJJkNcLiAvoyWPK56S5tzP4QXCywqjrMIAGzaMN_c0HFwKoXgGikQGc1i4YMQyITvFkfzEQoIVQSooOgzRIrr-SNkF7wTSQT63sXYvU6I015LO8aO9cWXm2sbVnZeqDyZHJ8TiOrtWIZctpo67sC5NjxM3PpTyYHGlre6LK5Pig5uL3epnLWflu_fNIOad6M0zDsmLKf377N_yy8icAAP__TTxZ1A)) Nothing says Texas like sheriffs, bandits, and two guys and a dog [riding out a tornado](http://email.editor.thetexasflyover.com/c/eJx00DFvwyAQBeBfAxvWgY8QDwxdvKVrR-sSjhgJhwgj2_n3VdOuXZ-evie9r8t0oZTT4_5JC_t2xDIZMFaBVoBToJRfE8rgrxAGLdlr19thAASUsx-YyVo2CO4aWd9OGMjxCaIljOcwyOR_MNCAWve90R1F44hvZ8voIgYtEDikVmrXZm580Brzq2xcu1tZZPZza89V9B_CjMKM-753sRw7U5t_K8KMfLTKC6u_VJhxS4GLimmduS70UKHc1dtWrdQHhaKuhZqsPjz3lHNaT04g3BdK-T3b_v1h8-Y7AAD__zvQYu4) in a fishing boat, all included in today's edition! ## Winter Freeze Next Week
Texas is bracing for a winter freeze next week as arctic air pushes through the state. After a warm weekend, Texans can expect a sharp drop in temperatures statewide, and [snow and freezing rain](http://email.editor.thetexasflyover.com/c/eJx0kLHOozAQhJ_GdEbexYFQuLiGLtdeiQxewioOjuxNCG9_4nTt32yx-jTfaP7cxpvnyNv9t3-Sk--SRjR40Qa0sWPwHI_RVsFNJvRQkYOuufS9scZWq0Pj276zrYepncKMMC09TFeAvr0u2LUVuzPMgLEATYNQ-wU7T_P1QrZbbABlDQWWlGtZSejryxKP9KFcz-lZRbeKvIpqfikcFA77vtdz5PmBa3oXSdtJnX_yslJWOJw6hYOB8zQKB_pQPmTl7a4l6ceWdu2n9Ba90Vf0TvQo2udZeNaesy4n8Eql8MSR5dC86f8ujQqHKrvw2jlGLm2nrLk_Pcd_XeXH8T4O_wYAAP__jKBycQ) is possible in some areas, including Houston. It will be [the coldest stretch](http://email.editor.thetexasflyover.com/c/eJx0kL2u3CAQhZ8Gd2MxGP8VFGnc3bQprTEMayRsroC73n37yKu0Kb_5Rkc658_X-kUhhvPxmw429eXTqqTqQSJIvToK8b3qxplNuhkbNjh2_TxLLXWzG6ZtYNTUkRtYblNPnixu2tmJZ5qxCeYOkyg1YtcpbMmrkdhOPevRa4dCS3ahptzWnSu_qPj4Tk_OrU1HE81e63cR3S-hFqGW67rayxPdUqiFcg028i2Y6s5ZqMX5C_4RULY1WKCQwaYjnA8oP6ejN_yUnfPN4YS6M9gUHZf6-Uz-cypMJZ1CLWoaYfQ4IZEDRb0DrcjDNnAPg-INucOZ9dhk476vEGMowyi0fBwU4qdF_e-sT6P-BgAA__-zYXst) of the winter thus far in most parts of the state. ## New Texas Sheriffs Sworn In
There’s a new sheriff in town across many Texas counties after swearing-in ceremonies on New Year’s Day. New El Paso [Sheriff Oscar Ugarte](http://email.editor.thetexasflyover.com/c/eJx0kL1uwyAURp8Gb1hwDXE8MHTxlq4drWtziVGxiYCE-O0rd6zU-fvR0fm6TTf0we_3T9zIlLeLEwjQXEgu1GTRh2NSjTWzsINsyMi-08MglFDNagCWRcv-MlMHQs8L0gUsohPDfCWtXePNeSakUFJ2HcgWHfRIy1WT6p2ykilB1peY2rJSoTdmF474otQucWuCWUt5ZNZ9MBgZjLXW9rvk7QwZjBT4A3PkS3zu5eA71cxgfN4xFeK5xrRzv3PM_E8xr5S8czzu54YfhClziweDsUnGPqoPwedLz5S4b-jDL0v5V87LwE8AAAD__1_2aYg) takes over for his 16-year predecessor with the stated goal “to make El Paso the safest community in the country.” Galveston County’s new Sheriff Jimmy Fullen made a splash by saying he would [end Jeep Weekend,](http://email.editor.thetexasflyover.com/c/eJx0kLmOrDAQAL_GZD3yxTGBg5eQzUs3RA1ug2d9IOw5-PvVbL5xSaVSfd2mG_rg0_ofI5n6dnmSXLbABXA9WfThnHRjzcztVTRkRK_a65VrrpvNoNMdt1w6NXdaLYNr5aJRSdXNiNqpxpuPjAuuhVBKigs62SMtQ0u6d9oKpjlZX_NxqRtVemNx4cxPOi5Ljk0wW617YeofkyOTI86LUB_C5LjnUpkcVwxPKjUnWPIj1RPKRod3Du4-xhPcIwRKYAlDgYilAL2zfRSIlCoG2AhD3eBOtMOL6JuSBXSVDpjJpxXKKx-JyVG0vRrUoJgcm8PY_eVD8KXrmeZrRB9-c-uf_55G_gQAAP__TFp0qA) a hugely popular, but volatile event that saw 300 arrests in 2024. Now entering his fourth term, Smith County Sheriff Larry Smith was sworn in along with more than 200 law enforcement officers.
## 5 TX Cities Among Fastest-Growing in U.S.
[Five Texas cities](http://email.editor.thetexasflyover.com/c/eJx0z72O6yAQQOGngc7RMOBgFxS3cZfbbmnNmiFGwsEyk7-3X2X7rY_0SefrMl8ol3y7_qeNg7xSnRGw78B04OZIubxnp2P4hjgazcF4248jOHB6Db3HdE6cziMOS_TO0LhwpMEMYGGxqHP4YGDAGWMtmhMl9MTL0LPzyUWjHHDMUo-TrCz8opbKuz74OC110yWsIntT9p_CSeHUNjqEWmP5ZIVTJKGuyT1mbgqnve73QpLrrbse9Slrh4BOHyHuz1xKbmevHFw3yuXXlz-HHwF_AgAA___LN1ja) were in the top 15 cities for year-over-year growth from 2022 to 2023, with four cracking the top ten. clean_body: Texas is bracing for a winter freeze next week as arctic air pushes through the state. | | | | | | Saturday, January 4, 2025 ---|--- Good morning! On this day in 1854, Samuel Ketchum, of the infamous Ketchum Boys, was born in Caldwell County, Texas. He and his brother Thomas terrorized the American Southwest in the 1890s with their gang of outlaws. () Nothing says Texas like sheriffs, bandits, and two guys and a dog in a fishing boat, all included in today's edition! Today's sponsor is , a natural way to improve sleep and reduce stress. Abilene ☁️ 70/47° | Amarillo ⛅ 65/22° | Austin ☁️ 74/64° | Brownsville ☁️ 83/72° | Corpus Christi ⛅ 79/70° | DFW 🌦️ 61/59° | El Paso ☀️ 73/44° | Houston ⛅ 70/66° | Laredo ⛅ 83/65° | Lubbock ☁️ 70/42° | Midland ⛅ 72/47° | San Antonio 🌥️ 75/66° | Tyler 🌦️ 59/57° | Waco 🌦️ 69/64° | Winter Freeze Next Week Texas is bracing for a winter freeze next week as arctic air pushes through the state. After a warm weekend, Texans can expect a sharp drop in temperatures statewide, and is possible in some areas, including Houston. It will be of the winter thus far in most parts of the state. You can see all the counties in line for . New Texas Sheriffs Sworn In There’s a new sheriff in town across many Texas counties after swearing-in ceremonies on New Year’s Day. New El Paso takes over for his 16-year predecessor with the stated goal “to make El Paso the safest community in the country.” Galveston County’s new Sheriff Jimmy Fullen made a splash by saying he would a hugely popular, but volatile event that saw 300 arrests in 2024. Now entering his fourth term, Smith County Sheriff Larry Smith was sworn in along with more than 200 law enforcement officers. 5 TX Cities Among Fastest-Growing in U.S. were in the top 15 cities for year-over-year growth from 2022 to 2023, with four cracking the top ten. New Braunfels, Georgetown, and Atascocita took the number two, four, and five spots respectively, all with double-digit percentages in growth. Conroe slotted in at nine and Round Rock at 14. You can see the . The Flyover is just like The Texas Flyover, except it covers news from all fifty states. ! | Flying together with our sponsor It sounds unbelievable: . But it’s true – and we have the actual user stories to prove it! It’s all thanks to our breakthrough signal pattern, which sends gentle stimulation from your hand to your brain that tells your nervous system to relax. ... and now, thanks to the Chill Pill, you finally have an affordable handheld version you can take anywhere! | ➤ Tyler: Attorney Gen.** Ken Paxton is set to visit Tyler next week in an "accountability" tour of the state, which will include "key districts" where state representatives "have fallen short of upholding conservative principles." () ➤ Dallas: The Judicial Conference of the U.S. will not send Supreme Court Justice Clarence Thomas' ethics case to the Department of Justice. The case revolved around alleged free trips from Harlan Crow, a Dallas-based political donor. () ➤ President Joe Biden blocked the sale of U.S. Steel, with multiple operations in Texas, to Nippon Steel of Japan, following campaign promises earlier in the year when he was still the Democratic candidate. () ➤ California-based Braga Fresh has advised that its broccoli florets sold in Walmarts in Texas may contain listeria. () ➤ Fort Cavazos: Korean War hero Gen. Richard Cavazos, namesake for the recently renamed Fort Hood, will receive the Medal of Honor posthumously, according to a Friday announcement from President Joe Biden. () ➤ Tyler: Authorities have safely recovered a 15-year-old girl and her daughter after they were reported missing on Thursday, and an 18-year-old male has been arrested in connection to their disappearance. name: Hillsdale College via Defend the Constitution
subject: Your Supreme Court survey
body:
You have been selected by Hillsdale College to represent your state in a National Referendum on Religious Liberty.

This sponsored message from Defend the Constitution is on behalf of Hillsdale College [](https://links.defend-the-constitution.org/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=52f6fe0317cc45db8a48d2f94abdf580&_e=nqXghrvVSyoDNqcx9zJVDHaKebh7EcyfKVSkKfpuLm1_c2WhDlRffTtMFx8Peo8UnrC3VJ2hCPXerilXWtmfvv-_V9S0Mg96nddm3WmH0lpREtqnAZZPm_uu0dh495JVhcHNVWaI0H1Ja1W41h78pqoZesfqAqjIDhnQVnbNxhHT2S0fBkiWE7q-KXcZ9Mzv9nNVpepKOmHMIIrwhQRbFMVwcgdEydI6ADdEIVyi6xIMFr30ynv4XNy8LTC5n5L6mZBpj_4QcBPzzXQuVG1qx8nz8xChj2mKPtigsYEoWezC327th0_aKZ60MZR5mCCNP4Wq2n04w8B9MTfxKv11pOSQNuG8kgvtz6RcnA7Mim2b_y83DFE2SYBQmHPrLGqxKSTi4DgcvSVEv8hxUvhaYJNNNC1TLsq4o0ePudH_zgw%3D) Dear Friend, You have been selected by Hillsdale College to represent your state in a **National Referendum on Religious Liberty.** [](https://links.defend-the-constitution.org/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=52f6fe0317cc45db8a48d2f94abdf580&_e=nqXghrvVSyoDNqcx9zJVDHaKebh7EcyfKVSkKfpuLm1_c2WhDlRffTtMFx8Peo8UnrC3VJ2hCPXerilXWtmfvv-_V9S0Mg96nddm3WmH0lpREtqnAZZPm_uu0dh495JVhcHNVWaI0H1Ja1W41h78pqoZesfqAqjIDhnQVnbNxhHT2S0fBkiWE7q-KXcZ9Mzv9nNVpepKOmHMIIrwhQRbFMVwcgdEydI6ADdEIVyi6xIMFr30ynv4XNy8LTC5n5L6GZMUSZSu1A69CSz4yc5S8OJHaYI-c9J5yCuDkTkIWOLZGRCexlIls8Ktl9CN42VKb7dornXeNQYqcs2G4y-nLSB1YPyFiWDuZkayyDzOc8n0C1tgfvD5sbR6sGvHl0CHIBiOD-ysh8jcZZK_HlLGypyz11k2pwgzu4pSMbRrVH4%3D) The referendum will only take a few moments of your time. Before you complete it, I want to remind you of some things we've seen (and lived through) in recent years--which we never thought we'd see in our country...
* Government mandates forcing Christian churches to close while casinos, strip clubs, and drug dispensaries remained open.

* Far-Left activists targeting Christian business owners, Christian teachers, and Christian coaches through litigation.

* The weaponizing of the Department of Justice and the FBI against Christian pro-life advocates who are defined as believing in “extremist ideologies” and having the potential for “domestic terrorism.”

* Christians in the workplace being forced to hide their faith while critical race theory and transgenderism are promoted.

**That 's why I'm asking you to take the Hillsdale College National Referendum on Religious Liberty.** By completing this survey, you will help us more clearly understand the views of the American people on this critical issue. Your responses will help Hillsdale strengthen its nationwide educational outreach efforts on behalf of liberty--including religious liberty. Friend, you can complete the **National Referendum on Religious Liberty** by using the secure link below: [**https://info.hillsdale.edu/religious-liberty-survey**](https://links.defend-the-constitution.org/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=52f6fe0317cc45db8a48d2f94abdf580&_e=nqXghrvVSyoDNqcx9zJVDHaKebh7EcyfKVSkKfpuLm1_c2WhDlRffTtMFx8Peo8UnrC3VJ2hCPXerilXWtmfvv-_V9S0Mg96nddm3WmH0lpREtqnAZZPm_uu0dh495JVhcHNVWaI0H1Ja1W41h78pqoZesfqAqjIDhnQVnbNxhHT2S0fBkiWE7q-KXcZ9Mzv9nNVpepKOmHMIIrwhQRbFMVwcgdEydI6ADdEIVyi6xIMFr30ynv4XNy8LTC5n5L6xlO45-dBWQthU5K-boTTLzUhzgKpBiu_MYIlJ2Cs_hcVbUxWQ4M30AfJA9tOM5MlX1q9YpFzN3qr88k5iUZBnfDqhu6dZKDvxxKSx65p8oDsEWNvO-ndgoMr3rjpaKa8QLM7Yg7QK1W4M5-fryWbbzS-hGqA7eyAV0BZFINpf48%3D) Like the founders of our nation, the founders of Hillsdale College understood the essential connection between faith and freedom. **The College was founded in 1844 to offer "sound learning" in order to preserve "the inestimable blessings...of civil and religious liberty."** Yet today's ruling class mocks people of faith as "backward," "bigots," and even "Christo-fascists." Politicians like Barack Obama claim that people like you "get bitter" and "cling to guns or religion." These so-called elites are full of contempt for you and for Christianity and will not protect your civil and religious liberties. You and I know that religious liberty in America is under serious threat. But we can reverse course. **The first step is ...EDUCATION.** Today's government policies that threaten religious liberty were conceived and implemented by people deceived by far-Left propaganda in our K-12 schools, colleges, and universities. That's why a vital part of this fight--in which Hillsdale College is a leader--is **reaching** and **teaching** millions of citizens the TRUTH about America's great heritage of religious liberty. We are heavily invested in our educational outreach efforts through our **Project to Save Religious Liberty in America.** These efforts include:
* **Teaching nearly 1,600 undergraduate and graduate students** --on our campuses in Hillsdale, Michigan, and Washington, D.C.--who bring their traditional faith with them as they join the fight to restore liberty and constitutional government in our country.

* **Distributing _Imprimis_** , America's leading digest of liberty, which is mailed to more than 6.6 million homes and businesses ten times per year. Previous issues include "Inside the Transgender Empire" by Christopher F. Rufo, "The Most Important Decision in Life" by Bishop Robert Barron, and "The Politicization of the Department of Justice" by Harmeet K. Dhillon.

* **Producing and promoting free online courses** for any citizen who wishes to learn on topics such as Christianity, the Constitution, American history, and free market economics. Several courses (including "The Genesis Story: Reading Biblical Narratives," "Ancient Christianity," and "C.S. Lewis on Christianity") consider the important connection between faith and liberty.

* **Providing a classical K-12 curriculum** with a solid grounding in American history, constitutional government, and economics to schools that educate thousands of students nationwide.

After everything we've seen in recent years, the need for Hillsdale's educational outreach efforts is undeniable. So please share your views by completing the **National Referendum on Religious Liberty** and returning it to me as soon as possible. It will only take a few moments of your time. Your completed survey will help us to develop the most effective strategy to **reach** and **teach** millions of Americans on behalf of liberty. As you might know, Hillsdale College refuses to accept ONE PENNY of government funding--not even indirectly in the form of federal or state student grants or loans. **This independence frees the College from burdensome and corrupting government regulations. Thanks to our generous donors, we remain true to our original mission, even as many other colleges and universities reject religious liberty and embrace radical and dangerous ideologies.** I hope you will partner with Hillsdale College by making a generous tax-deductible gift today. You can easily do so after completing the **National Referendum on Religious Liberty** , which you can access at this secure link: [**https://info.hillsdale.edu/religious-liberty-survey**](https://links.defend-the-constitution.org/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=52f6fe0317cc45db8a48d2f94abdf580&_e=nqXghrvVSyoDNqcx9zJVDHaKebh7EcyfKVSkKfpuLm1_c2WhDlRffTtMFx8Peo8UnrC3VJ2hCPXerilXWtmfvv-_V9S0Mg96nddm3WmH0lpREtqnAZZPm_uu0dh495JVhcHNVWaI0H1Ja1W41h78pqoZesfqAqjIDhnQVnbNxhHT2S0fBkiWE7q-KXcZ9Mzv9nNVpepKOmHMIIrwhQRbFMVwcgdEydI6ADdEIVyi6xIMFr30ynv4XNy8LTC5n5L6f1VUasuAO9xS6f_GtrKT7CrbqTrWi2rRU8YUjOZzTMmoGkX95KYnPYDYC3J80wogQ1VmZmBppyqZM458gGe3PFJP7vPlzg5beBCjLdDVOubh0vw0fgG2A3jcfAC_a7BixhxReJFXbwDcuJHGvrjBW0KacgwBs3OFfgy9LS0_sJI%3D) Thank you for your support of Hillsdale's educational outreach efforts on behalf of religious liberty. Warm regards, Larry P. Arnn President, Hillsdale College Pursuing Truth and Defending Liberty Since 1844 |

| Defend the Constitution
---
_PO Box 1188 Fort Collins, CO 80522_
[](https://links.defend-the-constitution.org/e/encryptedUnsubscribe?_r=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_s=52f6fe0317cc45db8a48d2f94abdf580&_t=tJXTWxsUgGSnv__FF_o5x70Gf_5vNogPuNbM0V3ky-8tzT1AHhIuF0H86PahpAIctf8W-7G-S_5XZSIuDzTSoTZliU9gY6m_EsQphzXh9JMxdrlnym9VtSmRsOBNU6MXynZQzwMTvpJEyq_wGG8SSNNP29Mr6pgCBQbCA17nZFM%3D)
_[**unsubscribe**](https://links.defend-the-constitution.org/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=52f6fe0317cc45db8a48d2f94abdf580&_e=a_V5TTkOZMTrDmkreRLBzE4YC7TSux-eGLsAI0mVNjLYZ0qPPSS8_fLwgzfCQiPTPO7CY3CX0vY6r4zaflPjBevKZBH8zsxRePAFfUAuYDkRz2rF5TS836XbTGypab0TLbT8ZXOIM21GSxV7_YF50_oWVE0K2vwzKQ4bxhdvgF7r3bZVLfeu6b5kKkCTZoWmXvoKUMefWHQKCsxZWFRFmZBqy0D5go2lLhZGXV13jZhDqQtmZt5XCkR9gDj82VCBWOVrg36QRBLXzo5o6nq80vtMFDgVue9mxxdzwJ204Vw%3D)_ | _[manage data preferences](https://links.defend-the-constitution.org/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=52f6fe0317cc45db8a48d2f94abdf580&_e=nqXghrvVSyoDNqcx9zJVDKLaothDdQ3ovuB6z_b-YeNALRF9mSiA40AJJzrf5HZBnbDYcjvde51G7iJXDccNYpwhp8A0tlUDEzBGxq0v4OxjYJqx-n6DrO0LPT6HlYuIcQ4F1QRm4M7JKHWyr4Im4UUEme7h9xi0GdCOKo4KnJPhiwlM1cabhIb9DgsVMHoJaZIx0cZBh14Xi2p2FzYE3mIFf59xE3JKWMlU6AjmxpU%3D)_

name: Rudy Giuliani
subject: I'm going to trial
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Rudy Giuliani Freedom Fund Legal Defense Trust
body:
They want “SEVERE” sanctions against me.

[https://secure.winred.com/rudy-giuliani-freedom-fund-79a3adfa/9b782359cb780820/?utm_campaign=20250103&utm_medium=email&utm_source=RW_B&utm_content=WAMA&utm_term=active]

Dear Friend,

I didn’t want to bother you over the Christmas holiday, but I now
have something very important to share with you.

Reports indicate that my trial is set to begin on January 16 – just
days before President Trump’s inauguration.

_THIS TRIAL WILL DETERMINE WHETHER THE LEFT CAN SEIZE MY HOME IN
FLORIDA AND TRULY LEAVE ME WITH NOTHING. THIS IS MY FINAL CHANCE TO
SAVE MY HOME._

Since there’s no way I can pay the outrageous $148 MILLION judgment
against me, they want to rob me of everything I own.

They want irreplaceable mementos I gave to my only son. They want
personal gifts that I was given by allies abroad to show solidarity
with America after the tragedy of September 11th.

During these difficult times, Christmas reminded me of what’s truly
important in life. Earthly possessions come and go – homes, cars,
money all come to an end. But the Bible reminds us that _eternal_
“heavenly treasures” await us.

The pursuit of truth, freedom, and justice are worth infinitely more
than any earthly possession.
