name: Senator Jennifer B. Boysko
subject: Boysko Bulletin: Winter Storm Alert As We Head to Richmond
body:
[https://prod.cdn.everyaction.com/images/van/NGP/NGP50/1/102624/images/Bulletin.jpeg]
[https://prod.cdn.everyaction.com/images/van/NGP/NGP50/1/102624/images/IMG_3402-3.jpg]
Boysko Bulletin: I want to know what's on your mind
Dear Peter,
Happy New Year! My team and I always enjoy hearing from constituents about your concerns. We have public meetings later this week specifically so that my colleagues and I can listen to you and to learn what is most important to you pertaining to Virginia's public policy initiatives this week. I've included information about how to participate so that you don't miss out.
And as always, I will be sending weekly updates during the session to keep you informed.
Additionally, while many of us are fortunately surrounded by loved ones and the holiday season is a time for joy and connection, for some it can be a difficult time of the year. I've provided some important information with links to resources for those who might need it below as well.
In closing for now, I wish you and you loved ones Happy New Year! I hope that you have time to rest and enjoy your family and friends. I will be returning to Richmond on Sunday January 6th ready to work as we kick off the 2025 Virginia General Assembly Session.
Kindest regards,
[https://prod.cdn.everyaction.com/images/van/NGP/NGP50/1/102624/images/2024%20February%20Images/electronic%20signature.png]
Public Hearings are Opportunities to Share Your Views
Watch and/or Comment at the January 3, 2025 Public Hearings on the Governor’s Proposed Amendments to the 2024-2026 Biennial State Budget
All public hearings will be held virtually on Friday, January 3rd, 2025 at 10 am. There will be four separate virtual hearings with legislators from each region. I will be participating in the Northern Virginia public hearing. Public registration to speak at one of the public hearings will occur on Thursday, January 2, 2025. There is more information on the Senate Finance and Appropriations Committee Website [https://sfac.virginia.gov/] .
Those persons wishing to speak may register to speak the day before each virtual hearing from 8:00 am. through 4:00 pm.
Speakers will be taken in the order of registration. Each person may register only one speaker at a time and only sign-up to speak at one of the hearings. Speakers are asked to limit their comments to three minutes or less. Speakers representing groups and organizations should consolidate remarks to reduce duplication. Persons unable to attend may submit their comments electronically [https://tinyurl.com/5ymczt9c] . People with disabilities may request reasonable accommodations by calling (804) 698-7480. All requests for reasonable accommodations must be received by 5:00 p.m., Thursday December 26, 2024. Requested arrangements for sign language interpreters, received by December 26th, will be provided via video format.
The Public Hearings will be livestreamed on the Virginia General Assembly Website [https://tinyurl.com/27b8m2fp] .
You Can Comment at the Fairfax County Pre Session Legislative Hearing
Fairfax County General Assembly Delegation’s Pre-2025 Session Public Hearing
The Fairfax County delegation to the General Assembly will hold a public hearing regarding the upcoming 2025 session on Saturday, January 4 , at 9 a.m. in the Board Auditorium at the Fairfax County Government Center, 12000 Government Center Parkway, Fairfax with parking available in front of the Government Center Building. Fairfax County is assisting with the logistics of the delegation’s event. Fairfax County residents who want to sign up in advance to speak at the hearing should register online using this form [https://fairfaxcounty-639180.workflowcloud.com/forms/8cea202c-ee90-47e7-aa2f-cd318a57cf68] or contact the Department of Clerk Services at 703-324-3151, TTY 711, by noon on Thursday, January 2 . Additional guidelines for those interested in speaking at the public forum are as follows:
Only Fairfax County residents may register to speak.
Eligible residents requiring assistance will be helped as needed.
Speaking slots will be numbered based on a first come, first served allocation.
Fairfax County residents may register to speak as an individual or on behalf of an organization serving County residents.
Requests for ADA accommodations should be made as soon as possible but no later than 48 hours before the public hearing.
Organizations are encouraged to limit their presentation to no more than 3 speakers.
Each speaker will be allocated three minutes to address the Delegation.
Speakers must be present when called to the podium, and people who miss their turn will be added to the end of the list of speakers.
Written testimony may also be submitted via email to LegislativeTeam@fairfaxcounty.gov [LegislativeTeam@fairfaxcounty.gov] .
The Chair reserves the right to modify the guidelines on site for the smooth operation of the public forum.
The hearing will be televised live on Fairfax County Television Channel 16 (Channel 1016 in HD on Cox; Channel 16 on Verizon or Comcast), and can also be viewed on-line through the Channel 16 stream.
Reminder: Weapons Prohibited in County Buildings, Parks, at Special Events [https://www.fairfaxcounty.gov/news/board-votes-prohibit-weapons-county-buildings-parks-special-events]
Point of contact for other questions or requests for ADA accommodations: Arielle McAloon (703-324-2649, TTY 711) or Jennifer Van Ee (703-324-2640, TTY 711).
Further information on the public hearing is available from members of the Fairfax County legislative delegation. Contact information for individual delegation members is available on the Virginia General Assembly web page at http://whosmy.virginiageneralassembly.gov/ [http://whosmy.virginiageneralassembly.gov/]
Legislative Updates
How to Track Legislation
The website where you can find my legislation once the bills are introduced and track their progress has been updated. Check it out at https://lis.virginia.gov/ [https://lis.virginia.gov/] . By selecting “Delegates and Senators” and then my name, you will find Senator Boysko's page. You will see the committees I serve on and my Chief Patron, Chief Co-patron and Co-patron legislation.
Committee pages are where you will find when committees meet, their dockets, and what bills the committees are considering. The page for each bill lists the committee referral and there is a drop down menu that takes you to the committee page to figure out when the bill will be presented. We often get short notice. If you support one or more of my bills, email SenatorBoysko@senate.virginia.gov [SenatorBoysko@senate.virginia.gov] and we will add you to our stakeholder list and notify you when the bill(s) will be heard. We are very busy in Richmond but will do our best. Your support is very important to the success of our legislation.
Constituent Services
Addiction and Recovery Council
As a member of the Addiction and Recovery Council [https://bit.ly/3JEyG76] , we work together to ensure that people have the resources they need to identify and get help for addiction recovery. Addiction is a life threatening problem for too many Virginians. Please reach out if you need help for yourself or a loved one. The Chris Atwood Foundation can help you get started [https://www.thecaf.org/] .
Reach Out for Mental Health Support
The 988 Suicide & Crisis Lifeline [https://tinyurl.com/2jmjetw6] is available nationwide. You can also find support for yourself and family members by reaching out to NAMI [https://bit.ly/3LJuRvu] or Mental Health America [https://bit.ly/3wIafQ7] .
* The Substance Abuse and Mental Health Services Administration National Helpline: 1-800-662-4357
* National Drug Helpline: 1-844-289-0879
* National Institute of Mental Health Information Resource Center: 1-866-615-6464
* Partnership for Drug-Free Kids: 1-855-378-4373
Unemployment Assistance and Resources for Job Searchers
For those eligible for benefits, the Virginia Employment Commission (VEC) requires that people receiving unemployment benefits show proof of job searches each week. I encourage you to seek support for finding a job from Virginia Career Works [https://bit.ly/3xe2WgK] . They help identify training programs, job opportunities, and help with resumes, emails, and interviewing skills. My constituents report good results working with VCW. Please reach out if you need help with a VEC claim [https://tinyurl.com/ajw3hm3j] .
Help Paying Bills
If you are struggling to pay bills, please visit Virginia’s CommonHelp website [https://bit.ly/3301PnM] to figure out if you qualify for assistance.
You can also reach out to your county - your local government will review your financial situation and connect you with resources. In Fairfax County, contact Coordinated Services [https://bit.ly/2Gb4qmi] .
Here [https://bit.ly/3sFi0l3] are additional resources for food. If you have lost your health insurance, please visit coverva.gov [https://bit.ly/3mnEDu5] to figure out if you are eligible for Medicaid or for help with Affordable Care Act insurance.
Saturday and Sunday, January 19 from 10:30 am - 1:30 pm/ MLK Birthday Celebration Especially for Youth - RCC [https://restoncommunitycenter.com/event/mlk-birthday-celebration-especially-for-youth-3/]
We welcome notices about events that are free or very low cost.
Keep in Touch
To contact us to arrange a call or meeting, please email SenatorBoysko@senate.virginia.gov [SenatorBoysko@senate.virginia.gov] or call 703-437-0086. We are in Richmond from January 8 through February 22, 2025. My Senate team includes Chief of Staff Karen Harrison, Director of Constituent Services Kathy Shupe, Session Aide Gillie Cuda, and Legislative Aide Juliet Morro. Friend me on Facebook [https://www.facebook.com/JenniferBBoysko] and follow me on X [https://bit.ly/3uLhVhC] . You can also learn more about me at my website JenniferBoysko.com.
If you believe you received this message in error or wish to no longer receive email from us, please unsubscribe.
Friends of Jennifer Boysko
PO Box 247
Herndon, VA 20172
United States
If you believe you received this message in error or wish to no longer receive email from us, please unsubscribe: https://secure.ngpvan.com/p/LakmKKqoaEa-z1agKTAOVw2?unsubscribedata=wH6uRB6bb6tlMMo6N2vjtv8vWLLimljVQflAfmCWUu8I1t4usA%2FCk3jcJ4LOq2os97PphQiZrB3pngHkj9zuBH%2BRKto%2FBX46RAlW9%2B8eolD3Y3IhzowIEZZjHyi4RwMRME%2FU%2Fj%2Ft9E%2B%2BptzgKtNxEMww89PpUaLNA79dPXOeACIUJCmI03jCK1kE0Ee75rC3gjinmfYLqNBaPhwpcibNEOAiGdKxAg%2FpQx6FPRiuFnu21foSIJtDl64KFaAK6tPjpi4Z3Vsa0GGb98qkl2seZArRpHpyoqju83zqSOISAwaM2ZQe6VkPBXDk0vwFPqWa2Zaw8cCOeem%2Bw6eVK1rkZ45jPlId7ZVFPgb6BT%2B%2B9VzoCYlyPxCEAaYrUcceFjp%2FXyx%2Fa%2By77cD5yvZGvZ6d8oGUNkPlzayhre%2FN2aqQTcfGN%2FzTwtG%2Bw8mT4lOt4gBE .

subject: one weird trick to end 2025 GOP House majority
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Josh Weil for Congress 8381 Citrus Chase Drive, Orlando, FL 32836
body:
| |
---
You’ve probably seen the iconic internet clickbait ads that promise one weird trick for fat loss or instant six pack abs, well we’ve got one weird trick of our own to DESTROY the Republican House Majority in three short months. | [View in browser](https://vxobal.clicks.mlsend.com/td/cl/eyJ2Ijoie1wiYVwiOjEyNDk3NjcsXCJsXCI6MTQyNjE5MDMwNjUyNDU0NTM0LFwiclwiOjE0MjYxOTEwMzE4NjY1MDU3MX0iLCJzIjoiZjNmN2U0MDM0NmVjZTgzMiJ9)
| |
---
| [ ](https://vxobal.clicks.mlsend.com/td/cl/eyJ2Ijoie1wiYVwiOjEyNDk3NjcsXCJsXCI6MTQyNjE5MDMwNjU4NzQ1OTkxLFwiclwiOjE0MjYxOTEwMzE4NjY1MDU3MX0iLCJzIjoiMDFmNjEwMmUwYmNkMDE5MSJ9)
---
| Friend,

On Friday, Republicans subjected America to more of their internal drama as they narrowly voted to retain Mike Johnson as Speaker of the House.

Johnson's grasp over the Speakership is especially perilous given the growing faction of ultra-rightwing “rebels” within the Republican Caucus who played the decisive role in the ouster of his predecessor.

Making Johnson’s position even worse is the defection of Congresswoman Victoria Spartz (R-IN), who announced last month that she would be leaving the House Republican Conference. name: Hillsdale College via Liberty Pulse
subject: How often do you think about the Roman Republic?
body:
The history of the Roman Republic is a captivating tale of achievement, political and military genius, and the perils of success.

| | | | _Please see a special message from our sponsor. If you would like to unsubscribe, visit this[link](http://links.liberty-pulse.com/e/encryptedUnsubscribe?_r=29bc9815846f49728b1d374165de7bf2&_s=99382efbccf7410b9ecd68943c60aa30&_t=mi9htaSvuXvD1zqYQwWs1vZP7Ge60NB_W9N6vGwCb8JIzHk3JGBPP_vpa5-0sc1GokZX_Or_fAniloXjflw1Wd_O-D_bjqnu_V7UHav9Bapd2HR_1jEoPvBZmoJmZegh)_
---
[](http://links.liberty-pulse.com/u/click?_t=29bc9815846f49728b1d374165de7bf2&_m=99382efbccf7410b9ecd68943c60aa30&_e=9dxcabZv6ItLLSW_dof3HOPMO39Lg5579ZgsC2gUREatau_-cH6KjLvlRIhccYiU1Fy0nCSS3c5KLGm3hORIjk31lGpmkDeoJpPTCmArwZ-PZAsiNZ--G-ngV6kuf5Kfd-VaztIWdTKSm1blOcy1xL4X-Rsdp-AytX1acBRvhmKV1HORzj8wGd2TdZVoUnjv2sXfoTNA9PouBwIr6RaWB32rhaR_A6UZY55FIU4dL3LF68bVWMNFCgCCJrpNKm2cgaVny3uNsTagUpgE1Ypth4E_IwFpRkPLNIT71lXY30aLhOd4tRDsCJZIKs8R2mknu4ou3AeoRR2Nfzc51SxoJXxdBUc8LelOevThuBuuZnezl_uDBt1MeoOU4JXMjMazAHi_0VeXpCtnJJq-DjrhXw%3D%3D)
| |
[](http://links.liberty-pulse.com/u/click?_t=29bc9815846f49728b1d374165de7bf2&_m=99382efbccf7410b9ecd68943c60aa30&_e=9dxcabZv6ItLLSW_dof3HOPMO39Lg5579ZgsC2gUREatau_-cH6KjLvlRIhccYiU1Fy0nCSS3c5KLGm3hORIjk31lGpmkDeoJpPTCmArwZ-PZAsiNZ--G-ngV6kuf5Kfd-VaztIWdTKSm1blOcy1xL4X-Rsdp-AytX1acBRvhmKV1HORzj8wGd2TdZVoUnjv2sXfoTNA9PouBwIr6RaWB32rhaR_A6UZY55FIU4dL3LF68bVWMNFCgCCJrpNKm2cyJWdLDDpernshTUbPFUHxHbNct7719NHLH54hzBEd_EKnbTc9GjWcINH28dBAPVodFKScEvrbxTi5Bo6e0R6C43GN0uyQ-VGllFH3SR_YRgsWEw6k4At8-tN1rvaUz2W7wz3koCJuRMDsJJM5zorLQ%3D%3D) Dear Friend,

The history of the Roman Republic is a captivating tale of achievement, political and military genius, and the perils of success. One that still impacts our world today.

To help tell this important story to Americans nationwide, we released our free online course, **" The Rise and Fall of the Roman Republic."**

**You can now receive your own DVD box set of "The Rise and Fall of the Roman Republic" when you make a tax-deductible gift of $100 or more in support of our educational outreach efforts on behalf of liberty.**

And, for a limited time, we'll also send you a **free color map** of the Roman world at the end of the Republic. This map is a helpful companion to the course DVD and will illustrate many of the topics discussed in the lectures.
Simply use this secure link to reserve your DVD box set of **" The Rise and Fall of the Roman Republic," **along with the companion map today:

[**https://secured.hillsdale.edu/hillsdale/roman-republic-dvd**](http://links.liberty-pulse.com/u/click?_t=29bc9815846f49728b1d374165de7bf2&_m=99382efbccf7410b9ecd68943c60aa30&_e=9dxcabZv6ItLLSW_dof3HOPMO39Lg5579ZgsC2gUREatau_-cH6KjLvlRIhccYiU1Fy0nCSS3c5KLGm3hORIjk31lGpmkDeoJpPTCmArwZ-PZAsiNZ--G-ngV6kuf5Kfd-VaztIWdTKSm1blOcy1xL4X-Rsdp-AytX1acBRvhmKV1HORzj8wGd2TdZVoUnjv2sXfoTNA9PouBwIr6RaWB32rhaR_A6UZY55FIU4dL3LF68bVWMNFCgCCJrpNKm2cXCZPBlBt_kSKhVOoamohsHYgj4hun6pkXiGUsYTzcaaVA2Hmy1UxSLAwKxDARBVjWWTE8gDNglYVBQZ9fT4kNdqxvoPxxHogwGNeVBBMpQe9oweh7XWEshfD8n6eFSDw1bwzIP-SpeOK1_oINNhf8g%3D%3D)

By studying ancient Rome, you'll discover the conditions necessary to preserve a republic, and, conversely, how a republic may lose its way.

That's why we produced **" The Rise and Fall of the Roman Republic"** and why I hope you'll watch and share the course on DVD.

Thank you for helping to preserve liberty for future generations of Americans through education with Hillsdale College!

Best regards,

Jeremiah Regan, Ph.D.
Executive Director of Online Learning
Hillsdale College
---

name: DLCC Special Elections Team
subject: re: Virginia
disclaimer_text: Paid for by the Democratic Legislative Campaign Committee, dlcc
body:
Democrats are facing two all-important special elections in the Virginia House and Senate. These races are one of our first opportunities to combat the MAGA agenda since Trump’s victory in November. | | |
---
| |

name: Team Voter Action Project
subject: This bill and more like it are coming
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Integrity First Voter Action Project, www
body:
Voter Action Project Logo [http://secure.actblue.com/donate/ifvap-weekly?refcode=010425_1&amount=25]
Truthout: House Passes Chilling “Nonprofit Killer” Bill [http://secure.actblue.com/donate/ifvap-power?refcode=010425_1&amount=25]
We've got to let you know, Team, that a bill that would give President-elect Donald Trump broad powers to target his political foes has passed a major hurdle toward becoming law, recently passing in the U.S. House of Representatives.
The bill, also known as H.R. 9495, would empower the Treasury secretary to unilaterally designate any nonprofit as a “terrorist supporting organization” and revoke its tax-exempt status, effectively killing the group. The bill could give presidential administrations a tool to crack down on organizations for political reasons.
“ Authoritarianism is not born overnight — it creeps in ,” Rep. Lloyd Doggett said on the House floor. “ A tyrant tightens his grip not just by seizing power, but when he demands new powers and when those who can stop him willingly cede and bend to his will .” “ A sixth grader would know this is unconstitutional ,” added Rep. Jamie Raskin.
Unconstitutional and authoritarian or not, this bill has passed the House now and has a good chance of passing both houses of Congress next year. That's why we need to start working now to prevent this bill from ever becoming law.
Will you chip in $25 or whatever you can right now to help us stop this bill and protect the ability of people-powered groups to advocate for our rights? We need every supporter of voting rights with us >> [http://secure.actblue.com/donate/ifvap-power?refcode=010425_1&amount=25]
If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately:

https://www.facebook.com/voteraction [https://www.facebook.com/voteraction] https://twitter.com/voteractionproj [https://twitter.com/voteractionproj] https://www.instagram.com/voteractionproj/ [https://www.instagram.com/voteractionproj/] https://www.linkedin.com/company/voter-action-project/ [https://www.linkedin.com/company/voter-action-project/]
Integrity First Voter Action Project is dedicated to expanding ballot access and increasing voter participation across the country.
Since the Supreme Court gutted key provisions in the Voting Rights Act, extreme politicians have taken advantage to pass harsh laws that restrict access to the ballot box. These restrictions particularly affect disadvantaged communities and people of color. It’s our goal to bring awareness to these laws wherever they may crop up and organize voters to take action to ensure the right to vote is available to everyone in their states and communities.
Your support is crucial to our efforts. Will you donate today to help us protect voting rights? [http://secure.actblue.com/donate/ifvap-weekly?refcode=010425_1&amount=25]
Donate Now [http://secure.actblue.com/donate/ifvap-weekly?refcode=010425_1&amount=25]

body:
I’m ready to hit the ground running for the people of Kansas

[](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/99848459/521055672/-240735101?refcode=email-header&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDIvMS82NTc1OCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIxMWQ4NzJjZS1jZmNhLWVmMTEtODhkMC0wMDIyNDgyYTliNDUiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=qdKvCJY1PYX7jLBchdFfklGRYR9flxzwy9VgCLpBL6M=) Yesterday, I was officially sworn in to the 119th Congress — and I’m ready to hit the ground running for the people of Kansas. I understand that this job is a privilege and a responsibility like no other. Thousands of hard-working Kansans have placed their faith in me to fight for our needs, defend our values, and advocate for our communities in the halls of Congress — and I will not let them down. Today and every day, I am eager to bring real change and real progress to Kansas. That’s why, throughout my time in office, I’ve worked with both sides of the aisle to get things done. Working with both Republicans and Democrats, I’ve passed legislation to lower drug costs for seniors, fund critical infrastructure projects across Kansas, combat climate change, deliver resources to rural communities, and codify same-sex marriage rights into federal law. And in the weeks and months ahead, there will be more where that came from. No matter what party is in charge in Washington, I will continue to roll up my sleeves to deliver common-sense solutions to the families and communities that need it most. I know there’s a lot of hard work ahead in this new session of Congress, and I’m more committed than ever to getting it done. [_**In Congress, I will continue to use my voice to pass meaningful legislation, defend our shared values, and stand up to dangerous extremism. If you believe that’s the kind of leadership Kansas deserves, will you chip in to power my work in the year ahead?**_](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/99848460/521055673/-2111986852?refcode=email_10425_responsibility&amounts=5,10,20,25,50,100,250&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDIvMS82NTc1OCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIxMWQ4NzJjZS1jZmNhLWVmMTEtODhkMC0wMDIyNDgyYTliNDUiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=qdKvCJY1PYX7jLBchdFfklGRYR9flxzwy9VgCLpBL6M=) _If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately:_ | | | | [Donate $5 →](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/99848461/521055674/-2111986852?refcode=email_10425_responsibility&amounts=5,10,20,25,50,100,250&amount=5&express_lane=true&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDIvMS82NTc1OCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIxMWQ4NzJjZS1jZmNhLWVmMTEtODhkMC0wMDIyNDgyYTliNDUiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=qdKvCJY1PYX7jLBchdFfklGRYR9flxzwy9VgCLpBL6M=)

body:
This is just the beginning.

| Yesterday, with my hand on the Constitution, I was officially sworn in as a United States Congresswoman representing Maryland’s Third District. As I took the oath of office, I was reminded of the trust that Marylanders have placed in me to fight for them — _to clean up the Chesapeake Bay, protect our reproductive rights, uphold our democracy, curb gun violence, champion the kitchen table issues that matter most to Marylanders, and so much more._

It is an incredible honor to serve my community and our country. In our nation's 248-year history, approximately 12,000 individuals have had the privilege to serve in the U.S. House of Representatives. But only 396 of those individuals have been women.

As for the Third District, I will be the first woman in over 35 years to hold this seat — following my mentor, Senator Mikulski — and the youngest woman ever to represent Maryland in Congress. I feel honored to join this sisterhood of 396 women, and I hope we see that number continue to grow as we build a government that reflects the diversity and lived experience of everyone in our country.

I ran for Congress on the belief that we can solve hard problems and show up for our constituents by bringing people together and putting people above politics. I have proudly worked across the aisle during my six years serving in the Maryland Senate, and I am fully committed to carrying that collaborative spirit to Washington while fighting for Maryland’s values and priorities.

[_**This is just the beginning. Can I count on you to join me as I get to work in Congress by contributing $25 or whatever you can afford today?**_](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/99848511/521055875/-1717512322?refcode=BLU_EM_SEFC_2025-01-04_1&amount=25&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTIvMS85MTI0OSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJkZWNiZDNlMy1kMWNhLWVmMTEtODhkMC0wMDIyNDgyYTliNDUiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=e4PK-YBtzQBLxq3J2yTapuhz01iaNiIbvSC7d5hx30Q=)

clean_body: This is just the beginning. | = | Yesterday, with my hand on the Constitution, I was officially sworn in as a United States Congresswoman representing Maryland’s Third District. As I took the oath of office, I was reminded of the trust that Marylanders have placed in me to fight for them — to clean up the Chesapeake Bay, protect our reproductive rights, uphold our democracy, curb gun violence, champion the kitchen table issues that matter most to Marylanders, and so much more. It is an incredible honor to serve my community and our country. In our nation's 248-year history, approximately 12,000 individuals have had the privilege to serve in the U.S. House of Representatives. But only 396 of those individuals have been women. As for the Third District, I will be the first woman in over 35 years to hold this seat — following my mentor, Senator Mikulski — and the youngest woman ever to represent Maryland in Congress. I feel honored to join this sisterhood of 396 women, and I hope we see that number continue to grow as we build a government that reflects the diversity and lived experience of everyone in our country. I ran for Congress on the belief that we can solve hard problems and show up for our constituents by bringing people together and putting people above politics. I have proudly worked across the aisle during my six years serving in the Maryland Senate, and I am fully committed to carrying that collaborative spirit to Washington while fighting for Maryland’s values and priorities. = | | | = | = | = | = | = = Thank you for your constant support and confidence. — Congresswoman Sarah Elfreth * | | = Paid for by Elfreth for Maryland Elfreth for Maryland PO Box 5935 Annapolis, MD 21403 United States

name: Benson HQ
subject: Did you see this message last week?
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY JOCELYN BENSON FOR SECRETARY OF STATE
body:
# [](https://act.jocelynbenson.com/go/5?t=1&akid=21%2E181023%2E_-CqRq)
Hi ,
Did you see this message from Secretary Benson? Democracy isn't just her job — it's her life's work, one that will continue with the many challenges ahead this year.
**[That’s why we’re reaching out today: Will you chip in any amount to support Jocelyn Benson’s work?](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/jb-em-20250104-1?refcode=em20250104-1&refcode2=21_181023__-CqRq&akid=21%2E181023%2E_-CqRq) **
**[Donate »](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/jb-em-20250104-1?refcode=em20250104-1&refcode2=21_181023__-CqRq&akid=21%2E181023%2E_-CqRq)**
Thanks.
-- Benson HQ

\--------- Forwarded Message -----------
From: Jocelyn Benson
Date: Fri, Dec 27, 2024
To: dpwillis67@gmail.com
Democracy isn't just my job -- it's my life's work. Every career choice I’ve made has been part of a lifelong mission, _my_ mission: upholding and defending American democracy.
(OK, maybe not my first job selling tickets at the movie theater. But it did teach me a lot of great skills!!)
I started as a House Page in Washington, then ended up investigating domestic terrorist cells in Alabama and tracked international extremist networks as a Marshall Scholar at Oxford. **Along the way, I learned how democracy’s opponents operate -- and what it takes to defeat them.**
That lesson stuck with me all the way from founding the Michigan Center for Election Law to serving as dean of Wayne State Law School to my amazing job today: serving as Michigan’s Secretary of State. My entire career is and was about protecting your right to vote.
**Democracy isn't just my job -- it's my life's work.**
[](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/jb-em-20250104-1?refcode=em20250104-1&refcode2=21_181023__-CqRq&akid=21%2E181023%2E_-CqRq)
My backstory is a big deal because it means I don’t give up. Not when I’m getting pressure from the president and not when I’m facing attacks from billionaires on social media. Maybe it's the same stubbornness that got me through 25 marathons (including Boston at eight months pregnant!), but I believe protecting your vote is worth any challenge.
Speaking of which...looking at the challenges ahead, I’m realizing that in some way, my life’s work is just getting started. To that I say, simply, _bring it on._
Here's where you come in. Your support helps us keep Michigan's elections free, fair, and secure.
**[I’m humbly asking for your support so I can keep fighting for fair and free elections. Will you contribute?](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/jb-em-20250104-1?refcode=em20250104-1&refcode2=21_181023__-CqRq&akid=21%2E181023%2E_-CqRq)**
One lesson from my life’s work is that democracy works best when we all jump in together — Democrats, Republicans, and Independents alike. Thanks for being part of our work to ensure every Michigander's voice rings out loud and clear.
All my best,
Jocelyn

* * *
Before you go... we need your help. Since her 2018 election, Secretary Benson has fought for free and fair elections. She’s on the front lines of defending and strengthening our democracy. **[Will you contribute today to show your support?](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/jb-em-20250104-1?refcode=em20250104-1&refcode2=21_181023__-CqRq&akid=21%2E181023%2E_-CqRq)** **[Donate »](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/jb-em-20250104-1?refcode=em20250104-1&refcode2=21_181023__-CqRq&akid=21%2E181023%2E_-CqRq)**
---

* * *
This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. Email is a critical way we communicate with grassroots supporters like you. However, if you would like to change your subscription preferences, here are some options:
* [Receive Fewer Emails](https://act.jocelynbenson.com/signup/receive-fewer-emails/?t=2&akid=21%2E181023%2E_-CqRq)
* [Update Your Information](https://act.jocelynbenson.com/signup/update-your-information/)
* [Unsubscribe](https://act.jocelynbenson.com/unsubscribe/unsubscribe_2024/?t=3&akid=21%2E181023%2E_-CqRq)

Jocelyn Benson for Secretary of State
PO BOX 21368,
Detroit, MI 48221
PAID FOR BY JOCELYN BENSON FOR SECRETARY OF STATE

body:

That's why they've focused their efforts on attacking a proud veteran like Pete Hegseth.

Pete will dismantle their DEI agenda, eradicate wokeism, and build our military back into a fighting machine - _**and that TERRIFIES them.**_

name: Jenna Burns
subject: Life in prison for saving a cop’s life
body:
Dear Peter,

If the name Fani Willis sounds familiar to you, there's a reason.

She's the radical District Attorney in Georgia who's been trying to put President Trump behind bars.

But President Trump isn't the only person Fani Willis is abusing her office to target.

She's also trying to lock my husband away for the _rest_ _of_ _his_ _life_ for doing his job as a police officer and trying to keep our city safe.

**[Before I ask for your help, let me start at the beginning...](http://links.itsourgreatamerica.com/u/click?_t=442fb7cf105f4725a8bda0b6bcffc1bd&_m=e6947b33bc9544ddb70ec73311911517&_e=lOcfwB25FwfTSlGMnBRxyuRa8BmmxBxsgjd39FuAvUhPZmtvLJT1s6c3drIHzyfl6HrLO6IXtGqNgCfWr-MwdZFRDxKjVDqbAWFWMtJKuspGnSK4JTDLPYKnsJDiIHSaDM7Me5jbclM8ohNhGJ8-xpa5xuhQq6iQvtvcqLwtWTeJggQVLjtMAt7akhqHCFY2QZvlwCwwTcWz9ft6CnmxbMSfIh5DdVHYSGR-IkQFZ1Sm_krgFovcXUtv11zP2ufxm8VBIKgOJ1X0yzVvCkmjRuGKcscJAAEXo-gPLZ7bsAK67ayKPqH1KoPy44QKuI_GTilvMkcj-QOU9ZWp4Lwvi678fwvCvMpnmsu-T92doeGsMRA9ZeY-R5TJ9BYd216z)**

My husband, James, served in the Atlanta Police Department. That's me, James, and our son in the photo I sent.
[](http://links.itsourgreatamerica.com/u/click?_t=442fb7cf105f4725a8bda0b6bcffc1bd&_m=e6947b33bc9544ddb70ec73311911517&_e=lOcfwB25FwfTSlGMnBRxyuRa8BmmxBxsgjd39FuAvUhPZmtvLJT1s6c3drIHzyfl6HrLO6IXtGqNgCfWr-MwdZFRDxKjVDqbAWFWMtJKuspGnSK4JTDLPYKnsJDiIHSaDM7Me5jbclM8ohNhGJ8-xpa5xuhQq6iQvtvcqLwtWTeJggQVLjtMAt7akhqHCFY2QZvlwCwwTcWz9ft6CnmxbMSfIh5DdVHYSGR-IkQFZ1SVPiBHWRFFk_wSwJoAoYvBRBkkLk-mZHL0VSptaRS699gEJNBRmSZiA4e3dXG2W6NEpxzApTpxX7CX98izgTB5bzwbs9PSxz4f4cMP113XIFt_B45UtCboMNV9jhx6ZLWkyCWzfl1KTt33pTRMKvKc)
Being a police officer meant the world to James. He was born and raised in Atlanta, and saw his job as a way to help his neighbors. But if Fani Willis has her way... **_life in prison_** could be his reward.

Our nightmare started more than eight years ago, when an off-duty police officer radioed in about a man breaking into a parked car at an apartment complex.

Then the officer stopped responding. Dispatch issued a distress call, and all available units rushed over.

My husband was closest to the scene, so he arrived first. When he got there, he saw a running car parked facing the wrong way on a one-way street. With his emergency lights on, James got out to investigate.

That's when it happened.

The suspect saw my husband, slammed on the gas, and drove straight at him.

James was certain the man was intentionally trying to run him over.

With only a split second to think, James drew his weapon and fired a single shot at the vehicle bearing down on him. It struck the suspect, who died instantly.

James was shaken by the incident, but thankfully he was unhurt. He went home, certain he had done everything by the book. **So you can imagine our shock when James found out he was being charged with murder!**

James was forced to turn himself in, and spent the night locked up in jail in solitary confinement. They treated him like a common criminal. They even kept him in a straitjacket!

We all thought this was a giant misunderstanding -- just a soft-on-crime District Attorney trying to make a name for themselves by targeting a police officer.

We couldn't have been more wrong.

You see, James is white, and the suspect he shot was black. So the woke, anti-police prosecutors in Atlanta have made it their mission to destroy my husband.

For eight years now, these radical prosecutors -- and the woke mob who helped get them elected -- have dragged my husband's name through the mud.

The District Attorney at the time held press conferences bragging about how tough they were for going after my husband. They even campaigned on putting my James behind bars!

Every time James has to appear at the Fulton County Courthouse for a hearing, angry protesters show up carrying giant signs with James' mugshot on them, with “MURDERER” scribbled across his face in red spray paint.

Now you understand why I'm so upset and why **[I'm turning to you for help.](http://links.itsourgreatamerica.com/u/click?_t=442fb7cf105f4725a8bda0b6bcffc1bd&_m=e6947b33bc9544ddb70ec73311911517&_e=lOcfwB25FwfTSlGMnBRxyuRa8BmmxBxsgjd39FuAvUhPZmtvLJT1s6c3drIHzyfl6HrLO6IXtGqNgCfWr-MwdZFRDxKjVDqbAWFWMtJKuspGnSK4JTDLPYKnsJDiIHSaDM7Me5jbclM8ohNhGJ8-xpa5xuhQq6iQvtvcqLwtWTeJggQVLjtMAt7akhqHCFY2QZvlwCwwTcWz9ft6CnmxbMSfIh5DdVHYSGR-IkQFZ1Q5Rjd8tw3tT0iis-EbTq3bLaxYk-YEiqBEvgoWahVzF7B4TmFvI1x-4mQms8ZQOJphwhcgYhHvd_jC254tjGnkCIq1f3vk5X8ltyLBipTZpYvFyVH0Rflkxxm1VNW88XbzuOI8Vz_HCQYZDk-gCoNi)**

James is an honest, hardworking, good-hearted man who only wants to help people.

He's the guy everyone calls when a broken faucet floods their kitchen, or when their car breaks down.

When he was younger, he spent years traveling to dangerous Third-World countries to help needy people -- places like South Sudan, Madagascar, Liberia, and Haiti. And it was that same selflessness that drove James to become a police officer and graduate the police academy near the top of his class.

My husband is _exactly_ the kind of man you want keeping your city safe.

But none of that matters to radical prosecutors like Fani Willis. She _knows_ what happened that night. She _knows_ James was in a life-or-death situation. She _knows_ that the charge should have been dropped years ago.

But Fani Willis doesn't care.

She just wants to make an example out of my husband. For years, we've been trapped in limbo.

James' police department just threw us away. There's supposed to be this bond of brotherhood in law enforcement. But his fellow officers were forbidden to talk to him -- and the higher-ups fired him before the investigation was even finished.

We've lost nearly all our friends, and we've even been forced to move because of the terrible lies the prosecutors have been spreading about my husband.

It's been nearly impossible for James to get a job with these charges hanging over him.

By some miracle, we've been able to get by, but every day is difficult. And what's been truly overwhelming is the cost of James' legal defense.

My friend, we aren't wealthy people. James' father had to empty his retirement account. Other relatives have sold family heirlooms. We've put nearly every penny we can scrape together into this case.

And it still hasn't been enough.

I know this is how Fani Willis and the radical prosecutors in her office are trying to punish my husband. They're dragging this out as long as possible to break our family.

Earlier this year, we ran out of money. James was about to turn to a public defender. We had all but given up hope... **And then we got a call from Jason Johnson, the President of the Law Enforcement Legal Defense Fund, or LELDF.**

If you've ever heard of LELDF, you know they're a national group fighting on behalf of wrongfully-accused police officers like James.

LELDF has helped dozens of innocent officers -- and their families – at their lowest moment.

And we _were_ at our lowest moment!

Not only did the LELDF board decide to help my husband get the legal defense he deserves, they're also raising money to pay for the best attorneys so James can finally clear his name.

That's why I'm writing to you today to ask you one of the toughest questions I've ever asked anyone...

**[Could you send a contribution today to help defend James?](http://links.itsourgreatamerica.com/u/click?_t=442fb7cf105f4725a8bda0b6bcffc1bd&_m=e6947b33bc9544ddb70ec73311911517&_e=lOcfwB25FwfTSlGMnBRxyuRa8BmmxBxsgjd39FuAvUhPZmtvLJT1s6c3drIHzyfl6HrLO6IXtGqNgCfWr-MwdZFRDxKjVDqbAWFWMtJKuspGnSK4JTDLPYKnsJDiIHSaDM7Me5jbclM8ohNhGJ8-xpa5xuhQq6iQvtvcqLwtWTeJggQVLjtMAt7akhqHCFY2QZvlwCwwTcWz9ft6CnmxbMSfIh5DdVHYSGR-IkQFZ1Tl6OTpc9uQ_D41WbczLL9AvIzlpRYoCd9nCddFoJxyCA8HLI4bkJZpVIK5_OvLHUMhZuHQEqe5hlS6zRwZVCUz5Qj8MSrVySgUe9nMo0SxshCzTFqbPhlMPTSLPkhMiDngMwFKuURAAcjvO-RTbW4w)**

His legal team needs to be working day and night to get ready to defeat Fani Willis's team and get my husband declared NOT GUILTY once and for all.

I know that times are tough right now. And if we had any other options, I wouldn't be so bold as to ask for help from a stranger.

But like I mentioned earlier, we have nowhere else to turn. And I'm so scared for what will happen to my husband.

You know how police officers are treated behind bars. If James is convicted, it's basically a death sentence.

**[So, if you're at all able, would you consider making a tax-deductible donation of $35, $50, $100, or even $500 or $1,000 to LELDF to help wrongfully-accused officers like James?](http://links.itsourgreatamerica.com/u/click?_t=442fb7cf105f4725a8bda0b6bcffc1bd&_m=e6947b33bc9544ddb70ec73311911517&_e=lOcfwB25FwfTSlGMnBRxyuRa8BmmxBxsgjd39FuAvUhPZmtvLJT1s6c3drIHzyfl6HrLO6IXtGqNgCfWr-MwdZFRDxKjVDqbAWFWMtJKuspGnSK4JTDLPYKnsJDiIHSaDM7Me5jbclM8ohNhGJ8-xpa5xuhQq6iQvtvcqLwtWTeJggQVLjtMAt7akhqHCFY2QZvlwCwwTcWz9ft6CnmxbMSfIh5DdVHYSGR-IkQFZ1Sxe6-GI287tjlt9U9QsNDJqSzYQkq8GEDlu1EiT3-D-wCesgrnVMNBvOOvla_QuDBOhpvCMJfr9MIjZ1Qgazu7N3FD_RuOb52xhVuMX9yInOyKdSUe02z3IasHnn3u94c1u5a4UGQNBZs07chWORnV)**

LELDF is a non-profit organization. So your gift is tax-deductible.

And it's your **[$35 gift](http://links.itsourgreatamerica.com/u/click?_t=442fb7cf105f4725a8bda0b6bcffc1bd&_m=e6947b33bc9544ddb70ec73311911517&_e=lOcfwB25FwfTSlGMnBRxyuRa8BmmxBxsgjd39FuAvUhPZmtvLJT1s6c3drIHzyfl6HrLO6IXtGqNgCfWr-MwdZFRDxKjVDqbAWFWMtJKuspGnSK4JTDLPYKnsJDiIHSaDM7Me5jbclM8ohNhGJ8-xpa5xuhQq6iQvtvcqLwtWTeJggQVLjtMAt7akhqHCFY2QZvlwCwwTcWz9ft6CnmxbMSfIh5DdVHYSGR-IkQFZ1S9YXi5Wiv6hGSCv-U00Vcy6NemxTxSEOl973HaZPiJ3TH6SUsD55HYc4oHCxHt0W1jCOrQPAdEmvBcrmGeiCiYtq-ywNi33H7OUFiIkgd_PiThNbubKmjjm2lRbUk4SCbA5hSdZXB6pBPxkyIcAwTk)** that could make the difference between defeating Fani Willis and the radical anti-police prosecutors on her team -- and my husband spending the _rest_ _of_ _his_ _life_ in prison.

clean_body: Dear Peter, If the name Fani Willis sounds familiar to you, there's a reason. She's the radical District Attorney in Georgia who's been trying to put President Trump behind bars. But President Trump isn't the only person Fani Willis is abusing her office to target. She's also trying to lock my husband away for the rest of his life for doing his job as a police officer and trying to keep our city safe. My husband, James, served in the Atlanta Police Department. That's me, James, and our son in the photo I sent. Being a police officer meant the world to James. He was born and raised in Atlanta, and saw his job as a way to help his neighbors. But if Fani Willis has her way... life in prison could be his reward. Our nightmare started more than eight years ago, when an off-duty police officer radioed in about a man breaking into a parked car at an apartment complex. Then the officer stopped responding. Dispatch issued a distress call, and all available units rushed over. My husband was closest to the scene, so he arrived first. When he got there, he saw a running car parked facing the wrong way on a one-way street. With his emergency lights on, James got out to investigate. That's when it happened. The suspect saw my husband, slammed on the gas, and drove straight at him. James was certain the man was intentionally trying to run him over. With only a split second to think, James drew his weapon and fired a single shot at the vehicle bearing down on him. It struck the suspect, who died instantly. James was shaken by the incident, but thankfully he was unhurt. He went home, certain he had done everything by the book. So you can imagine our shock when James found out he was being charged with murder! James was forced to turn himself in, and spent the night locked up in jail in solitary confinement. They treated him like a common criminal. They even kept him in a straitjacket! We all thought this was a giant misunderstanding -- just a soft-on-crime District Attorney trying to make a name for themselves by targeting a police officer. We couldn't have been more wrong. You see, James is white, and the suspect he shot was black. So the woke, anti-police prosecutors in Atlanta have made it their mission to destroy my husband. For eight years now, these radical prosecutors -- and the woke mob who helped get them elected -- have dragged my husband's name through the mud. The District Attorney at the time held press conferences bragging about how tough they were for going after my husband. They even campaigned on putting my James behind bars! Every time James has to appear at the Fulton County Courthouse for a hearing, angry protesters show up carrying giant signs with James' mugshot on them, with “MURDERER” scribbled across his face in red spray paint. Now you understand why I'm so upset and why James is an honest, hardworking, good-hearted man who only wants to help people. He's the guy everyone calls when a broken faucet floods their kitchen, or when their car breaks down. When he was younger, he spent years traveling to dangerous Third-World countries to help needy people -- places like South Sudan, Madagascar, Liberia, and Haiti. And it was that same selflessness that drove James to become a police officer and graduate the police academy near the top of his class. My husband is exactly the kind of man you want keeping your city safe. But none of that matters to radical prosecutors like Fani Willis. She knows what happened that night. She knows James was in a life-or-death situation. She knows that the charge should have been dropped years ago. But Fani Willis doesn't care. She just wants to make an example out of my husband. For years, we've been trapped in limbo. James' police department just threw us away. There's supposed to be this bond of brotherhood in law enforcement. But his fellow officers were forbidden to talk to him -- and the higher-ups fired him before the investigation was even finished. We've lost nearly all our friends, and we've even been forced to move because of the terrible lies the prosecutors have been spreading about my husband. It's been nearly impossible for James to get a job with these charges hanging over him. By some miracle, we've been able to get by, but every day is difficult. And what's been truly overwhelming is the cost of James' legal defense. My friend, we aren't wealthy people. James' father had to empty his retirement account. Other relatives have sold family heirlooms. We've put nearly every penny we can scrape together into this case. And it still hasn't been enough. I know this is how Fani Willis and the radical prosecutors in her office are trying to punish my husband. They're dragging this out as long as possible to break our family. Earlier this year, we ran out of money. James was about to turn to a public defender. We had all but given up hope... And then we got a call from Jason Johnson, the President of the Law Enforcement Legal Defense Fund, or LELDF. If you've ever heard of LELDF, you know they're a national group fighting on behalf of wrongfully-accused police officers like James. LELDF has helped dozens of innocent officers -- and their families – at their lowest moment. And we were at our lowest moment! Not only did the LELDF board decide to help my husband get the legal defense he deserves, they're also raising money to pay for the best attorneys so James can finally clear his name. That's why I'm writing to you today to ask you one of the toughest questions I've ever asked anyone... His legal team needs to be working day and night to get ready to defeat Fani Willis's team and get my husband declared NOT GUILTY once and for all. I know that times are tough right now. And if we had any other options, I wouldn't be so bold as to ask for help from a stranger. But like I mentioned earlier, we have nowhere else to turn. And I'm so scared for what will happen to my husband. You know how police officers are treated behind bars. If James is convicted, it's basically a death sentence. LELDF is a non-profit organization. So your gift is tax-deductible. And it's your that could make the difference between defeating Fani Willis and the radical anti-police prosecutors on her team -- and my husband spending the rest of his life in prison. I'm sorry this e-mail turned out so long. Thank you for taking the time to read about my husband. And thank you in advance for helping my James. Sincerely, Jenna Burns P.S. My husband did EVERYTHING he needed to survive that night. He doesn't deserve to die in prison. But that's EXACTLY what will happen if radical prosecutor Fani Willis gets her way. Please help James before it's too late! Thank you for helping me save my husband and my family. More such officers who sacrifice so much for will face similar fates unless we speak out and stand up for the brave men and women in blue. The next time you see a police officer in your community, please thank them for their service. To read more about our mission or the other Law Enforcement officers we're defending, please visitwww.PoliceDefense.org. And remember -Blue Lives Matter! (C) Law Enforcement Legal Defense Fund | 2560 Huntington Ave. Suite 203, Alexandria, VA, 22303

subject: Discover God's Will for Your Life in 2025
body:
Staying connected to Jesus each day is essential for growing in our faith and reflecting His light in the world around us.

Hello Friend,

Staying connected to Jesus each day is essential for growing in our faith and reflecting His light in the world around us. One way we can strengthen that connection is through daily Bible reading and devotionals that speak God's truth into our hearts--setting aside intentional time with God's Word to keep our minds focused on Him.

I recently received a wonderful reminder of the importance of this practice from Timothy, a chaplain at Parkersburg Correctional Center in West Virginia. Timothy shared his morning routine before heading out to minister to inmates. Here's what he wrote:

_" My day starts by reading your daily devotional email, followed by listening to your daily message. I need to renew my mind and spirit to help me minister to the inmates, and I lean on these things to help me. God is using your ministry to touch lives behind the razor wire. There are no boundaries to God's love."_

What a powerful reminder of God's limitless love and how He reaches each of us wherever we are. No matter our circumstances, we can find strength, guidance, and renewal in His Word.

With that in mind, I'm excited to offer you the brand-new _2025 Pathway to Victory Daily Devotional_. This beautiful devotional, featuring 260 daily messages (one for every weekday of the year), is designed to help you grow in your faith and keep your focus on God all year long. Each season will provide fresh insights to encourage and strengthen you:
* In the winter, discover God's will for your life. That's something we all want to know!
* Through spring and summer, deepen your relationship with Jesus through the book of Colossians.
* In the fall, journey through the parable of the prodigal son and experience the unconditional love of your heavenly Father.

---
| | For your gift of any amount, we'd love to send you this devotional as our thank-you. Every day, you'll find inspiration to carry you through life's challenges and opportunities.

This year's edition is beautifully bound in navy blue with gold trim that would not only grace your nightstand, where you can access it every morning or evening, but it would also make an attractive gift to give to someone you know and love.
---
| [](http://links.newsletter.conservativedirect.com/u/click?_t=5b1853ae48754bee8f471363fe4933a9&_m=8ac46678360a45c287917b3d9410bebd&_e=USHH4byveUnnRLRVFBWgu9F5zTOsV33TjzNm5Ir37e--A5NY7h3uqF3G4C4MJlCNsv2f6qAOV9-_RLKKwAVwNA1Hjf7m3l8Tdkwujzitfs8h6PxkSz_USN6pSw4bu5dYcAwA8CFqZMznD6TLoxrueO6Mss5NTwvdVv6pdPj_MeHRcgbiIQqlDiCNBRErbUlfVfRumcr8jg6u-KEmPMZW_da4gri2ANEOS0ayVVKx8exDzxGwHZnQUfBxPzCDaOU_vZp7qYBub57CKm0uZ6Jn8p2QPmV5zPMrg7mqY1oJNnu12BtaQYcPghcLqdnzOf5ZRQ-U9MwyEThCr95yg_ZBgpFgoIBkb2_a8fFp63llmnvqjP_WTqytJmZH7hOpomvY613Wi7AXjRYyv6G3TGmE0BlmhSXSb-3iSsQBbnCT0Wk%3D)

Thank you for being a part of this ministry. I'm praying that this new devotional will be a daily anchor point of encouragement and wisdom for all who read it.

name: Team AOC
subject: Reflecting on 2024
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Alexandria Ocasio-Cortez for Congress
body:
#
**A look back at 2024 in photos...**
We wanted to kick off the year by sharing just a few of the special moments from our campaign last year.
**January 2024**
Alexandria visited the Louis Armstrong Center—an arts center and museum in Queens that celebrates Louis and Lucille Armstrong and offers community events such as concerts and trumpet lessons.
**March 2024**
Alexandria and Team AOC joined the St. Pat’s for All Parade in Queens! This is an annual parade that celebrates Irish culture and inclusivity.
**April 2024**
We turned in our petition signatures to secure Alexandria’s place on the ballot! This was only possible because of our volunteers’ hard work and dedication.
**June 2024**
We celebrated Pride Month and shared our solidarity with the LGTBQ+ community!
June 9th was the National Puerto Rican Day Parade where we celebrated Puerto Rican culture!
**August 2024**
Thanks to hundreds of generous donations, we were able to distribute more than 1,200 backpacks to students in New York City as they went back to school to help set them up for a successful school year!
**November 2024
**With your help, Alexandria and Team AOC distributed over 1,200 turkeys to families around NYC who didn’t have one for Thanksgiving.
**December 2024
**Alexandria and Team AOC joined striking Amazon Teamster workers on the picket line to support them in the fight for better working conditions!
* * *
Thank you for making this year so special. Our work is only possible because of support from people like you.
We’re excited to continue growing and building with you in the year to come.
With thanks,
Team AOC
**[Contribute $5](https://act.ocasiocortez.com/go/14659?c0=aoc-email-20250104.4JuQ-r&refcode=em20250104-7852-P_ENG_CTR_CTR&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=19&akid=7852%2E2526796%2ELe7RQj)**

**[Donate](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/aoc-email-20250104?refcode=em20250104-7852-P_ENG_CTR_CTR&t=20&refcode2=7852_2526796_Le7RQj&akid=7852%2E2526796%2ELe7RQj)** | **[Merch](https://shop.ocasiocortez.com/?utm_source=em-footer-20250104-7852-P_ENG_CTR_CTR&t=21&akid=7852%2E2526796%2ELe7RQj)**
---|---
[](https://www.facebook.com/OcasioCortez/?t=22&akid=7852%2E2526796%2ELe7RQj) | [](https://twitter.com/AOC?t=23&akid=7852%2E2526796%2ELe7RQj) | [](https://www.instagram.com/aoc/?t=24&akid=7852%2E2526796%2ELe7RQj)
---|---|---
Email us: [speak@ocasiocortez.com](mailto: speak@ocasiocortez.com)
This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. Email is the most important way we keep in touch with people like you, so thank you for reading to the end. Small donors like you keep us going. To contribute via check, please address to Alexandria Ocasio-Cortez for Congress, PO Box 680080, Corona, NY 11368.
* [Receive Fewer Emails](https://act.ocasiocortez.com/signup/receive-fewer-emails/)
* [Update My Personal Information](https://act.ocasiocortez.com/signup/did-your-information-change/?t=25&akid=7852%2E2526796%2ELe7RQj)
* [Unsubscribe](https://act.ocasiocortez.com/unsubscribe/unsubscribe/?t=26&akid=7852%2E2526796%2ELe7RQj)

Paid for by Alexandria Ocasio-Cortez for Congress

subject: Do you support a national ban on assault weapons?
disclaimer_text: Paid for by James for NY 2026
body:
499\. That's how many mass shootings there were in the United States in 2024.
| | | [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/99849136/521058406/-1997846894?code=jtk1788-su-nd&refcode=jtk1788-su-nd&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzAvMS84OTg0OSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJkMDAzYTc2MS1kYmNhLWVmMTEtODhkMC0wMDIyNDgyYTliNDUiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=_4E-ZZ-h6wT45mJckEVhnbl62U_J3G0SRtyBsjA86bA=)
---
| | **The Gun Violence Epidemic needs to end NOW.**

Letitia James is ready to lead this fight, but she needs to know if you're with her. **_[Tell us before midnight:](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/99849137/521058407/1222682659?code=jtk1788-su-nd&refcode=jtk1788-su-nd&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzAvMS84OTg0OSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJkMDAzYTc2MS1kYmNhLWVmMTEtODhkMC0wMDIyNDgyYTliNDUiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=_4E-ZZ-h6wT45mJckEVhnbl62U_J3G0SRtyBsjA86bA=&emci=ef7d869d-4bc9-ef11-88ce-0022482a93af&emdi=d003a761-dbca-ef11-88d0-0022482a9b45&ceid=25369504)_**
---
**Do you think we should BAN assault weapons nationwide?**
---
| | | [YES](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/99849138/521058408/1222682659?code=jtk1788-su-nd&refcode=jtk1788-su-nd&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzAvMS84OTg0OSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJkMDAzYTc2MS1kYmNhLWVmMTEtODhkMC0wMDIyNDgyYTliNDUiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=_4E-ZZ-h6wT45mJckEVhnbl62U_J3G0SRtyBsjA86bA=&emci=ef7d869d-4bc9-ef11-88ce-0022482a93af&emdi=d003a761-dbca-ef11-88d0-0022482a9b45&ceid=25369504)
---
| [NO](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/99849139/521058409/1222682659?code=jtk1788-su-nd&refcode=jtk1788-su-nd&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzAvMS84OTg0OSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJkMDAzYTc2MS1kYmNhLWVmMTEtODhkMC0wMDIyNDgyYTliNDUiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=_4E-ZZ-h6wT45mJckEVhnbl62U_J3G0SRtyBsjA86bA=&emci=ef7d869d-4bc9-ef11-88ce-0022482a93af&emdi=d003a761-dbca-ef11-88d0-0022482a9b45&ceid=25369504)
---
**499. That's how many mass shootings there were in the United States in 2024, Peter. **
Gun violence is a very real crisis facing our nation today.

Last year, we saw nearly **_17,000_ deaths** at the hands of gun violence – and more than 30,000 injured.

These statistics are far more than just numbers. They're children, parents, and loved ones – and they all deserved better from our leaders.
As New York's attorney general, Letitia James has fought relentlessly to make our streets safer. By cracking down on illegal gun trafficking and removing over **_8,400 firearms_** through statewide gun buybacks, AG James has been committed to improving the safety and well-being of our most vulnerable communities.
**But if she's going to fight for progress on this issue at the national level, she needs to know if you're with her.**

name: Jenna Burns
subject: Fighting to keep my husband home
body:
Being a police officer meant the world to James. He was born and raised in Atlanta, and saw his job as a way to help his neighbors. But if Fani Willis has her way... life in prison could be his reward.
Dear Patriot,

If the name Fani Willis sounds familiar to you, there's a reason.

She's the radical District Attorney in Georgia who's been trying to put President Trump behind bars.

But President Trump isn't the only person Fani Willis is abusing her office to target.

She's also trying to lock my husband away for the _rest_ _of_ _his_ _life_ for doing his job as a police officer and trying to keep our city safe.

**[Before I ask for your help, let me start at the beginning...](http://links.freedomfirstalert.com/u/click?_t=9ca143e971904d26a973d002cb0ae7f7&_m=3df590aefcb74a39982ae5c960e916b2&_e=pZMT6Boxmy8KRi8RPlsAo1wP0o_GoY9YwfGKi6zeb7G-a5u_wzHVyRAP7NFCIazDv1HY_IXueAR4sdnhV-7oLkIT7Kw18-loQAVaSQLanbH9r_c2_TBDfbriBc_v0pu8CXASyPRFYTRsnWbv8BZmQFBvnbbn7KUPdFO0nxrZ8hyZg7NagevslV0FEDxbcNnj-jOozxvnSx0OgvXbC0IOVpJ4ByPqlx-GKuCAjntzVWRgkbu0sTIM6_no31urTUc5BT67zeDTi90P_cHg74CPWUcbr3sZfJ9UoIcacPMtGmLDnx8oFS_SDPtoE7aFoT12x9qp6PLXMEykFF8y_niNtl5hDYGD6t45a-t8xNINwd_VX24jp0j7bdcwfL4ipIa_C6rqlVZTKBAefWN7QtZayg%3D%3D)**

My husband, James, served in the Atlanta Police Department. That's me, James, and our son in the photo I sent.
[](http://links.freedomfirstalert.com/u/click?_t=9ca143e971904d26a973d002cb0ae7f7&_m=3df590aefcb74a39982ae5c960e916b2&_e=pZMT6Boxmy8KRi8RPlsAo1wP0o_GoY9YwfGKi6zeb7G-a5u_wzHVyRAP7NFCIazDv1HY_IXueAR4sdnhV-7oLkIT7Kw18-loQAVaSQLanbH9r_c2_TBDfbriBc_v0pu8CXASyPRFYTRsnWbv8BZmQFBvnbbn7KUPdFO0nxrZ8hyZg7NagevslV0FEDxbcNnj-jOozxvnSx0OgvXbC0IOVpJ4ByPqlx-GKuCAjntzVWTFUWDmgfc5IDA7SNrHyTWJcomPNUWpFJ2NciW85TGaQtG4YglsmdgZZh3XwwFV5__WsE11oIUF7w05ehepsqYT96D_BzmotykTjIDMR4OOEaLEUlvGNDtJjhvN7XSSgmHmv29FLwZI4aNUzLdsoYF1khtIZ8ZpR4DvQsMzZrU0HQ%3D%3D)
Being a police officer meant the world to James. He was born and raised in Atlanta, and saw his job as a way to help his neighbors. But if Fani Willis has her way... **_life in prison_** could be his reward.

Our nightmare started more than eight years ago, when an off-duty police officer radioed in about a man breaking into a parked car at an apartment complex.

Then the officer stopped responding. Dispatch issued a distress call, and all available units rushed over.

My husband was closest to the scene, so he arrived first. When he got there, he saw a running car parked facing the wrong way on a one-way street. With his emergency lights on, James got out to investigate.

That's when it happened.

The suspect saw my husband, slammed on the gas, and drove straight at him.

James was certain the man was intentionally trying to run him over.

With only a split second to think, James drew his weapon and fired a single shot at the vehicle bearing down on him. It struck the suspect, who died instantly.

James was shaken by the incident, but thankfully he was unhurt. He went home, certain he had done everything by the book. **So you can imagine our shock when James found out he was being charged with murder!**

James was forced to turn himself in, and spent the night locked up in jail in solitary confinement. They treated him like a common criminal. They even kept him in a straitjacket!

We all thought this was a giant misunderstanding -- just a soft-on-crime District Attorney trying to make a name for themselves by targeting a police officer.

We couldn't have been more wrong.

You see, James is white, and the suspect he shot was black. So the woke, anti-police prosecutors in Atlanta have made it their mission to destroy my husband.

For eight years now, these radical prosecutors -- and the woke mob who helped get them elected -- have dragged my husband's name through the mud.

The District Attorney at the time held press conferences bragging about how tough they were for going after my husband. They even campaigned on putting my James behind bars!

Every time James has to appear at the Fulton County Courthouse for a hearing, angry protesters show up carrying giant signs with James' mugshot on them, with “MURDERER” scribbled across his face in red spray paint.

Now you understand why I'm so upset and why **[I'm turning to you for help.](http://links.freedomfirstalert.com/u/click?_t=9ca143e971904d26a973d002cb0ae7f7&_m=3df590aefcb74a39982ae5c960e916b2&_e=pZMT6Boxmy8KRi8RPlsAo1wP0o_GoY9YwfGKi6zeb7G-a5u_wzHVyRAP7NFCIazDv1HY_IXueAR4sdnhV-7oLkIT7Kw18-loQAVaSQLanbH9r_c2_TBDfbriBc_v0pu8CXASyPRFYTRsnWbv8BZmQFBvnbbn7KUPdFO0nxrZ8hyZg7NagevslV0FEDxbcNnj-jOozxvnSx0OgvXbC0IOVpJ4ByPqlx-GKuCAjntzVWR_frs8mzMuoy0Y7GuFvww6EqICj4cpSH9QJ9cAjhNT-xl5hO6AfHFsz1LL54yQMHOFmQfxLbjDmAQ0jyvhD3FzX4WWol81w9jzrHd4W0BZ6loW9dX2LNshzNSF-EUJRngS8DTNDffw0oLV1wTg8-MyOlMUsmAaPclJ7cQ9uo7vlA%3D%3D)**

James is an honest, hardworking, good-hearted man who only wants to help people.

He's the guy everyone calls when a broken faucet floods their kitchen, or when their car breaks down.

When he was younger, he spent years traveling to dangerous Third-World countries to help needy people -- places like South Sudan, Madagascar, Liberia, and Haiti. And it was that same selflessness that drove James to become a police officer and graduate the police academy near the top of his class.

My husband is _exactly_ the kind of man you want keeping your city safe.

But none of that matters to radical prosecutors like Fani Willis. She _knows_ what happened that night. She _knows_ James was in a life-or-death situation. She _knows_ that the charge should have been dropped years ago.

But Fani Willis doesn't care.

She just wants to make an example out of my husband. For years, we've been trapped in limbo.

James' police department just threw us away. There's supposed to be this bond of brotherhood in law enforcement. But his fellow officers were forbidden to talk to him -- and the higher-ups fired him before the investigation was even finished.

We've lost nearly all our friends, and we've even been forced to move because of the terrible lies the prosecutors have been spreading about my husband.

It's been nearly impossible for James to get a job with these charges hanging over him.

By some miracle, we've been able to get by, but every day is difficult. And what's been truly overwhelming is the cost of James' legal defense.

My friend, we aren't wealthy people. James' father had to empty his retirement account. Other relatives have sold family heirlooms. We've put nearly every penny we can scrape together into this case.

And it still hasn't been enough.

I know this is how Fani Willis and the radical prosecutors in her office are trying to punish my husband. They're dragging this out as long as possible to break our family.

Earlier this year, we ran out of money. James was about to turn to a public defender. We had all but given up hope... **And then we got a call from Jason Johnson, the President of the Law Enforcement Legal Defense Fund, or LELDF.**

If you've ever heard of LELDF, you know they're a national group fighting on behalf of wrongfully-accused police officers like James.

LELDF has helped dozens of innocent officers -- and their families – at their lowest moment.

And we _were_ at our lowest moment!

Not only did the LELDF board decide to help my husband get the legal defense he deserves, they're also raising money to pay for the best attorneys so James can finally clear his name.

That's why I'm writing to you today to ask you one of the toughest questions I've ever asked anyone...

**[Could you send a contribution today to help defend James?](http://links.freedomfirstalert.com/u/click?_t=9ca143e971904d26a973d002cb0ae7f7&_m=3df590aefcb74a39982ae5c960e916b2&_e=pZMT6Boxmy8KRi8RPlsAo1wP0o_GoY9YwfGKi6zeb7G-a5u_wzHVyRAP7NFCIazDv1HY_IXueAR4sdnhV-7oLkIT7Kw18-loQAVaSQLanbH9r_c2_TBDfbriBc_v0pu8CXASyPRFYTRsnWbv8BZmQFBvnbbn7KUPdFO0nxrZ8hyZg7NagevslV0FEDxbcNnj-jOozxvnSx0OgvXbC0IOVpJ4ByPqlx-GKuCAjntzVWQ_ZQDFa--UN8t__nc9Lku6E7tbCC9_FCuvBjLGOg4a4s65Tiz4JPkTgTrX5Lk5XJ_f0aGuQMFl63VMb_kOXQ3FC2oDJ_1aAnxzzwVFyP7H0DW-JfvTVuX6fx-34qCESh3OBieMBfo1iGiGTyJa3tLfcmt6YzSCpDNOVJlLl4Azpg%3D%3D)**

His legal team needs to be working day and night to get ready to defeat Fani Willis's team and get my husband declared NOT GUILTY once and for all.

I know that times are tough right now. And if we had any other options, I wouldn't be so bold as to ask for help from a stranger.

But like I mentioned earlier, we have nowhere else to turn. And I'm so scared for what will happen to my husband.

You know how police officers are treated behind bars. If James is convicted, it's basically a death sentence.

**[So, if you're at all able, would you consider making a tax-deductible donation of $35, $50, $100, or even $500 or $1,000 to LELDF to help wrongfully-accused officers like James?](http://links.freedomfirstalert.com/u/click?_t=9ca143e971904d26a973d002cb0ae7f7&_m=3df590aefcb74a39982ae5c960e916b2&_e=pZMT6Boxmy8KRi8RPlsAo1wP0o_GoY9YwfGKi6zeb7G-a5u_wzHVyRAP7NFCIazDv1HY_IXueAR4sdnhV-7oLkIT7Kw18-loQAVaSQLanbH9r_c2_TBDfbriBc_v0pu8CXASyPRFYTRsnWbv8BZmQFBvnbbn7KUPdFO0nxrZ8hyZg7NagevslV0FEDxbcNnj-jOozxvnSx0OgvXbC0IOVpJ4ByPqlx-GKuCAjntzVWQZXKv_kzsx_ujc7088TbewkCQVzwU036SQmtfBPGOjII0kSIiBLnW0RGidW3Ef9y7TwVVMefu6WAfHjI29cYIbYn4nQImpfe61sE9Eiv3BJiDAq5qy-nLZ8xfR-3U8LNweUfrCdaM6rdmoxuydQb188fBqPxapxCSVU9KlFunfnA%3D%3D)**

LELDF is a non-profit organization. So your gift is tax-deductible.

And it's your **[$35 gift](http://links.freedomfirstalert.com/u/click?_t=9ca143e971904d26a973d002cb0ae7f7&_m=3df590aefcb74a39982ae5c960e916b2&_e=pZMT6Boxmy8KRi8RPlsAo1wP0o_GoY9YwfGKi6zeb7G-a5u_wzHVyRAP7NFCIazDv1HY_IXueAR4sdnhV-7oLkIT7Kw18-loQAVaSQLanbH9r_c2_TBDfbriBc_v0pu8CXASyPRFYTRsnWbv8BZmQFBvnbbn7KUPdFO0nxrZ8hyZg7NagevslV0FEDxbcNnj-jOozxvnSx0OgvXbC0IOVpJ4ByPqlx-GKuCAjntzVWRdAJcKIjHFefiKZ90-VMW609YE-CP-0yQznxhg3ZSoOMPqiOwmDZBHXFbb0Y0-xPQzQv6XNMhzLoyjKoNGyVgCUDSx-eknieTT_EGpmbGuiJPkSBcP0SKRWLQYQ7wikqvf709wMvubRY4uyfV-YjZpYsmIeH3DZaVAP2XgPaS-YA%3D%3D)** that could make the difference between defeating Fani Willis and the radical anti-police prosecutors on her team -- and my husband spending the _rest_ _of_ _his_ _life_ in prison.

I'm sorry this e-mail turned out so long. Thank you for taking the time to read about my husband. And thank you in advance for helping my James.

Sincerely,
Jenna Burns

P.S. My husband did EVERYTHING he needed to survive that night. He doesn't deserve to die in prison. But that's EXACTLY what will happen if radical prosecutor Fani Willis gets her way. Please help James before it's too late! **[Follow this link right now to make your best tax-deductible gift of $35 or more to LELDF.](http://links.freedomfirstalert.com/u/click?_t=9ca143e971904d26a973d002cb0ae7f7&_m=3df590aefcb74a39982ae5c960e916b2&_e=pZMT6Boxmy8KRi8RPlsAo1wP0o_GoY9YwfGKi6zeb7G-a5u_wzHVyRAP7NFCIazDv1HY_IXueAR4sdnhV-7oLkIT7Kw18-loQAVaSQLanbH9r_c2_TBDfbriBc_v0pu8CXASyPRFYTRsnWbv8BZmQFBvnbbn7KUPdFO0nxrZ8hyZg7NagevslV0FEDxbcNnj-jOozxvnSx0OgvXbC0IOVpJ4ByPqlx-GKuCAjntzVWQg0NH14IzoSCwTevyd0EfITKZ8omW2LpfrED6_dWl_TQdJsK97_EYNO94_eLzqKn1j05JMcOeNiX207Hum3SByAeR1lIT-Mr09G7TVpYs-MCuRcI3e7msWlCNSLLYroXZN-W1WnxMDSwDYJ559y8rRCHIYSt0ZD4OnemwhlOx0kg%3D%3D)** Thank you for helping me save my husband and my family.
--------

_More such officers who sacrifice so much for will face similar fates unless we speak out and stand up for the brave men and women in blue. The next time you see a police officer in your community, please thank them for their service. To read more about our mission or the other Law Enforcement officers we're defending, please visit**www.PoliceDefense.org**. And remember -Blue Lives Matter!_
_(C) Law Enforcement Legal Defense Fund | [www.PoliceDefense.org](http://links.freedomfirstalert.com/u/click?_t=9ca143e971904d26a973d002cb0ae7f7&_m=3df590aefcb74a39982ae5c960e916b2&_e=pZMT6Boxmy8KRi8RPlsAo9by7-Y52Sb6qeHZvJiEhT6Ot81hNWJYqiIoCf5aMQGu6yQinq7KCP3QghPs_W1H79N8c9e3Bp9BeMKWN6eIYGNcrlk8sN6veww8t_Suq9nkZILSxBb_XgljAc6cX2bUdHrhm9juCf_n1ZBPUDnNJCAiKkS_xlvY_4f0-8bdQS-rWoL8jkPoCV3WphPEmdTnBw%3D%3D)
2560 Huntington Ave. Suite 203, Alexandria, VA, 22303_

[Unsubscribe](http://links.freedomfirstalert.com/e/encryptedUnsubscribe?_r=9ca143e971904d26a973d002cb0ae7f7&_s=3df590aefcb74a39982ae5c960e916b2&_t=ADG4MUfAxrdVElMCUpjfOhUIT4TidF2jCX53DuYxfYDpiFNXrYJRJhTQqcdfhF0oy_-nUvxArv11NtKFQbVBS8W3S6vROc3zo-AQ93fKeNGhOWCxwHAou37cPlRaq8M8)

That's why I'm writing to you today to ask you one of the toughest questions I've ever asked anyone... His legal team needs to be working day and night to get ready to defeat Fani Willis's team and get my husband declared NOT GUILTY once and for all. I know that times are tough right now. And if we had any other options, I wouldn't be so bold as to ask for help from a stranger. But like I mentioned earlier, we have nowhere else to turn. And I'm so scared for what will happen to my husband. You know how police officers are treated behind bars. If James is convicted, it's basically a death sentence. LELDF is a non-profit organization. So your gift is tax-deductible. And it's your that could make the difference between defeating Fani Willis and the radical anti-police prosecutors on her team -- and my husband spending the rest of his life in prison. I'm sorry this e-mail turned out so long. Thank you for taking the time to read about my husband. And thank you in advance for helping my James. Sincerely, Jenna Burns P.S. My husband did EVERYTHING he needed to survive that night. He doesn't deserve to die in prison. But that's EXACTLY what will happen if radical prosecutor Fani Willis gets her way. Please help James before it's too late! Thank you for helping me save my husband and my family. More such officers who sacrifice so much for will face similar fates unless we speak out and stand up for the brave men and women in blue. The next time you see a police officer in your community, please thank them for their service. To read more about our mission or the other Law Enforcement officers we're defending, please visitwww.PoliceDefense.org. And remember -Blue Lives Matter! (C) Law Enforcement Legal Defense Fund | 2560 Huntington Ave. Suite 203, Alexandria, VA, 22303

# Join Us for the UCP Town Hall Meeting!

We’re excited to invite you to an important conversation about the future of College Park. This Saturday, January 11, 2025, from 10:00 AM to 11:00 AM, we’ll gather at The Muse Center (3383 Main Street, College Park) to discuss issues that matter to you and your family.
**Here’s what we’ll cover:** • Issues impacting College Park Residents • Lack of emergency and ambulatory services in South Atlanta • Upcoming elections and ways to support candidates • How YOU and UCP can work together to create a better future
Let’s commit, plan, execute, and make it better—together. Your voice matters, and we can’t wait to see you there!
**Visit** [UnitedCollegePark.com](https://exeprx.clicks.mlsend.com/tj/c/eyJ2Ijoie1wiYVwiOjEwNTM2NTUsXCJsXCI6MTQyNjMxOTI4NzYzMjUzODcwLFwiclwiOjE0MjYzMTkzOTUwNTkxNTMzM30iLCJzIjoiODQzNzVlNWJiOTlhODBkNyJ9) **for more information.**

|

We’re excited to invite you to an important conversation about the future of College Park. This Saturday, January 11, 2025, from 10:00 AM to 11:00 AM, we’ll gather at The Muse Center (3383 Main Street, College Park) to discuss issues that matter to you and your family. Here’s what we’ll cover: • Issues impacting College Park Residents • Lack of emergency and ambulatory services in South Atlanta • Upcoming elections and ways to support candidates • How YOU and UCP can work together to create a better future Let’s commit, plan, execute, and make it better—together. Your voice matters, and we can’t wait to see you there! Visit for more information. | Other Events This Week: \- January 6th 7:30pm \- January 8th 6:30pm \- January 12th 2:00pm | | | | United College Park 3799 Main Street Box 87398 College Park, GA 30337 United States of America | | You received this email because you signed up on our website or made a purchase from us. |

What better way to help hold the government accountable than to bring the public along to see all of the wasteful spending, unnecessary regulations and fraud that goes on.
