name: Riley Gaines
subject: Warning: The radical transgender movement has parents backed into a corner
body:
There are doctors who mutilate children for profit in the name of transgender "care." They use their "expertise" to convince even conservative parents that if they oppose "transition," their child will commit suicide.| |
---
| | I’m writing to ask you to stand beside me at the top of a very slippery slope.
---
| |
---
| |
---
[](http://links.itsourgreatamerica.com/u/click?_t=442fb7cf105f4725a8bda0b6bcffc1bd&_m=672eb2b167ab496db4aee7ab16f7f242&_e=XBCyF47EWaFmmLkmQIs_dTBBpy97eiAuFKyOG7Js8PvR2tt1mTIknY2_j1hEetermDrSFMzUMH1v7Hpb0p_9nf1kfJXbgBeamhwF51XB6vdNYz-mOImgnzMyGD9FYQ93_GVZKH7hllSzoFv6YZXEhcZnxa-35m2jnYDslxWiJD_-Tppj4gHHLSBAsOxD4RGGlNJ1-B5Udw2ikZweg9wpjpGePRUBnQ7dU70RLb-BuaiCYBTODUEtueJjGM8fKVQoxKSOh8x1nHqEZ4j1O6aBe8QWWgMdia7_Cj1BSRAox7UAWvYD1MQX9yMR2MxlyroXqvn6Mu9uk-5M7v89PXPkLm4TcUBhuirhNHZLmbnZeL3GPeJTl_ZLtvW4k_z8zp_YbYH2L8MlEgymS71vTV9BlQ%3D%3D)
---
| | Dear Fellow Conservative,
---
| | I'm writing to ask you to stand beside me at the top of a very slippery slope.Actually, in my case, it's a slippery _slide_. My name is Riley Gaines and I'm the University of Kentucky swimmer who had to compete against a fully intact 6'4" _male_ swimmer dressed in a women's bathing suit.And after he stole the victory I had worked for my entire life, I had to go back to the women's locker room and undress out of my wet bathing suit while he did the same next to me.
---
| [](http://links.itsourgreatamerica.com/u/click?_t=442fb7cf105f4725a8bda0b6bcffc1bd&_m=672eb2b167ab496db4aee7ab16f7f242&_e=XBCyF47EWaFmmLkmQIs_dTBBpy97eiAuFKyOG7Js8PvR2tt1mTIknY2_j1hEetermDrSFMzUMH1v7Hpb0p_9nf1kfJXbgBeamhwF51XB6vdNYz-mOImgnzMyGD9FYQ93_GVZKH7hllSzoFv6YZXEhcZnxa-35m2jnYDslxWiJD_-Tppj4gHHLSBAsOxD4RGGlNJ1-B5Udw2ikZweg9wpjpGePRUBnQ7dU70RLb-BuagEpxxp67ssU8h0IttYupT34etkmZ8EittgoGBiqcikrJhxH9kq9EUt0g-D6Mg5M6ONTO2V1LbXLpa8jUKSqVQNwE0obPwyWQu4I1jrlj0Lr9Z8Yjem848jsXbxFR7Rv1ubLyiDq8P-ALwYMnFKV9IzYF3KPSPsOvpB_OgL-ur_iw%3D%3D)
---
| | I know the images I'm bringing up are horrible. But please don't stop reading -- because God-fearing, faith-filled people like you and me have a job to do today. We can't retreat into our homes and hope our government's evil culture just passes us by. **[That's why I'm asking you to stand with me today -- before it's too late.](http://links.itsourgreatamerica.com/u/click?_t=442fb7cf105f4725a8bda0b6bcffc1bd&_m=672eb2b167ab496db4aee7ab16f7f242&_e=XBCyF47EWaFmmLkmQIs_dTBBpy97eiAuFKyOG7Js8PvR2tt1mTIknY2_j1hEetermDrSFMzUMH1v7Hpb0p_9nf1kfJXbgBeamhwF51XB6vdNYz-mOImgnzMyGD9FYQ93_GVZKH7hllSzoFv6YZXEhcZnxa-35m2jnYDslxWiJD_-Tppj4gHHLSBAsOxD4RGGlNJ1-B5Udw2ikZweg9wpjpGePRUBnQ7dU70RLb-Buag2IS8rw7GRBMNaiM2K5tXqlu5wQxogJVx9txB6dnZDykaAns8Tm2Co5b_VmBrgTGBo-rKuV7bgJqE9db2vLzyAXjRw6DuI1tfrbKhTY_l8HucQGooXExUMs8Eah4oxMKAt2ykQMT0hbKXhoUIBuN9SbmObXsGFMKtrQ8m_zqfaAQ%3D%3D)** My fellow conservative, you know this slippery slide.It's the same one you got pushed down when the Left told you abortion was going to be "safe, legal, and rare."_Now abortion is a "right" and "women’s healthcare." And if you don’t support it up until the moment of birth, you must "hate women."_ It's the same slippery slide you got pushed down when the Left told you limiting gay couples to civil unions was "mean." You were told, "They just want to use the word "marriage" like everyone else. It's just a word."_Now if you don't fully embrace a homosexual lifestyle by displaying rainbows and celebrating gay pride, you're a "hate-filled bigot."_ Enough with their lies. We have Truth on our side. And we need to start acting like it.**God created man. And God created woman. It isn't any more complicated than that.** Letting men believe they are women... letting girls believe they are boys... is a bold-faced rejection of God’s truth. And if we give this deranged movement one more inch, a year from now when you're forced by law to call boys "she"... when it becomes normal for kids to be taken away from parents who oppose this evil... I don't want you looking back with regret wishing you had done something when you still had a chance.**Your chance is right now -- and right by my side.** **[Please stand with me against the radical transgender movement by making an urgent tax-deductible donation today -- before it's too late.](http://links.itsourgreatamerica.com/u/click?_t=442fb7cf105f4725a8bda0b6bcffc1bd&_m=672eb2b167ab496db4aee7ab16f7f242&_e=XBCyF47EWaFmmLkmQIs_dTBBpy97eiAuFKyOG7Js8PvR2tt1mTIknY2_j1hEetermDrSFMzUMH1v7Hpb0p_9nf1kfJXbgBeamhwF51XB6vdNYz-mOImgnzMyGD9FYQ93_GVZKH7hllSzoFv6YZXEhcZnxa-35m2jnYDslxWiJD_-Tppj4gHHLSBAsOxD4RGGlNJ1-B5Udw2ikZweg9wpjpGePRUBnQ7dU70RLb-BuaiydNVra2qr7j4CulCHAplj8DRy3vRppzEJqNUi-YL08TGy44K1bi21AbUqIUHuZ_rvVHnVWR66lXl7u_T1nRx7EOYSy0wvj88dR086m6bVIcobDdeoWrhUwmcH-oIxVOr8UY56sfndQctdnB1UxSvVmFt3PqzljiSODTM_zylAXg%3D%3D) ** Maybe you're thinking like so many, "Riley, adults are free to do whatever they want. And children should be kept away from this evil by their parents."I agree this problem would have less traction if parents just said, "No."
---
>> But parents in MD had their child taken away because they refused to let their son transition to a "girl." >> Parents in Vermont are seeing their foster care licenses revoked because they admit they would not help a child who may be assigned to their home get puberty blockers or have sex change surgery.>> Parents in California got themselves elected to the school board, passed guidelines to protect their children from the transgender movement, and now the state of California is suing them. >> And Illinois is considering a bill that would change the definition of "child abuse" to include parents who oppose puberty blocking drugs and sex change operations.
---
The radical transgender movement has parents backed into a corner. But when I'm speaking around the country, I meet so many seniors who say, "I wish someone had told me about this sooner." The good news is that right now, you still have a chance to help me stop the radical transgender movement before they push us down their slippery slide.And today I'm writing you on behalf of a group that is doing more work to block the transgender movement than anyone I know. **It's the legal non-profit the Center for American Liberty.** **[And your tax-deductible gift today is going straight to help them.](http://links.itsourgreatamerica.com/u/click?_t=442fb7cf105f4725a8bda0b6bcffc1bd&_m=672eb2b167ab496db4aee7ab16f7f242&_e=XBCyF47EWaFmmLkmQIs_dTBBpy97eiAuFKyOG7Js8PvR2tt1mTIknY2_j1hEetermDrSFMzUMH1v7Hpb0p_9nf1kfJXbgBeamhwF51XB6vdNYz-mOImgnzMyGD9FYQ93_GVZKH7hllSzoFv6YZXEhcZnxa-35m2jnYDslxWiJD_-Tppj4gHHLSBAsOxD4RGGlNJ1-B5Udw2ikZweg9wpjpGePRUBnQ7dU70RLb-BuagTDnYz8dyp8oTxR0xqL9ndEgGoeaSbE4vvexiftyQC4o-3glbR_Ctx5xnpzk9hYnnT0Evvcdn2iynBxVpAtg83rWrL-OfgxCiyvSCvWaKGCMNPFjCkA_LAoDwXTIVtXZqJF96uOrxAd4U6dFvcuURPKLhewLyICgVu-Ri29v5F3A%3D%3D)** With the help of patriots like you, the _Center for American Liberty_ fights the transgender movement _in the courts_ because that’s the only way to stop them. And the _Center for American Liberty_ is attacking this evil from all sides with their comprehensive three-pronged approach.
---
**#1. They're fighting radical schools**.
---
I know it may sound crazy to you but in today's taxpayer-funded schools, teachers and counselors _encourage_ young children to socially "transition" at school and then facilitate the "transition" by giving children new names and even giving them new clothes so they can dress as the opposite sex.And they keep it all a secret from parents! The _Center for American Liberty_ is taking these radicals to court in multiple cases. And they already have one major win! **[When you make your tax-deductible gift today](http://links.itsourgreatamerica.com/u/click?_t=442fb7cf105f4725a8bda0b6bcffc1bd&_m=672eb2b167ab496db4aee7ab16f7f242&_e=XBCyF47EWaFmmLkmQIs_dTBBpy97eiAuFKyOG7Js8PvR2tt1mTIknY2_j1hEetermDrSFMzUMH1v7Hpb0p_9nf1kfJXbgBeamhwF51XB6vdNYz-mOImgnzMyGD9FYQ93_GVZKH7hllSzoFv6YZXEhcZnxa-35m2jnYDslxWiJD_-Tppj4gHHLSBAsOxD4RGGlNJ1-B5Udw2ikZweg9wpjpGePRUBnQ7dU70RLb-BuagDp9iYFoXOxSAAXzoOeCSOQTYDtAN3VhtBLIT-QDhFlWwFWjjovnlRJ50rt_knoF7CERlVhYCp9HCyjW29Omnbh7tHVzWU69dEdPpd7hyIeRpGqJuZEqi3tzTWrw6BxYxIrgUdbINGn9BB23auLaofGBCsevbBN4EWHaOzolys9w%3D%3D), **you're making sure PARENTS have the final word in guiding their children -- not school radicals!
---
**#2. They're fighting radical doctors.**
---
There are doctors who mutilate children for profit in the name of transgender "care." They use their "expertise" to convince _even_ _conservative_ _parents_ that if they oppose "transition," their child will commit suicide.Then these doctors pump children full of dangerous puberty blockers and perform gruesome surgeries to remove children's healthy breasts and other parts. Maybe you've seen a girl named Chloe Cole on Fox News. In a landmark case, the _Center for American Liberty_ is helping her sue the radical doctors and hospital that gave her a double mastectomy at age 15. **[**When you make your tax-deductible gift today**](http://links.itsourgreatamerica.com/u/click?_t=442fb7cf105f4725a8bda0b6bcffc1bd&_m=672eb2b167ab496db4aee7ab16f7f242&_e=XBCyF47EWaFmmLkmQIs_dTBBpy97eiAuFKyOG7Js8PvR2tt1mTIknY2_j1hEetermDrSFMzUMH1v7Hpb0p_9nf1kfJXbgBeamhwF51XB6vdNYz-mOImgnzMyGD9FYQ93_GVZKH7hllSzoFv6YZXEhcZnxa-35m2jnYDslxWiJD_-Tppj4gHHLSBAsOxD4RGGlNJ1-B5Udw2ikZweg9wpjpGePRUBnQ7dU70RLb-Buaj7D03x772tro1NhuuzjASjE1KNznSw_Ubh9qRYZOIVsTPqbSTUOjBrC0mCBmbiE7yEfrFwGmCC3XB2dzsrajyaTTmvs0TRUY1mxy9rb7UF8LSq-Lwz0okwuhNdwcg-X7dlqeJRs-7xGITQgO9pzTRNpPpv6Law22qHOVcBs_99bg%3D%3D)** , you're helping Chloe and the _Center for American Liberty_ make sure this never happens to another child!
---
**#3. They're fighting for _your_ right to speak out against this evil.**
---
Fighting for Freedom of Speech is one of the _Center for American Liberty's_ specialties and they've notched plenty of victories in this space. Their next one is going to be fighting for an 82-year-old grandmother who got banned for life from the YMCA.This grandma raised the alarm that a grown man dressed in a women's bathing suit was in the women's locker room "helping" two little girls get ready to use the bathroom.And she was the one punished!**[**When you make your tax-deductible gift today**](http://links.itsourgreatamerica.com/u/click?_t=442fb7cf105f4725a8bda0b6bcffc1bd&_m=672eb2b167ab496db4aee7ab16f7f242&_e=XBCyF47EWaFmmLkmQIs_dTBBpy97eiAuFKyOG7Js8PvR2tt1mTIknY2_j1hEetermDrSFMzUMH1v7Hpb0p_9nf1kfJXbgBeamhwF51XB6vdNYz-mOImgnzMyGD9FYQ93_GVZKH7hllSzoFv6YZXEhcZnxa-35m2jnYDslxWiJD_-Tppj4gHHLSBAsOxD4RGGlNJ1-B5Udw2ikZweg9wpjpGePRUBnQ7dU70RLb-BuahtBVp11xTviwKadlsmsjZmxGMuwniHPU50tcuic0jWVIJvfKuAW1vyBwuVbQjXxIUioZDLyQ0TO_K5A6aaRaAxPaZYJ7ot4nr3x9RiCXcS4iKcoqkedRa5LykwnK2S2JDB70AttpcmsW9ClgXfrorhN0ytwKB_5Z_MY61l-bK1IA%3D%3D)** , you're helping the _Center for American Liberty_ protect every American's right to speak out against this evil! I know you'd probably love to fund an entire court case on your own after all I've told you.**[But all I'm asking you to do is make a tax-deductible gift of $30, $50, $75, $100 or even $250 or more today -- before it's too late.](http://links.itsourgreatamerica.com/u/click?_t=442fb7cf105f4725a8bda0b6bcffc1bd&_m=672eb2b167ab496db4aee7ab16f7f242&_e=XBCyF47EWaFmmLkmQIs_dTBBpy97eiAuFKyOG7Js8PvR2tt1mTIknY2_j1hEetermDrSFMzUMH1v7Hpb0p_9nf1kfJXbgBeamhwF51XB6vdNYz-mOImgnzMyGD9FYQ93_GVZKH7hllSzoFv6YZXEhcZnxa-35m2jnYDslxWiJD_-Tppj4gHHLSBAsOxD4RGGlNJ1-B5Udw2ikZweg9wpjpGePRUBnQ7dU70RLb-BuaiupMBpMcHNz6-PlJB2WCSaxlgfSoQpRpCbaER2XnORe6UnTN5U_665856DxO9Tkfh15QRh8tVgvLvZX_8RY7du0yiZvPsvUiDMUz4PcKir1F5VSPJuPoAu2Xk4p-JZ2qPvnpRGl77HyDRuo8RKus32aEL8y2SnQDq50KORFomCog%3D%3D)** Please donate whatever amount is right for you whether it's smaller or larger. _The Center for American Liberty_ needs and appreciates every dollar that comes in.And because I believe so strongly in the work they're doing -- and because they are one of the few groups who've stood shoulder-to-shoulder with me in this fight... I**t will be my honor to send you my new book _Swimming Against the Current: Fighting for Common Sense in a World That's Lost Its Mind_ as my free gift** **[**when you donate $100 or more to the Center for American Liberty.**](http://links.itsourgreatamerica.com/u/click?_t=442fb7cf105f4725a8bda0b6bcffc1bd&_m=672eb2b167ab496db4aee7ab16f7f242&_e=XBCyF47EWaFmmLkmQIs_dTBBpy97eiAuFKyOG7Js8PvR2tt1mTIknY2_j1hEetermDrSFMzUMH1v7Hpb0p_9nf1kfJXbgBeamhwF51XB6vdNYz-mOImgnzMyGD9FYQ93_GVZKH7hllSzoFv6YZXEhcZnxa-35m2jnYDslxWiJD_-Tppj4gHHLSBAsOxD4RGGlNJ1-B5Udw2ikZweg9wpjpGePRUBnQ7dU70RLb-Buai8ptwYX5fFjAsiOpsjKCnEz9yocETyM_AecBYozerzJIM4SDXn6SHUS499WiT5CCjHCiGthayNrPjRwrnIWnleKGBWwgzPmqKmghyMEFA_wZJmOV9ldcQDVPDY5H6btd1LoVtvJrqV81UfyKj9xnn_gHSvc2QMU9pMAoCXbagKzw%3D%3D)** Before I go, please let me share one last thought with you.Every morning as a competitive swimmer, I would get up and think of this verse: _For I consider that the sufferings of the present time are not worthy to be compared to the glory that is about to be revealed to us. Romans 8:18_ I applied it to my swimming: work hard now and wins come later. But now I see that God has a much bigger plan for my life just as He does for yours.Thank you for reading my letter all the way to the end. I'm praying for you, and I hope you'll pray for me too.
---
Sincerely,
---
| | Riley Gaines
---
|
---
| | P.S. **[**Please follow this link to make your tax-deductible donation and let me know if you can help the Center for American Liberty defeat the radical transgender movement.**](http://links.itsourgreatamerica.com/u/click?_t=442fb7cf105f4725a8bda0b6bcffc1bd&_m=672eb2b167ab496db4aee7ab16f7f242&_e=XBCyF47EWaFmmLkmQIs_dTBBpy97eiAuFKyOG7Js8PvR2tt1mTIknY2_j1hEetermDrSFMzUMH1v7Hpb0p_9nf1kfJXbgBeamhwF51XB6vdNYz-mOImgnzMyGD9FYQ93_GVZKH7hllSzoFv6YZXEhcZnxa-35m2jnYDslxWiJD_-Tppj4gHHLSBAsOxD4RGGlNJ1-B5Udw2ikZweg9wpjpGePRUBnQ7dU70RLb-BuagEpxxp67ssU8h0IttYupT35UpwPyUN4u4zGVrcMDNUG7olt1a8jRIpx39wKTUEM21XyF5hcXJA4pcQX5yI7T1HstfkPexHhL2RJDfluv6lGXjODrrPgQBRVIs829jBAjl01LMqjfplCzi1ZyYbNYZJkT3zxeBu16i6-hTcENkHOA%3D%3D)** God made man and God made woman. The attempts to deny those basic truths, are attempts to deny the truth of God. clean_body: There are doctors who mutilate children for profit in the name of transgender "care." They use their "expertise" to convince even conservative parents that if they oppose "transition," their child will commit suicide.| | | | I’m writing to ask you to stand beside me at the top of a very slippery slope. | | | | | | Dear Fellow Conservative, | | I'm writing to ask you to stand beside me at the top of a very slippery slope.Actually, in my case, it's a slippery slide. My name is Riley Gaines and I'm the University of Kentucky swimmer who had to compete against a fully intact 6'4" male swimmer dressed in a women's bathing suit.And after he stole the victory I had worked for my entire life, I had to go back to the women's locker room and undress out of my wet bathing suit while he did the same next to me. | | | I know the images I'm bringing up are horrible. But please don't stop reading -- because God-fearing, faith-filled people like you and me have a job to do today. We can't retreat into our homes and hope our government's evil culture just passes us by. My fellow conservative, you know this slippery slide.It's the same one you got pushed down when the Left told you abortion was going to be "safe, legal, and rare."Now abortion is a "right" and "women’s healthcare." And if you don’t support it up until the moment of birth, you must "hate women." It's the same slippery slide you got pushed down when the Left told you limiting gay couples to civil unions was "mean." You were told, "They just want to use the word "marriage" like everyone else. It's just a word."Now if you don't fully embrace a homosexual lifestyle by displaying rainbows and celebrating gay pride, you're a "hate-filled bigot." Enough with their lies. We have Truth on our side. And we need to start acting like it.God created man. And God created woman. It isn't any more complicated than that. Letting men believe they are women... letting girls believe they are boys... is a bold-faced rejection of God’s truth. And if we give this deranged movement one more inch, a year from now when you're forced by law to call boys "she"... when it becomes normal for kids to be taken away from parents who oppose this evil... I don't want you looking back with regret wishing you had done something when you still had a chance.Your chance is right now -- and right by my side. Maybe you're thinking like so many, "Riley, adults are free to do whatever they want. And children should be kept away from this evil by their parents."I agree this problem would have less traction if parents just said, "No." > But parents in MD had their child taken away because they refused to let their son transition to a "girl." >> Parents in Vermont are seeing their foster care licenses revoked because they admit they would not help a child who may be assigned to their home get puberty blockers or have sex change surgery.>> Parents in California got themselves elected to the school board, passed guidelines to protect their children from the transgender movement, and now the state of California is suing them. >> And Illinois is considering a bill that would change the definition of "child abuse" to include parents who oppose puberty blocking drugs and sex change operations. The radical transgender movement has parents backed into a corner. But when I'm speaking around the country, I meet so many seniors who say, "I wish someone had told me about this sooner." The good news is that right now, you still have a chance to help me stop the radical transgender movement before they push us down their slippery slide.And today I'm writing you on behalf of a group that is doing more work to block the transgender movement than anyone I know. It's the legal non-profit the Center for American Liberty. With the help of patriots like you, the Center for American Liberty fights the transgender movement in the courts because that’s the only way to stop them. And the Center for American Liberty is attacking this evil from all sides with their comprehensive three-pronged approach. #1. They're fighting radical schools. I know it may sound crazy to you but in today's taxpayer-funded schools, teachers and counselors encourage young children to socially "transition" at school and then facilitate the "transition" by giving children new names and even giving them new clothes so they can dress as the opposite sex.And they keep it all a secret from parents! The Center for American Liberty is taking these radicals to court in multiple cases. And they already have one major win! , you're making sure PARENTS have the final word in guiding their children -- not school radicals! #2. They're fighting radical doctors. There are doctors who mutilate children for profit in the name of transgender "care." They use their "expertise" to convince even conservative parents that if they oppose "transition," their child will commit suicide.Then these doctors pump children full of dangerous puberty blockers and perform gruesome surgeries to remove children's healthy breasts and other parts. Maybe you've seen a girl named Chloe Cole on Fox News. In a landmark case, the Center for American Liberty is helping her sue the radical doctors and hospital that gave her a double mastectomy at age 15. , you're helping Chloe and the Center for American Liberty make sure this never happens to another child! #3. They're fighting for your right to speak out against this evil. Fighting for Freedom of Speech is one of the Center for American Liberty's specialties and they've notched plenty of victories in this space. Their next one is going to be fighting for an 82-year-old grandmother who got banned for life from the YMCA.This grandma raised the alarm that a grown man dressed in a women's bathing suit was in the women's locker room "helping" two little girls get ready to use the bathroom.And she was the one punished! , you're helping the Center for American Liberty protect every American's right to speak out against this evil! I know you'd probably love to fund an entire court case on your own after all I've told you. Please donate whatever amount is right for you whether it's smaller or larger. The Center for American Liberty needs and appreciates every dollar that comes in.And because I believe so strongly in the work they're doing -- and because they are one of the few groups who've stood shoulder-to-shoulder with me in this fight... It will be my honor to send you my new book Swimming Against the Current: Fighting for Common Sense in a World That's Lost Its Mind as my free gift Before I go, please let me share one last thought with you.Every morning as a competitive swimmer, I would get up and think of this verse: For I consider that the sufferings of the present time are not worthy to be compared to the glory that is about to be revealed to us. Romans 8:18 I applied it to my swimming: work hard now and wins come later. But now I see that God has a much bigger plan for my life just as He does for yours.Thank you for reading my letter all the way to the end. I'm praying for you, and I hope you'll pray for me too. Sincerely, | | Riley Gaines | | | P.S. God made man and God made woman. The attempts to deny those basic truths, are attempts to deny the truth of God. Your help is so critical to the Center for American Liberty's work, Please hurry. It's getting hard to hold back this evil without you. I don't want you to look back a year from now and say, "I wish I had done something when I had the chance." | | | | | | | ---|---|--- The Center For American Liberty is a 501(c)(3) charitable organization fighting against growing anti-free speech and anti-civil liberties trends. © The Center for American Liberty | PO Box 200942, Pittsburgh, PA 15251

name: Team Carney
subject: Invitation for Mayor-Elect Carney's Swearing-In
body:
https://johncarney.org/ [https://johncarney.org/]

Dear Friend,

We are excited to invite you to a historic moment for Wilmington as we welcome John Carney as the new Mayor of our city! Please join us for the official inauguration ceremony of Mayor-elect John Carney on Tuesday, January 7th, at 8:00 PM at the Chase Center on the Riverfront .

image of ... [https://prod.cdn.everyaction.com/images/van/NGP/NGP59/1/105967/images/109th%20Inauguration%20Invitation.jpg]

This is an exciting time for our community, and we would be honored to have you with us as we celebrate the beginning of a new chapter for Wilmington. Mayor Carney's vision for our city promises to be one of growth, opportunity, and unity, and we look forward to sharing this special occasion with you.

Details:

* Date: Tuesday, January 7th

* Reception: 6:30 PM

* Inauguration Meeting: 8:00 PM

* Location: Chase Center on the Riverfront, Wilmington, DE

Please feel free to reach out if you have any questions or need additional information. We hope to see you there!

Sincerely,

Team Carney

https://www.facebook.com/carneyforwilm [https://www.facebook.com/carneyforwilm]
https://twitter.com/carneyforwilm [https://twitter.com/carneyforwilm]
https://instagram.com/carneyforwilm [https://instagram.com/carneyforwilm]

Carney for Wilmington
P.O. Box 2162
Wilmington, DE 19899
United States

If you believe you received this message in error or wish to no longer receive email from us, please unsubscribe: https://secure.ngpvan.com/p/Bocc_U1b_0qglk2TKfy3-Q2?unsubscribedata=YuQ322pNxWE%2FeXOLeySM0424Mb1Q5uVAOSsQ7DKWN%2BYBvrdxS3fd%2FajtltiEVf6pPPLSCL3k0CsQce0xKgo2P6QWP96y2f4M8%2BCtRU00CH1MKrCrvHfHajEH%2BGqGJ%2B%2FZcrrh5QvW6KXaOVeOo4T6%2BcqWytC%2FjRPp7nPznt4ahiQ7TNrx7bKXFxFeCeeP6rp5Y8dWGG11YR7vxczxbxZqErohXn7XGVTT9qwJfkhWKBZXyM3qfSQEMW4d9%2B2KmFSaOXc%2By5MEP1wMWiiJaK6hfuuYvBZBqvNmKKhfpSgv4YN7f3U9rYAHRuITG5LzhB0JKUPpOkKARDeeG2oTQPdQBr5aCUPFoOU8%2Ff5TUxF9yoP%2BS7sj93gYCQ9U1z7EQmDZTwSDiGS7pBgUlg58OXCAJvQuAN5yRauq0fVWeMrB1BE%3D .

name: Blake Gendebien
subject: We’ve been overlooked for too long
disclaimer_text: Paid for by VPP
body:
| Hi team, I’m Blake Gendebien.

I’m a husband, father, dairy farmer, and business owner who was born and raised in the North Country.

**I’m excited to announce that I’m running for Congress here in New York’s 21st District.**

[Will you split $10 between my campaign and the Voter Protection Project today to help us kickstart our campaign and flip this seat in the special election?](https://act.protectvoting.org/go/85813?t=6&akid=18360%2E878179%2EdhGB-O) | [**DONATE »**](https://act.protectvoting.org/go/85813?t=7&akid=18360%2E878179%2EdhGB-O)
---
After serving in the Peace Corps, my parents moved to the North Country and started a dairy farm. I grew up working on the farm, earned a degree in agriculture, and later worked for a farm equipment manufacturer. For the past 22 years, with my family, I have owned and operated Twin Mill Farms, which currently has over 1,000 acres of land, 500 cows, and 12 employees.

Now, I’ve decided to run for Congress because the North Country is a national treasure and has been overlooked for far too long. It’s time for us to get the representation we deserve in Washington.

My experience as a farm owner, serving as Vice Chair on the Agri-Mark Board of Directors, and co-founding the Jules of Life Foundation – a nonprofit that assists patients and families battling cancer – has given me deep roots in our community.

**But this campaign isn’t about me; it’s about all of us.** It’s about all of the farmers, business owners, workers, families, teachers, coaches, and community members here in the North Country. I’m not running for Congress as a stepping stone to political power. I’m running because this is an opportunity to fight for the North Country, and I understand the challenges that folks here are facing.

[Will you split $10 between me and the Voter Protection Project today to join us?](https://act.protectvoting.org/go/85813?t=8&akid=18360%2E878179%2EdhGB-O)
If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your split donation between Blake Gendebien and VPP will go through immediately:
[CONTRIBUTE $10 »](https://act.protectvoting.org/go/85814?t=9&akid=18360%2E878179%2EdhGB-O)
---
[CONTRIBUTE $25 »](https://act.protectvoting.org/go/85815?t=10&akid=18360%2E878179%2EdhGB-O)
[CONTRIBUTE $50 »](https://act.protectvoting.org/go/85816?t=11&akid=18360%2E878179%2EdhGB-O)
[CONTRIBUTE $100 »](https://act.protectvoting.org/go/85817?t=12&akid=18360%2E878179%2EdhGB-O)
[Or a custom donation »](https://act.protectvoting.org/go/85818?t=13&akid=18360%2E878179%2EdhGB-O)
Thank you,

Blake
| | Paid for by VPP
(www.protectvoting.org)
Not authorized by any candidate or candidate's committee. 401 2nd Ave. S, Ste. 303, Seattle, WA 98104

The Voter Protection Project is on an important mission: To end partisan gerrymandering and voter suppression by electing candidates at the state and federal levels that are forceful advocates for voting rights. Our enfranchisement agenda includes working to ensure that every state has automatic voter registration and online voter registration, convenient early voting, and independent redistricting commissions to ensure politicians are not able to draw their own maps.

Please, consider making a [one-time contribution by clicking here](https://act.protectvoting.org/go/121?t=1&akid=18360%2E878179%2EdhGB-O). **Or, to make the most powerful lasting impact and help us oust Republicans up and down the ballot who attack our right to vote, make a[monthly sustaining contribution by clicking here](https://act.protectvoting.org/go/122?t=2&akid=18360%2E878179%2EdhGB-O).**

[Click here](https://act.protectvoting.org/signup/fewer-emails/?t=3&akid=18360%2E878179%2EdhGB-O) to request fewer emails. Click here to [unsubscribe](https://act.protectvoting.org/unsubscribe/unsubscribe/?t=14&akid=18360%2E878179%2EdhGB-O). | | [Please: Pitch In Once A Month To Protect Voting Rights »](https://act.protectvoting.org/go/123?t=4&akid=18360%2E878179%2EdhGB-O)
---
[Donate Just One Time »](https://act.protectvoting.org/go/124?t=5&akid=18360%2E878179%2EdhGB-O)

name: Hillsdale College via Red Conservatives
subject: How do you see the Supreme Court?
body:
Your participation in Hillsdale College’s National Survey on the United States Supreme Court is requested.
| | |
---
| | _Please see a special message from our sponsor. If you would like to unsubscribe, visit this[link](http://links.redconservatives.com/e/encryptedUnsubscribe?_r=66ce1250519441959ebe70cf27686494&_s=8761ce07fda5476d8c6137494800a71b&_t=EeOP99jya-fqH7A62VvaDRG0NkqIypsaf5_F6doMrBCnRGXuV8SMmWWB-n2XujJBuFDuIEl3D4XMghmG84I21sKpXgmdDfMoAvsjGfDzvWHMrICvu_Um-fygyzw2pegV)_
---
[](http://links.redconservatives.com/u/click?_t=66ce1250519441959ebe70cf27686494&_m=8761ce07fda5476d8c6137494800a71b&_e=e45RLCR9rImpEwx-N-9RuO82xPvYchVSZlixdXwPrVrM_2-kWLmQJL5bcGXpT7_q5wBOiw364gWtSMKOI9P5b1PRmNr_in0bJskdJ5bOpOOig_MEXPW_1PkrVFTmwJDMVwqaOrEM2ZrDYwMx9dgX2rQtqBMKrheGp9R3wsSCDt8AgndgL1SyqKxh-RDDikJW5LtqYOropokLyG6J8wl7DQh_L_dd0THNEYpxdHIUHwXtgeHZ6WmlvHYSqlb54xk2zdhxBpyfeS39yKbHd_j3KhbIVOTS8vprXhzgMxv_KWfzZ38iQYT9DJw-BMgj50Rj4p3mvNmhy_gJGm8ZLpBXAMy4HGjei-5JT8GjWYKwuwwM2SwQ7odx_wVDGKBracqsPlbKx1apVtPsHua4ss93Mw%3D%3D)
---
| | | Dear Friend, Your participation in Hillsdale College's **National Survey on the United States Supreme Court** is requested.

Your response will only take a few minutes, but the subject is crucial to the future of liberty and the separation of powers in America.

The American Founders thought that the proper role of the Supreme Court is to apply the Constitution.

But progressives see the Court differently. They want activist judges to legislate from the bench.
## Do you agree that the role of the Supreme Court is to apply the Constitution as it is written and NOT to make laws or advance a particular policy agenda?
[YES](http://links.redconservatives.com/u/click?_t=66ce1250519441959ebe70cf27686494&_m=8761ce07fda5476d8c6137494800a71b&_e=e45RLCR9rImpEwx-N-9RuO82xPvYchVSZlixdXwPrVrM_2-kWLmQJL5bcGXpT7_q5wBOiw364gWtSMKOI9P5b1PRmNr_in0bJskdJ5bOpOOig_MEXPW_1PkrVFTmwJDMVwqaOrEM2ZrDYwMx9dgX2rQtqBMKrheGp9R3wsSCDt8AgndgL1SyqKxh-RDDikJW5LtqYOropokLyG6J8wl7DQh_L_dd0THNEYpxdHIUHwXHkPn8qj-OPKxL7tjtCmyNjphWnlgUb33_AYcAwKMBLmvOWfzxPndE-iYLVTPHR_kzkrqg3GXvcm2z5Rr5qK9KjJhV0Ay9HCrJ8rro4cFLLIEgkcgGeqUenbxqizhY5me_V18U1dKNCCSctYAAASa9v8adSB19tAJWwikZDBp3PQ%3D%3D) [NO](http://links.redconservatives.com/u/click?_t=66ce1250519441959ebe70cf27686494&_m=8761ce07fda5476d8c6137494800a71b&_e=e45RLCR9rImpEwx-N-9RuO82xPvYchVSZlixdXwPrVrM_2-kWLmQJL5bcGXpT7_q5wBOiw364gWtSMKOI9P5b1PRmNr_in0bJskdJ5bOpOOig_MEXPW_1PkrVFTmwJDMVwqaOrEM2ZrDYwMx9dgX2rQtqBMKrheGp9R3wsSCDt8AgndgL1SyqKxh-RDDikJW5LtqYOropokLyG6J8wl7DQh_L_dd0THNEYpxdHIUHwXdjcKgWtNixZAg0iEcCNb_-dHUxJ7eZTEuZ_vd_v4FEPevWAWq8h6zbVtlYx_3QNm7FM3zmdK6eP8jRn1xaVssJ_S75tGb4mBfs0EnMwKz07z16cg29PiIFe-CYjkouCzFiL3C1_Btgr55NFQ8oyEkKp6ti4SHAJz0loiavPBFLg%3D%3D) Even worse, progressives dismayed by recent Supreme Court decisions want to "pack" the bench with additional justices to advance a preferred policy agenda.

As Sen. Elizabeth Warren (D-Mass.) put it in a _Boston Globe_ op-ed: "To restore balance and integrity to a broken institution, Congress must expand the Supreme Court by four or more seats."

What is your opinion about the Supreme Court's role in our constitutional republic?

Please share your thoughts with me using the College's **National Survey on the United States Supreme Court** right away.

Your response will help Hillsdale form effective strategies to educate millions of Americans about the importance of the Constitution to liberty--including the proper role of an independent judiciary that applies the Constitution instead of legislating from the bench.

You can easily complete your **National Survey on the United States Supreme Court** using this secure link: **[https://info.hillsdale.edu/supreme-court-survey](http://links.redconservatives.com/u/click?_t=66ce1250519441959ebe70cf27686494&_m=8761ce07fda5476d8c6137494800a71b&_e=e45RLCR9rImpEwx-N-9RuO82xPvYchVSZlixdXwPrVrM_2-kWLmQJL5bcGXpT7_q5wBOiw364gWtSMKOI9P5b1PRmNr_in0bJskdJ5bOpOOig_MEXPW_1PkrVFTmwJDMVwqaOrEM2ZrDYwMx9dgX2rQtqBMKrheGp9R3wsSCDt8AgndgL1SyqKxh-RDDikJW5LtqYOropokLyG6J8wl7DQh_L_dd0THNEYpxdHIUHwWl0ATdHo9EHiHvnH-G0Dw-xDybcFIrF1-PEuOdACQfuLyelF93lof0_phlB95wOAAqdFIGCxGIABxXzfXGE6q8smFFQgj1O4wGUhto9FfbuQY89A9pxcaz89CJg2QqsUEuuvQFt9aCp7IECxiSrN7ElumosofdQQ79vASLF_udkQ%3D%3D)**

And after you give your views, I hope you will consider supporting Hillsdale College with a tax-deductible gift.

The failure of too many of America's schools to provide young people with a proper education in American history and government makes it easier for progressives to **undermine** the separation of powers at the heart of limited government.

I'm sure you agree that too many Americans do not understand the role of an independent judiciary in preserving our constitutional order.

That's why Hillsdale College has expanded its educational outreach efforts on behalf of liberty nationwide, directly **reaching** and **teaching** millions of Americans in all 50 states--including yours!

These efforts counter the influence of anti-American ideology being taught in classrooms all across America.

Your support will help us to expand our educational outreach, including:
* **Teaching** millions of citizens nationwide through free online courses, such as "Constitution 101: The Meaning and History of the Constitution" and "The U.S. Supreme Court."

* **Reaching** over six million households and businesses nationwide with _Imprimis_ , Hillsdale's free digest of liberty

* **Sending** millions of pocket-size copies of America's founding documents to citizens, teachers, and students in K-12 schools across America.

* **Restoring** excellence to K-12 education by launching and providing ongoing guidance to over 70 classical K-12 charter schools nationwide that offer a strong American history and civics curriculum.

We **undertake our educational outreach efforts on behalf of liberty** --as we do all of our work--without accepting a penny of government funding, not even indirectly in the form of federal or state student grants or loans.

That means all of our work--including reaching and teaching millions about America's great heritage of liberty--depends entirely on the support of Americans like you, who understand the importance of education to liberty.

Please share your thoughts with Hillsdale using the College's **National Survey on the United States Supreme Court **right away--the link is below.

[**https://info.hillsdale.edu/supreme-court-survey**](http://links.redconservatives.com/u/click?_t=66ce1250519441959ebe70cf27686494&_m=8761ce07fda5476d8c6137494800a71b&_e=e45RLCR9rImpEwx-N-9RuO82xPvYchVSZlixdXwPrVrM_2-kWLmQJL5bcGXpT7_q5wBOiw364gWtSMKOI9P5b1PRmNr_in0bJskdJ5bOpOOig_MEXPW_1PkrVFTmwJDMVwqaOrEM2ZrDYwMx9dgX2rQtqBMKrheGp9R3wsSCDt8AgndgL1SyqKxh-RDDikJW5LtqYOropokLyG6J8wl7DQh_L_dd0THNEYpxdHIUHwVubb3c0-fwj4ICNh_8PfgR50O0tE06-XKeuAEpOUUJ9UxDQVRgsJzDABF2UYgi_WZrNRKjEkJl8jyJbPbXYFb-9cJENJLp0OuzOANuxmAlisGxlBT_DkSK5k_qHIPo7Yzas1Bu1BdmTVPCghisYornBZ3uk-71RAJe19sORpGXOg%3D%3D)

Then please consider giving a generous tax-deductible gift to preserve liberty for future generations through education.

Thank you for your time and attention--and for your support of liberty.

Warm regards,

Larry P. Arnn
President, Hillsdale College
Pursuing Truth - Defending Liberty since 1844
---
| | Hillsdale College 33 East College St Hillsdale, MI 49242 USA

---

[Unsubscribe from messages sponsored by Hillsdale College.](http://links.redconservatives.com/e/encryptedUnsubscribe?_r=66ce1250519441959ebe70cf27686494&_s=8761ce07fda5476d8c6137494800a71b&_t=EeOP99jya-fqH7A62VvaDRG0NkqIypsaf5_F6doMrBCnRGXuV8SMmWWB-n2XujJBuFDuIEl3D4XMghmG84I21i9XSsV5o29wmP5WCWg6PV5tpZ8dKixMHvx4eKMnvnKcpLtVWHDOyfVKNV_EayBxO4PX0_l3VQt41KVQ-pi6TBA%3D)

[Unsubscribe from all communications](http://links.redconservatives.com/e/encryptedUnsubscribe?_r=66ce1250519441959ebe70cf27686494&_s=8761ce07fda5476d8c6137494800a71b&_t=EeOP99jya-fqH7A62VvaDRG0NkqIypsaf5_F6doMrBCnRGXuV8SMmWWB-n2XujJBuFDuIEl3D4XMghmG84I21sKpXgmdDfMoAvsjGfDzvWHMrICvu_Um-fygyzw2pegV).

name: Hillsdale College via Conservative Direct
subject: How a republic lost its way
body:
The history of the Roman Republic is a captivating tale of achievement, political and military genius, and the perils of success.

| | | | _Please see a special message from our sponsor. If you would like to unsubscribe, visit this[link](http://links.newsletter.conservativedirect.com/e/encryptedUnsubscribe?_r=5b1853ae48754bee8f471363fe4933a9&_s=2e9a8ac7cab6463583afe2e666b8ba20&_t=o1hhWWJYMzWZXJ4kANztSNZkRMOWXlfHjgJNt3Lu7wajQHZTflrPpWHB0zr5WKxKACKlYjLLov7klOCrOHMDIqjkYxyJtsvOfJGMnpkWOF2I9lTdObNounyHXJb7yUgG)_
---
[](http://links.newsletter.conservativedirect.com/u/click?_t=5b1853ae48754bee8f471363fe4933a9&_m=2e9a8ac7cab6463583afe2e666b8ba20&_e=bbZRgTMTvE3boANn637_RRh_ohb5h640IUEFjRWbsxxFvmjkRY4ohNGvXlAnBcSu4hnbP4DvHrEAG4E1uJSlN-te_F3lsWIK9T_hKftpTEi3ONzx6XmQ3CSftuHWz2PutPx8PTj23HLErWGp16s8h-YMqAOLMhiFmkyuNjjjkVXATjYdU3AvMlwRXpGJ84wd2Vv7kO7DkFU2jYQkFsKOlKr_kZytyKz8BVoqtkIXv1V0DUGZazCaxph5W-eI3ch40-EwrUMBAjc-507Kaj9Hn3O_l0I9TBnzIf-MTiO4aUzeO86bCQsfaWLv8jigbVmHLIq-ANEr_kqWg9uyALsYSaMcB8Wc-CzNQ1lhooe6woPhfhpS74CTRymRuKXUNfBASvdo2NR8-VTt6aYm0OZNtA%3D%3D)
| |
[](http://links.newsletter.conservativedirect.com/u/click?_t=5b1853ae48754bee8f471363fe4933a9&_m=2e9a8ac7cab6463583afe2e666b8ba20&_e=bbZRgTMTvE3boANn637_RRh_ohb5h640IUEFjRWbsxxFvmjkRY4ohNGvXlAnBcSu4hnbP4DvHrEAG4E1uJSlN-te_F3lsWIK9T_hKftpTEi3ONzx6XmQ3CSftuHWz2PutPx8PTj23HLErWGp16s8h-YMqAOLMhiFmkyuNjjjkVXATjYdU3AvMlwRXpGJ84wd2Vv7kO7DkFU2jYQkFsKOlKr_kZytyKz8BVoqtkIXv1V0DUGZazCaxph5W-eI3ch46l2ozTVpluC-XXM3qIrbbznSvoSRM3yKEzgOAZYD1owUYWSZWHXW-KrUt51y4XbJKgq1aHfY4Mish0Rkjc_0i3fVI9scFVTl2FOEjh7uzpEtkWdRpzOup5WcJEo4W0FPMHtRu9ehbxMNuBAZ0cwVVQ%3D%3D) Dear Friend,

The history of the Roman Republic is a captivating tale of achievement, political and military genius, and the perils of success. One that still impacts our world today.

To help tell this important story to Americans nationwide, we released our free online course, **" The Rise and Fall of the Roman Republic."**

**You can now receive your own DVD box set of "The Rise and Fall of the Roman Republic" when you make a tax-deductible gift of $100 or more in support of our educational outreach efforts on behalf of liberty.**

And, for a limited time, we'll also send you a **free color map** of the Roman world at the end of the Republic. This map is a helpful companion to the course DVD and will illustrate many of the topics discussed in the lectures.
Simply use this secure link to reserve your DVD box set of **" The Rise and Fall of the Roman Republic," **along with the companion map today:

[**https://secured.hillsdale.edu/hillsdale/roman-republic-dvd**](http://links.newsletter.conservativedirect.com/u/click?_t=5b1853ae48754bee8f471363fe4933a9&_m=2e9a8ac7cab6463583afe2e666b8ba20&_e=bbZRgTMTvE3boANn637_RRh_ohb5h640IUEFjRWbsxxFvmjkRY4ohNGvXlAnBcSu4hnbP4DvHrEAG4E1uJSlN-te_F3lsWIK9T_hKftpTEi3ONzx6XmQ3CSftuHWz2PutPx8PTj23HLErWGp16s8h-YMqAOLMhiFmkyuNjjjkVXATjYdU3AvMlwRXpGJ84wd2Vv7kO7DkFU2jYQkFsKOlKr_kZytyKz8BVoqtkIXv1V0DUGZazCaxph5W-eI3ch4OAken1TRv2Twxc3QNO2JCpNvQjpUV-hGUe1WuV9TrStQqzG0OtH8M6BiYKZ21uXtxYgCvU1FFNZWqR1U39ycg9cEdZxlTM-7cPGSL_fgGSiav6mnKyaD-vxy3CUKYLjXTHpc7YEuj907EuqN17Rb4A%3D%3D)

By studying ancient Rome, you'll discover the conditions necessary to preserve a republic, and, conversely, how a republic may lose its way.

That's why we produced **" The Rise and Fall of the Roman Republic"** and why I hope you'll watch and share the course on DVD.

Thank you for helping to preserve liberty for future generations of Americans through education with Hillsdale College!

Best regards,

Jeremiah Regan, Ph.D.
Executive Director of Online Learning
Hillsdale College
---

name: Countdown to Inauguration Day
subject: Do Elon and Vivek have your support, Peter?
disclaimer_text: Paid for by the NRSC
body:
Peter,

We're counting down the days until Inauguration Day.

body:
HELP DEMS WIN TWO HOUSE SEATS IN FLORIDA >>> [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/rtp-floridaspecials?refcode=111724_1]
Peter, we’ve just received breaking news out of Florida:
Governor Ron DeSantis has officially called on the Secretary of State to schedule TWO special elections on a RAPIDLY accelerated timeline.
To put it simply: Democrats now have a limited time to prepare to win TWO MORE HOUSE SEATS being vacated by Trump cabinet appointments
These special elections will determine the future of FL-01 , vacated by Matt Gaetz (reportedly stepping up as Trump’s pick for Attorney General), and FL-06 , soon to be left by Mike Waltz (rumored to become Trump’s National Security Advisor).
Flipping these suits blue IS possible - but only if we start preparing NOW. Will you help us build up a warchest of funding to rush to the Democrats who run for these seats? [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/rtp-floridaspecials?refcode=111724_1]
If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation to The Real Texas PAC will go through immediately: DONATE $5 [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/rtp-floridaspecials?express_lane=true&refcode=111724_1&amount=5]
DONATE $10 [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/rtp-floridaspecials?express_lane=true&refcode=111724_1&amount=10]
DONATE $50 [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/rtp-floridaspecials?express_lane=true&refcode=111724_1&amount=50]
DONATE $100 [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/rtp-floridaspecials?express_lane=true&refcode=111724_1&amount=100]
DONATE $250 [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/rtp-floridaspecials?express_lane=true&refcode=111724_1&amount=250]
Other Amount [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/rtp-floridaspecials?refcode=111724_1&amount=25]
Make no mistake: DeSantis and his allies are trying to fast-track these elections to catch Democrats off guard.
They know they need to secure these seats quickly to maintain their MAGA control of Congress.
We CANNOT let them get away with it!
Chip in NOW so we can have a stash of funds ready to go when Democrats put up a candidate for these seats >>> [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/rtp-floridaspecials?refcode=111724_1]
Thanks for taking action,
Team RTP

Contributions or gifts to The Real Texas PAC are not tax deductible. Contributions from corporations, labor organizations, treasury funds, and federal government contractors are prohibited. Only U.S. citizens or legal permanent residents are eligible to contribute. An Individual can contribute up to $5,000 to The Real Texas PAC per calendar year. Married couples may together give a total of $10,000 per calendar year. Federal political action committees (PACs) can contribute up to $5,000 per calendar year. The first $5,000 contributed in a calendar year from federally permissible sources will be deposited in The Real Texas PAC's contribution account. Once a federally permissible source has contributed $5,000 in a calendar year, The Real Texas PAC will transfer any amounts in excess of $5,000 to its non-contribution account. All contributions from corporations and labor unions will be deposited in the non-contribution account. Please contact us at realtexas@mbacg.com if you would like a different allocation.

[](https://substack.com/redirect/8a139577-b85a-42e0-acdf-4a44d06a8992?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)
News Nation hosts **[Bill O'Reilly and Chris Cuomo went at it](https://substack.com/redirect/8a139577-b85a-42e0-acdf-4a44d06a8992?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)** over Trump's plan to hold Liz Cheney accountable for allegedly witness tampering during the January 6 committee hearings in 2022.
"If she tried to convince Cassidy Hutchinson behind closed doors to testify a certain way in front of the J6 committee, then this woman violated federal law!" O'Reilly snapped at Cuomo, who was trying his best to downplay Cheney's alleged wrongdoing.
Watch O'Reilly set Cuomo straight:
[Watch Video](https://substack.com/redirect/8a139577-b85a-42e0-acdf-4a44d06a8992?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)
* * *
# **GOP congressman REFUSES to be silenced by CNN democrats trying to cover for Biden 's corruption**
[](https://substack.com/redirect/019c6a03-ebd4-49c1-aa1a-88855ad9ae68?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)
GOP Mike Lawler **[stood his ground on CNN against democrat media elites](https://substack.com/redirect/019c6a03-ebd4-49c1-aa1a-88855ad9ae68?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)** telling him he and other republicans are wrong about Biden family corruption allegations.
"That is highly speculative!" CNN host Abbey Philip laughed at the Republicans on the panel for alleging that financially corrupt activities were carried out by members of the Biden family, including Joe Biden himself. "I'm still waiting to see the proof of Joe Biden enriching himself."
**[But Lawler the brawler came with receipts.](https://substack.com/redirect/019c6a03-ebd4-49c1-aa1a-88855ad9ae68?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)**
"A Chinese company transferred money to a shell company owned by Hunter and Jim Biden!" Lawler began. "That then transferred money directly to Jim and Sarah Biden's shell company, that then transferred the money to Jim and Sarah's personal account, who then wrote a check for $40,000 to Joe Biden!"
"To say that there is no evidence is untrue," the congressman finished.
[Watch Video](https://substack.com/redirect/019c6a03-ebd4-49c1-aa1a-88855ad9ae68?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)

subject: $3. Today.
body:
Millions of Americans voted against Trump and his extreme allies in Congress, and they are counting on us to do everything in our power to fight back.

$3. Today. That is the contribution we're asking you to make to the Democratic National Committee as we prepare for Trump’s first 100 days in office. $3 because _MILLIONS_ of Americans voted against Trump and his extreme allies in Congress, and they are counting on us to do everything in our power to fight back against Trump’s dangerous Project 2025 agenda. $3 because this moment requires a strong Democratic Party to hold Trump and an emboldened Republican Party accountable. $3 because the DNC is the organization best positioned to move urgent resources to the places they’re needed most as we take on those fights ahead. | | | For years the government has grown bigger, more wasteful, less efficient, and more corrupt.

_**But that stops now. **_

House Republicans are committed to working with the **[Department of Government Efficiency (DOGE)](http://links.conservativeum.com/u/click?_t=26c2e4aa9bbe40418f61e26972138f21&_m=fff2f0ef0dc64391a19eb8c7dd7e69df&_e=MhPIau8brNvu7fbVv3UilgN1R2JpZ7XI8IjZtjmPMYu8PZpYTaDvKgNloPTJnXLRI-twPmXvh1olt364wIEY8FOhO4qly43e44ZI_L81BvZzo6HhEmSQZs6ATtkyIfGu6NvyyDcQGiN0RKa8nyyv6QMlWUi9VmyzvzJCGdabm4VGvV1el1wOIZp2L7rDaQ9xyn4KE-xTPbHjfgGlcZU3uxjQBqth9L5-EAlS5yVp2wAB-nHJIWe2j-5vloJYEZZdWZTlGe3QrDy-8owee7YKhz1pN9wzMJs9OwB7dFZrcqJHA8N4zbn12QXZK75Ot6F3W5JSSinrTc3ySkrQ7dO2cWDYAHRNAXs2FgCt6tS-8Y79EUa9PKfxfU9V1rpE_kjOQli2GF4561gXHsG-kHP9uImVmFTOHvj7PKbT8SEZ-weSfSBRv_dfYEKRukRXW72a "Department of Government Efficiency \(DOGE\)")** to reform our bloated, woke, and inefficient federal government.

The Radical Left will be in a panic when they see that Republicans slashed funding for the Department of Education sponsored communism, illegal immigrants' healthcare, and any other of the Democrats' favorite ideas.
